synopsis: Oregon, 1851. At the height of the Gold Rush, infamous gunslingers Charlie and Eli Sisters find themselves doing the bidding of their villainous boss. Hired to chase down an elusive prospector holding a pivotal secret, the assassins embark on a challenging quest.

title: The Umbrellas of Cherbourg
synopsis: Geneviève, a young Frenchwoman who works in her mother’s small-town umbrella boutique, falls for dashing mechanic Guy. Their brief romance is interrupted when Guy is drafted to serve in the Algerian war. Pregnant, Geneviève has to choose between waiting for Guy or accepting an offer of marriage.

title: Thoroughbreds
synopsis: Two teenage girls in suburban Connecticut rekindle their unlikely friendship after years of growing apart. In the process, they learn that neither is what she seems to be, and that a murder might solve both of their problems.

title: You're Sleeping, Nicole
synopsis: Making the most of the family home while her parents are away, Nicole, 22 years old, is enjoying a peaceful summer with her best friend Véronique. When Nicole’s older brother shows up with his band to record an album, the girls’ friendship is put to the test.

title: Scorched Earth
synopsis: Twelve years after career criminal Trojan fled Berlin, his search for jobs leads him back to the city, where his traditional methods are increasingly out-of-step in the capital’s tech-centric underworld. He eventually lands an old-school job to steal a painting—but the job soon goes off the rails.

title: Vice Is Broke
synopsis: Chef, author, and host Eddie Huang traces the wild rise and fall of Vice Media—from a scrappy alt-punk zine in ’90s Montreal to a global media empire worth $5.7 billion. Along the way, he meets key insiders to unpack how the powerhouse of the indie sleaze era burned bright—and crashed hard.

title: Vermiglio
synopsis: Winter 1944: In the remote Alpine village of Vermiglio, life follows its seasonal rhythms – until Pietro, a Sicilian deserter, arrives. His presence awakens forbidden love in the village’s schoolteacher’s daughter, Lucia, and unsettles the village as the war nears its end.

title: Westwood: Punk, Icon, Activist
synopsis: Trailblazing fashion designer and activist Vivienne Westwood looks back over her storied life and career. Giving filmmakers extensive access to her archive, collaborators, and day-to-day business, she candidly reflects on her cultural legacy and the future of her company.

title: When the Light Breaks
synopsis: Una grapples with grief while harboring a secret, unable to fully express her emotions, as she navigates challenging events swirling around her.

title: Women on the Verge of a Nervous Breakdown
synopsis: Dumped by her lover Iván, soap actress Pepa needs to track him down to deliver an important message. But her life is soon invaded by a series of distractions: Pepa’s friend Candela might have got involved in a terrorist plot, while Iván’s son, who is flat-hunting, ends up visiting Pepa’s apartment.

title: Zugzwang
synopsis: Selim and Muazzez are a happily married couple. One fateful day, Muazzez makes a blunder that hurts Selim, leading to an abrupt breakup. During their months-long period of ambiguous separation, Selim discovers his kidneys have failed.

title: Zoopticon
director: Jon Frickey, Thies Mynther, Sandra Trostel
synopsis: In 2043, humanity launches a spacecraft to send a message to distant galaxies. Decades later, its solitary envoy, burdened with cultural treasures and hope, attempts to end its existence. The act awakens the vessel, and genetic material from five animals across the world unexpectedly comes to life.

title: Garrincha: Hero of the Jungle
synopsis: Garrincha’s journey reveals football as a catharsis for the people’s frustrations. Deconstructing the untouchable idol to expose the reality of “slave contracts” and systemic exploitation, weaving human struggle into his legendary dribbles and goals.

title: Gasoline Rainbow
synopsis: With high school in the rearview, five teenagers from inland Oregon embark on one last adventure. Piling into a van with a busted tail light, their mission takes them to a place they’ve never been—the Pacific coast, five hundred miles away. Their plan, in full: “Fuck it.”

title: General Della Rovere
synopsis: In wartime Italy, Emanuele Bardone cons his fellow Italians by promising to help find their missing loved ones in exchange for money. But when the Nazis force him to impersonate a dead general in prison to extract information from fellow inmates, Bardone finds himself wrestling with his conscience.

title: Generation Um...
synopsis: John and his beautiful girlfriends Mia and Violet enjoy late night partying, random sex, and hard drugs. On a wild night out in New York these three friends form an intimate bond as secrets are revealed and compromises are made on their search for self-discovery in a corrupt world.

title: Geoff McFetridge: Drawing a Life
synopsis: Geoff McFetridge’s art is everywhere—on your Apple watch, in countless galleries, and in title designs for films by Sofia Coppola. Unprecedented access into Geoff’s multifaceted world reveals his obsessive quest to balance family with a creative life, and a man guided by intention and authenticity.

title: Gerhard Richter Painting
synopsis: Shot over three years, this film charts the creative process of the renowned artist in his studio as he works on a series of abstract canvases. Using old and new footage, the media-shy painter reveals his thoughts on a career that has kept him at the forefront of the art world for five decades.

title: Get Out
synopsis: Chris, a young African-American man, visits his white girlfriend’s family for the weekend. At first, Chris reads the family’s overly accommodating behaviour as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter’s interracial relationship—but a series of disturbing discoveries lead him to a sinister truth.

title: Get Ready
synopsis: Found footage from a feature film. From an idyllic scene at the sea to a speedy car driving by night. The radical movement of objects, bodies and senses illustrates the power of cinema.

title: Ghoomer
synopsis: Anina, a young batting prodigy, loses her right hand in an accident. An unsympathetic, failed cricketer gives her new hope, and trains her with unconventional techniques. “Ghoomer” is the new style of bowling they invent together.

title: Ghost Dog: The Way of the Samurai
synopsis: Guided by the words of an ancient samurai text, Ghost Dog is a professional killer able to dissolve into the night and move through New York unnoticed. When his code is dangerously betrayed by a dysfunctional mafia family, Ghost Dog reacts strictly in accord with the Way of the Samurai.

title: Ghost in the Shell
synopsis: In the year 2029, the world has become interconnected by a vast electronic network that permeates every aspect of life. Major Motoko Kusanagi, a cyborg officer, is spearheading the investigation into a master hacker known only as the Puppet Master, who robs humans of their memories.

title: Ghost Trail
synopsis: Hamid, a Syrian literature professor in Strasbourg, secretly belongs to a refugee network tracking down former regime enforcers. When he recognises the man he believes tortured him, his life tilts into obsession. Communicating through a video game, his group closes in, but doubt gnaws at every step.

title: Ghost World
synopsis: In suburban AnyAmerica of 2001, best friends Enid and Rebecca are two too-smart girls using caustic wit to shield themselves from the toxic effects of living in a cultural wasteland. One day, they discover an amiably creepy kindred spirit, Seymour, a weedy record collector that comes between them.

title: Ghostlight
synopsis: When a construction worker unexpectedly joins a local theater’s production of Romeo and Juliet, the drama onstage starts to mirror his own life.

title: Gigantic
synopsis: Mattress salesman Brian Weathersby (Dano) finds his plan to adopt a Chinese baby augmented by the arrival of a young woman, Happy (Deschanel), who comes into his workplaces, falls asleep on one of the beds, and starts to affect his life upon waking up.

title: Gimme Danger
synopsis: Emerging from Michigan amidst a countercultural revolution, The Stooges’ powerful and aggressive style of rock ‘n’ roll blew a crater in the musical landscape of the late 1960s. Through a blend of rock, blues, R&B, and free jazz, the band planted the seeds for what would be soon called punk rock.

title: Ginger and Rosa
synopsis: London, 1962. Two teenage girls are inseparable; they play truant together, discuss religion, politics, hairstyles, and dream of lives bigger than their mothers’ domesticity. But, as the Cold War meets the sexual revolution, and with the threat of nuclear holocaust, their friendship is threatened.

title: Girl
synopsis: Teenage Lara dreams of becoming a ballerina. She’s just relocated city to attend a top ballet school and, as she’s in the early stages of gender transition, has newly enrolled in the girls’ class. While pushing herself to keep up with the other girls, Lara also struggles with her hormone therapy.

title: Girl Asleep
synopsis: Greta just moved to a new town with her family. She floats in a bubble of loserdom with her only friend Elliott, until her parents throw her a surprise 15th birthday party and she’s flung into a parallel place; a world that’s weirdly erotic, violent, and ludicrous – only there can she find herself.

title: Girl in the Window
synopsis: After an accident in a Dutch coal mine, Italian workers Vincenzo and Federico travel to Amsterdam. In the red-light district, they spend the weekend with two sex workers, Else and Cori. What begins as a fleeting escape turns into entanglements that leave Vincenzo reconsidering his return home.

title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
synopsis: Seventeen-year-old Griet becomes a maid in the house of Johannes Vermeer and soon attracts the master painter’s attention. Although worlds apart in upbringing and social standing, Vermeer recognizes her intuitive understanding of his work and draws her into his mysterious world of art and passion.

title: Girl with a Suitcase
synopsis: Born to a wealthy family in Parma, sixteen-year-old Lorenzo tries to make things right toward Aida, a showgirl whom his older brother has mistreated. In extending kindness and standing up for her, he comes of age.

title: Girls Town
synopsis: Mid-90s, NYC. Patti, Angela, Emma and Nikki are high school seniors and best friends preparing for life beyond graduation. Their dreams for the future differ greatly, but the four bright women are steadfastly loyal to each other. But their lives are completely upended after a tragic incident.

title: Girls Will Be Girls
synopsis: Sixteen-year-old Mira leads the life of a model student at a boarding school in northern India. As exams approach, her mother returns to the area to support her. But Mira’s encounter with a new student unsettles the relationship between the two women, as each is forced to confront her own desires.

title: The Guitar Mongoloid
synopsis: A young boy sits on top of a roof twisting TV antennas. Two men try to convince another man to participate in a game of Russian roulette. Teenagers destroy all the bicycles they can find. Lonely, peculiar people live outside the norms in the fictitious Swedish town of Jöteborg.

title: Giuseppe Makes a Movie
synopsis: A wildly surreal, outrageously funny and strangely touching documentary about a truly Outsider Artist, Giuseppe Andrews, who has made 30 feature films starring the seriously impaired residents of his trailer park.

title: Glass Curtain
synopsis: Nesrin, a divorced woman, lives alone with her four-year-old son. As she contends with pressure from her ex-husband Ömer, she faces difficult decisions about her relationship with her boyfriend Selim, by whom she has become pregnant, while navigating a web of bureaucratic obstacles.

title: Glass Life
synopsis: From her studio, Sara Cwynar uses her computer and various studio setups to make sense of her visual archive—and the world outside. Images of food, artworks, political figures, Instagram models and others contend for our attention in a dizzying navigation through our consumerist visual world.

title: Glassland
synopsis: In a social housing suburb in Dublin, John lives with his alcoholic mother, Jean, while earning a meager living as a nocturnal taxi driver. When Jean has an opportunity to recover, John must offer his services to a petty criminal to help pay for his mother’s costly rehab program.

title: Gloria
synopsis: Gloria is a 58-year-old divorcée. Her children have all left home but she has no desire to spend her days and nights alone. Determined to defy old age and loneliness, she rushes headlong into a whirl of singles’ parties on the hunt for instant gratification.

title: Gloria Bell
synopsis: Gloria, an independent divorcee in her 50s, adores her adult children, but she’s interested in being more than a grandmother. She loves to spend her evenings dancing in singles clubs, hoping to meet Mr. Right. Until she meets Arnold at the bar, with whom she starts an uneasy romance.

title: Go Down Death
synopsis: In a cross-episodic melange of macabre folktales penned by the fictitious writer Jonathan Mallory Sinus, an abandoned factory in Brooklyn stands in for a decrepit, haunted village. Soldiers are lost and found in endless woods, while a child gravedigger is menaced by a shapeshifting physician…

title: Go Fish
synopsis: Max is a trendy, young lesbian who is having trouble finding love. A friend sets her up with Ely, whom Max likes, but Ely is frumpy, homely, and older. Nor do they have much in common. Can Max learn to look past the packaging?

title: God is Shy
synopsis: During a train ride, Ariel and Paul pass the time sketching their deepest fears. Their game takes an unexpected turn when Gilda, a mysterious passenger, intrudes on their exchange. Yet, her relationship with fear seems far less innocent than their playful drawings.

title: God's Creatures
synopsis: In an Irish coastal fishing town, factory worker Aileen’s days are brightened when her son Brian returns home after seven years. However, her joy is cut short when one of her co-workers accuses Brian of sexual assault, creating divisions in the town’s close-knit community and within Aileen herself.

title: God's Fool
synopsis: The story of Scott Symons, a larger-than-life writer who has exiled himself to a beautiful Moroccan seaside town for over 25 years. Some of the best known names in Canadian culture reflect movingly on a man who is obsessed with love, Canada, and the erotic possibilities of birds and furniture.

title: God's Own Country
synopsis: Johnny works in isolation on his family’s farm in Yorkshire. He numbs his loneliness with binge drinking and casual sex, until the arrival of Gheorghe, a Romanian migrant worker, employed for the lambing season. Johnny suddenly finds himself having to deal with emotions he has never felt before.

title: Godland
synopsis: In the late 19th century, Danish priest Lucas makes the perilous trek to Iceland’s southeastern coast to establish a church. There, the arrogant man of God finds his resolve tested as he confronts the terrain, temptations of the flesh, and the reality of being an intruder in an unforgiving land.

title: God's Offices
synopsis: In a self-help center for family planning, female teenagers and women of all ages and from different sections of society are looking for help. Five counselors speak to these women batting with difficult decisions around contraception, virginity, abortion, and the taboo of sexuality within families.

title: Godzilla Minus One
synopsis: A kamikaze pilot faces a new threat on Ōdo Island. A colossal monster attacks, claiming the lives of warplane engineers. Burdened by guilt for failing to distract the creature and driven by personal redemption, he joins forces with veterans to confront the monstrous force, known as Godzilla.

title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
synopsis: The new installment in the Monsterverse puts the mighty Kong and the fearsome Godzilla against a colossal deadly threat hidden within our world that threatens the existence of their species and our very own, as well as diving deep into the mysteries of Skull Island and beyond.

title: Gofer
synopsis: Alan’s daily life as a driver and assistant to a federal deputy entails enduring the anger and arrogance of his superior; suffering the  contempt of the deputy’s bodyguards and cleaning up all traces of his boss’ misbehaviour. Today, however, Alan has decided that things will be different.

title: Gold
synopsis: Canada, 1898. The Gold Rush. Emily Meyer begins a long journey with seven German emigrants in search of fortune in the recently discovered goldfields of Dawson. But they have no idea of the stresses and dangers that lie ahead on their 2,500-kilometre journey through the menacing Canadian wilderness.

title: Golden Shot
synopsis: Rusty machines living in their small houses imagine that the sun will come and take them to the sky someday. A small light keeps them alive and dreaming. But one of the machines wants to see the sun itself and he has a plan for that.

title: Golem
synopsis: In some dystopian future, scientists attempt to create a new, pliable race of humans out of degenerate individuals. A seemingly ordinary product of the effort, the genetically engineered Pernat is subject to round-the-clock monitoring as he goes about his life—until he rebels against his guardians.

title: Gomorrah
synopsis: In the slums of Campania, the Camorra crime syndicate thrives on cocaine, corruption, and chemical waste. Teens Ciro and Marco try to steal weapons to take control, while tailor Pasquale attempts to avoid protection fees. But they soon realize: the Camorra is too powerful to fight.

title: Good Boy
synopsis: A loyal dog moves to a rural family home with his owner Todd, only to discover supernatural forces lurking in the shadows. As dark entities threaten his human companion, the brave pup must fight to protect the one he loves most.

title: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
synopsis: A retired school teacher and widow is yearning for human connection and good sex, which she was robbed of in her marriage. She decides to hire a young sex worker, but over the course of their rendezvous, power dynamics shift and their well-worn masks begin to slip.

title: Good Morning
synopsis: Two rambunctious boys living in a Tokyo suburb are determined to have a television so that they can watch wrestling and baseball. Their father, who predicts that “TV will produce 100 million idiots,” refuses, and when told to shut up, the boys take the command literally and zip their lips—forever.

title: Good Morning Mom
synopsis: At a very huge farm in the middle of nowhere, two sisters engage in a secret struggle with each other in order to win their mother’s love. The family is irreparably shaken on the day the sister gets stuck in the swamp due to an unfortunate accident.

title: Good Morning, Night
synopsis: The 1978 kidnapping and murder of Aldo Moro, president of the most important political party in Italy at the time, Democrazia Cristiana, as seen from the perspective of one of his assailants — a conflicted young woman in the ranks of the Red Brigade.

title: Good One
synopsis: 17-year-old Sam embarks on a backpacking trip in the Catskills with her dad and his oldest friend. As the two men quickly settle into a quarrelsome dynamic, airing long-held grievances, Sam attempts to mediate. But when lines are crossed and her trust is betrayed, tensions reach a fever pitch.

title: Good Time
synopsis: After a bank robbery lands his younger brother Nick in prison, Connie embarks on a twisted odyssey through the city’s underworld as he attempts to rescue him. Over the course of one night, Connie races against the clock to save his brother and himself, knowing their lives hang in the balance.

title: Goodbye Berlin
synopsis: Two young teenage boys steal a car and embark on a road trip that will probably change their lives.

title: Goodbye First Love
synopsis: Besotted teenagers Sullivan and Camille struggle with a painful push-pull dynamic, heightened by the young man’s decision to leave Paris and travel. Over the course of eight years, we watch Camille, initially devastated by her boyfriend’s departure, emerge with new passions and a sense of self.

title: Goodbye to Language
synopsis: A married woman and a single man meet. They love, they argue, fists fly. At the same time, a dog strays between town and country elsewhere. As the seasons pass, the man and woman meet again, and the dog finds itself between them. Then, a second film begins: it looks like the first, and yet is not.

title: Goodnight Mommy
synopsis: Twin boys who do everything together, from collecting beetles to feeding stray cats, welcome their mother home after her reconstructive surgery. But with her face wrapped in bandages, and her demeanor distant, they grow suspicious of her identity.

title: Gorbachev. Heaven
synopsis: An interview with former Russian president Mikhail Gorbachev, one of the most influential figures of the last century, whose rule heralded the end of the Soviet Union. In an intimate setting, he gives his view of Russia then and now.

title: Gosford Park
synopsis: In 1930s England, the rich and famous gather together for a weekend of relaxation hosted by Sir William McCordle and Lady Sylvia at their hunting resort, Gosford Park. But when Sir William is found murdered in the library, the overly-attentive servants are sure that everyone present has a motive.

title: Grand Central
synopsis: Gary starts working at a nuclear power plant looking for easy money. Karole is the fiancée of longtime plant employee Toni, one of the many who are exposed to deadly radiation levels. Soon Gary and Karole fall in love, and their romance poses a growing threat to the staff’s tight-knit bonds.

title: Grand Illusion
synopsis: A group of French soldiers, including an aristocratic captain and a working-class lieutenant, grapple with their class differences as they are held in a WWI German prison camp. When transferred to a high-security fortress ruled by an aristocratic German officer, the men must concoct an escape plan.

title: Grand Jeté
synopsis: Years ago, to concentrate on her ballet career, Nadja let her son, Mario, grow up with her mother. At a party, the two—who have hardly ever met—encounter one another as strangers and feel physically attracted to each other. They develop an intense, passionate relationship beyond motherly love.

title: Grand Theft Hamlet
synopsis: With theaters shut during the COVID-19 pandemic, two actors, Sam and Mark, are uncertain about their futures. Finding solace in the virtual chaos of Grand Theft Auto Online, they decide to stage Hamlet in the game’s unpredictable world. This film was produced independently by Project 1961Ltd.

title: Grand Tour
synopsis: Burma, 1917. Edward, a civil servant for the British Empire, jilts his lovestruck fiancée Molly the day she arrives to be married. As he flees into an unexpected odyssey across Asia, the free-spirited Molly—amused by his moves—follows in pursuit, embarking on a globe-trotting cat-and-mouse chase.

title: Granny's Dancing on the Table
synopsis: Eini, 13 years old, grows up isolated from society with her violent father, a man afraid of the world. The brutality that Eini is exposed to pushes her to almost lose her sense of self but through her invincible fantasy, she creates a world within, from which she can draw strength to survive.

title: Great Freedom
synopsis: In post-war Germany, liberation by the Allies does not mean freedom for everyone. Hans is imprisoned again and again under Paragraph 175, a law criminalizing homosexuality. Over the course of decades, he develops an unlikely yet tender bond with his cellmate Viktor, a convicted murderer.

title: Green
synopsis: Security guards in an armoured van try to manage the stress that comes from being close to a pile of cash in Mexico City. The team’s stability is imperilled when one member nears his boiling point.

title: Greener Grass
synopsis: Jill and Lisa are two best frenemies and competitive stay-at-home soccer moms who live in a manicured community where people drive around in golf carts. Jill has a strange need to please people, so when Lisa says that Jill’s new baby is adorable, Jill impulsively offers it to her and Lisa accepts.

title: Gregory's Girl
synopsis: Teenage knucklehead Gregory falls hard for Dorothy, a hotshot female player who takes his spot on the boys’ school soccer team. Prodded by the advice of his smart-mouthed 10-year-old sister, Gregory does make his move, but there’s behind the scenes feminine conspiracies en route.

title: I Am Greta
synopsis: Starting with her one-person school strike for climate action outside the Swedish Parliament, this documentary follows teenage climate activist Greta Thunberg—a shy schoolgirl with Asperger’s—in her rise to prominence, and her galvanising global impact as she sparks school strikes around the world.

title: Griff the Invisible
synopsis: Griff, office worker by day, superhero by night, has his world turned upside down when he meets Melody, a beautiful young scientist who shares his passion for the impossible.

title: Groundhog Day
synopsis: Phil Connors, an arrogant Pittsburgh weatherman, is dreading his upcoming assignment: to cover a festival in smalltown Pennsylvania. Making no effort to hide his frustration, he will find himself caught in a time warp, where he has to relive the same day over and over again.

title: Group Marriage
synopsis: A twosome becomes a foursome, plus another two, and an unconventional-but-amicable multiple coupling becomes a legal and moral stand for free love.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
synopsis: The Guardians of the Galaxy are adjusting to life on Knowhere, but their existence is upended by echoes from Rocket’s past. Peter Quill must lead the Guardians on a dangerous mission to protect Rocket that could lead to the team dissolving.

title: Güeros
synopsis: The arrival of Tomás gives new energy to his brother Sombra and his friend Santos, whose lives seem to be on hold after a student strike. Together, they decide to go on a road trip to find the legendary musician they listened to as kids, and whose location has been unknown for a long time.

title: Guilt
synopsis: Reyhan, raised in a religious family, arrives at her grandmother’s house in a conservative Central Anatolian village, to spend her summer holidays. She has just had her first period and dreads the consequences of being unable to perform the required religious rites.

title: Guilty Bystander
synopsis: In New York City, ex-cop Max Thursday, now the house detective at a scuzzy hotel in an even scuzzier part of town, exists in an alcoholic haze until his ex-wife appears with news of his son’s disappearance. So, Thursday stumbles through the city’s sleazy underworld searching for his kidnapped son.

title: Gun Woman
synopsis: After the brutal rape and death of his wife at the hands of Hamazaki’s son, crippled Japanese doctor Mastermind plans an act of revenge. Buying a Japanese meth head young woman, Mastermind rehabilitates her and trains her up to be a highly skilled killer to assassinate Hamazaki’s son.

title: Guts and Glitz
synopsis: Audiovisual material gathered by filmmaker Fox Maxy over a decade, including documentary footage, television clips, and animation—sometimes layered on top of one another—are presented as one collage. Amid this sensory barrage, themes of sexual violence, community, confidence and joy are explored.

title: Hackers
synopsis: Entering a highly secured computer at a mineral corporation, a newbie hacker uncovers an embezzling plot that could destroy the world’s ecosystem. When the hacker and his pals are targeted for the crime, they must launch a cyber-attack that will clear their names and prevent an ecological disaster.

title: Hail
synopsis: Fresh out of a Melbourne prison, Dan reunites with the love of his life, Leanne. Together, they are a fierce, passionate, and tender couple—and Dan soon resolves to go straight. But when Leanne’s mysterious old criminal friend appears with a proposal, Dan is lured back to a life of crime.

title: Hair
synopsis: Drafted for the Vietnam War, naive farmhand Claude arrives in New York, where he befriends a commune of hippies led by the charismatic George Berger. As they challenge his beliefs and introduce him to a free-spirited world, Claude meets and falls for Sheila, a rich debutante with a rebellious soul.

title: Hair
synopsis: Hamdi is a wigmaker. After being diagnosed with terminal cancer he loses interest in everything. Then he meets Meryem, who wants to sell her beautiful long hair.

title: Hair High
synopsis: A gothic ’50s high-school comedy about a love-triangle that goes terribly bad, as two young, murdered teens returning to their prom to get revenge.

title: Haitian Corner
synopsis: A poet from Haiti flees to America after being imprisoned in his native country. Recovering from the experience, he begins to examine his past. One day he encounters his former torturer, and becomes obsessed with taking his revenge.

title: Hakkı
synopsis: Middle-aged HAKKI lives in a historical Aegean village with his family. He provides for them by selling statuettes in front of the nearby ancient city as well as guiding local tours. The region harbors business opportunities as touristic interest booms; however, HAKKI fails to catch the trend.

title: Hâl
synopsis: A performer moves through a shifting space, searching for a pure state of presence. Their body struggles, adapts, and responds to its surroundings, caught between stillness and motion.

title: Hale County This Morning, This Evening
synopsis: Daniel Collins and Quincy Bryant are two young African American men from rural Hale County, Alabama. Hale County This Morning, This Evening looks at their lives over the course of five years, as Collins attends college in search of opportunity and Bryant becomes a father to an energetic son.

title: Half Nelson
synopsis: Dan, a dynamic and inspirational history teacher in a Brooklyn high school, leads a secret life of addiction. Juggling his hangovers and homework, Dan keeps his lives separate—until troubled student Drey catches him getting high after school. Soon the two lost souls strike up an unlikely friendship.

title: Ham on Rye
synopsis: A bizarre rite of passage at the local deli determines the fate of a generation of teenagers, leading some to escape their suburban town and dooming others to remain.

title: Hamlet Goes Business
synopsis: When Hamlet discovers his father’s deceased body, he finds himself pulled into a power struggle as his scheming uncle attempts to secure a monopoly on the Scandinavian rubber duck industry. Will Hamlet avenge his father? Will he become the king of rubber ducks? Does any of it really matter?

title: Hamnet
synopsis: In 16th-century England, Agnes, deeply attuned to the natural world, and Will defy expectations to build a life together. When the loss of their child shatters the family, sorrow strains their bond, as Will retreats into his work, transforming mourning into the tragedy Hamlet.

title: Hanging on the Same Rope
synopsis: An unexpected guest, severed family ties, friendships on the verge of ending. Before they completely drift apart; Ali, Büşra, Efe, and Güray find themselves in a spiral of loneliness at the collapse point of their personal lives.

title: Hannah Arendt
synopsis: Hannah Arendt is a portrait of the genius that shook the world with her discovery of “the banality of evil.” After she attends the Nazi Adolf Eichmann’s trial in Jerusalem, Arendt dares to write about the Holocaust in terms no one has ever heard before…

title: Hannah Takes the Stairs
synopsis: Over the course of one hot post-graduate summer, Hannah falls precariously in and out of love. A breaker of hearts and chronically dissatisfied, she finds herself drifting away from her newly unemployed boyfriend and drawn to two of her co-workers, Matt and Paul.

title: Hao Are You
synopsis: The American War in Vietnam scattered them across three continents. Nearly 50 years after their escape, contact between the seven family members has all but broken down. Director Dieu Hao Do travels to Vietnam, Hong Kong, California, and Germany to reconnect with his estranged clan.

title: Happer's Comet
synopsis: It is the middle of the night in a small town in suburban America. But night is not always for sleeping. A camera peers into the late-night happenings of various residents and witnesses a number of them quietly escape into the dark… on rollerblades.

title: Happy Birthday, Mr. Mograbi
synopsis: With sardonic humor, filmmaker Avi Mograbi takes stock of his personal situation and that of his country, as Israel marks its 50th anniversary.

title: Happy Together
synopsis: Lai and his lover Ho go on a trip to Buenos Aires from Hong Kong. Their torrid relationship lives out among lusty tango bars and the salsa music of La Boca sidewalks. But tensions grow between the two lovers, as they find themselves far from home with their lives drifting in opposite directions.

title: Hara-kiri: Death of a Samurai
synopsis: Poverty-stricken samurai Hanshiro is seeking an honorable end. He requests to commit hara-kiri in a feudal lord’s courtyard. Trying to dismiss his wish, the lord recounts a similar plea from a young samurai years ago. But soon he will realize that Hanshiro’s request is different from what it seems.

title: Hard Boiled
synopsis: When his partner is killed by gangsters, a tough investigator must team up with an undercover cop to seek revenge for his slain partner and bring a dangerous crime syndicate to justice.

title: Hard Truths
synopsis: Pansy is a woman wracked by fear, burdened by afflictions, and prone to explosive tirades against her family and anyone in her path. Her constant criticism isolates her, except from her cheerful sister Chantal, who remains sympathetic.

title: Hardcore
synopsis: A Midwestern businessman is simmering with rage against the world when his daughter runs away to California to become a porn performer. His journey after her takes him into the seediest circles of the sex trade, exposing him to a series of shocks to his conservatism.

title: Harem Suare
synopsis: As the Ottoman Empire comes to an end, an old servant spins a tale to keep the women in the Sultan’s harem distracted. The story is about Safiye, who first becomes the Sultan’s favorite concubine, and later the official wife.

title: Harmonica
synopsis: In the sun-soaked south of Iran, a young boy receives a gleaming Japanese harmonica from abroad. Enchanted by the object, his friends become increasingly fixated, sparking rivalries and quiet power struggles as they vie for the fleeting chance to hold it—or play a single note.

title: Harmonium
synopsis: Toshio’s ordinary life takes an ominous turn when Yasaka, an old acquaintance, is released from prison and in need of help. Toshio gives him a job and takes him in to live with his family. He soon regrets this decision, as Yasaka gradually disrupts the family before causing irreparable damage.

title: Harvest
synopsis: Over seven hallucinatory days, a village with no name, in an undefined time and place, disappears. Townsman-turned-farmer Walter Thirsk and befuddled lord of the manor Charles Kent are childhood friends about to face an invasion from the outside world: the trauma of modernity.

title: Harvest of Light
synopsis: Turkish capital Ankara’s district Evren is home to a community of seasonal workers. The workers, who come with their families to harvest onions, try coping with various difficulties while holding on to life.

title: Harvesting the Wasteland
synopsis: Harvesting the Wasteland follows the complicated relationship between two women. One of them finds happiness in tradition, while the other finds hers in breaking with it.

title: Hatching
synopsis: 12-year-old gymnast Tinja is desperate to please her demanding mother. Her mother runs a popular blog where she obsessively shows the world how perfect her family is. When Tinja discovers a strange egg, she takes it home to keep it warm. But when the egg hatches, a shocking discovery follows.

title: The Memory of the 16th March
synopsis: On March 16, 1978, a bomb attack resulted in the deaths of seven left-wing students and injured 41 others in front of the Faculty of Pharmacy at Istanbul University. Those responsible for the massacre remained unpunished.

title: Have a Nice Day
synopsis: A hard rain is about to fall on a small town in Southern China. In a desperate attempt to find money to save his fiancée’s failed plastic surgery, Xiao Zhang, a mere driver, steals a bag containing 1 million from his boss. News of the robbery spreads fast, and everyone starts looking for Xiao Zhang.

title: The Hawks and the Sparrows
synopsis: An old man and his son are walking along the road when they suddenly meet a speaking crow, which represents Marxist beliefs. They are soon moved back 750 years in time, changed into monks and sent by St. Francis to convert the hawks and the sparrows to Christianity.

title: My Dreams, My Love and You
synopsis: Orphaned Coşkun has been in love with famous actress Derya Altınay all his life. His sole purpose is to meet her and write a film script for her. Obsessed, he believes he lives with the two characters she portrayed in her old movies.

title: Haze
synopsis: Reşat works at a pirate DVD shop, and adds excitement to his life with petty theft. The film turns into a thriller when the shadowy Celal, a friend of Reşat’s boss, gets shot just after he leaves a package in the shop and Reşat has to make sense of the photo and the gun it contains.

title: Head-On
synopsis: Desperate to escape her suffocatingly traditional family, young Sibel convinces disillusioned alcoholic Cahit to marry her. After their wedding, the two lost souls live together as flatmates but gradually fall in love with one another. However, problems arise quickly.

title: Heart of a Dog
synopsis: In 2011, artist Laurie Anderson’s beloved rat terrier Lolabelle died. By weaving together her thoughts on Tibetan Buddhism, reincarnation, the modern surveillance state, and the artistic lives of dogs, Anderson reflects on the deaths of her husband Lou Reed, her mother, and her cherished dog.

title: Heartbeat Detector
synopsis: A psychologist, played by Mathieu Amalric, discovers troubling links between Nazism and modern-day big business.

title: Heartbeats
synopsis: Francis and Marie are best friends. One day the gorgeous Nicolas walks into a Montreal coffee shop and the two friends, instantly and equally infatuated, compete for his indeterminate affections. The conflict climaxes when the trio visit the vacation home of Nicolas’ mother.

title: Hearts of Darkness: A Filmmaker's Apocalypse
director: Fax Bahr, Eleanor Coppola, George Hickenlooper
synopsis: This film documents the sensational events that unfolded during the making of Francis Ford Coppola’s Apocalypse Now. Featuring Eleanor Coppola’s footage of the Philippines production, the film details the director’s self-financed, chaotic creation, teetering on the brink of complete collapse.

title: Heathers
synopsis: Veronica Sawyer halfheartedly tries to be part of the “in crowd” at her high school. But when the cruel games of her school’s unstoppable trio of mean queen bees—all named Heather—become too much, Veronica gets together with rebel J.D. and plots to murder them and disguise the deaths as suicides.

title: Heaven's Gate
synopsis: A breathtaking depiction of the promise and perils of America’s western expansion, Heaven’s Gate is among Hollywood’s most ambitious and unorthodox epics. When a Harvard graduate relocates to Wyoming as a federal marshal, he learns of a plot to kill the area’s European settlers for their land.

title: Heli
synopsis: Estela is a 12-year-old girl who has just fallen crazy in love with a young police cadet in rural Mexico. He wants to run away with her and get married. Trying to achieve this dream, Estela’s family will have to face the vicious circle of drugs and violence that is devastating the region.

title: Hell or High Water
synopsis: When brothers Tanner and Toby become in danger of losing their ranch, they embark on a series of well-planned robberies on small local banks. Because the amounts are always small, the brothers stay out of harm’s way—until almost-retired Texas ranger Marcus gets involved in the case.

title: Hello My Dear
synopsis: The documentary is named after Arkadas Z. Özger’s poem which had caused much controversy in that period. In this episodic poem considered to be in defiance of heteronormativity; there are references to his personality, his family, his relationship with society and his “unexpected” death.

title: Hello Warsaw
synopsis: Fresh out of a specialized treatment center for eating disorders, an aspiring model in Warsaw resumes her destructive habits of bingeing and purging. When the opportunity to audition for a lingerie brand comes up, her mental health further deteriorates.

title: Helpless Stones
synopsis: An adventure of three begins with a casual meeting. With no destination in mind, three strangers carry on with frivolous conversation.This is a modern fairytale trying to sense the significance of life which could really be just a series of trivial events.

title: Henri Langlois: The Phantom of the Cinémathèque
synopsis: For forty years, Henri Langlois presided over the Cinematheque Francaise with absolute commitment and unwavering passion. Beginning in 1936, Langlois’ beg, borrow and steal hustling preserved the priceless treasures of an art form then still too new to be recognized as such.

title: Henry Fool
synopsis: Simon is a garbage man living a miserable life until he meets Henry Fool, a mysterious writer working on a major piece of literature. Henry convinces Simon to write in a journal and learns that he is a poetic prodigy. When Simon becomes a controversial sensation, Henry turns to Simon for help.

title: Henry Gamble's Birthday Party
synopsis: At Henry’s birthday pool party the guests include an assortment of grown-ups from the family church, as well as Henry’s friends—including the closeted Logan, who clearly has eyes for Henry. As Henry treads through various sexual possibilities, so too do the adults and teenagers of the party,.

title: Her
synopsis: A heartbroken writer falls in love with an operating system that evolves into a unique entity during their union. Things become complicated as Theodore’s complex emotions are exacerbated by ’Samantha’s’ inability to provide physical comfort.

title: Her First
synopsis: Two aspiring filmmakers embark on a two-year journey across Turkey, traveling 5000 kilometers to interview established women directors. Along the way, they capture their process of discovery and self-discovery, realizing the real journey has only just begun.

title: Her Name Is Vasfiye
synopsis: Vasfiye, a provincial woman whose life shifts between men in Aegean towns, is portrayed through different narrators. With each perspective, her story changes, leaving the truth uncertain.

title: Her Private Hell
synopsis: An edgy, hypnotic and unhinged thriller based on an original story that promises “lots of glitter, sex, and violence.”

title: Everything as It Should Be
synopsis: The life of Saffet (40) who belongs to upper middle class, hasn’t change in the apartment corridor when he sees underage, beautiful and marginal Rüya who is the daughter of his neighbor he hasn’t seen before.

title: Her Smell
synopsis: Becky Something is a destructive punk rock icon whose erratic behavior alienates bandmates, family, and fans. Across five turbulent chapters—raging performances, backstage meltdowns, and fragile sobriety—she teeters between collapse and recovery, chasing the creative spark that once made her a star.

title: Here
synopsis: After the sudden death of his wife, He Zhiyuan loses the will to speak and is sent to Island Hospital. While He adjusts to life within, he is selected for an experimental treatment, forcing him to confront the devastating truth behind his past, present, and future.

title: Here Comes the Devil
synopsis: On a family vacation, a couple’s son and daughter disappear while exploring a cave-riddled mountainside. The children eventually return home seemingly unharmed, but are withdrawn and devoid of emotion…

title: Hereditary
synopsis: When Ellen, the matriarch of the Graham family, passes away, her daughter’s family begins to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry. The more they discover, the more they find themselves trying to outrun the sinister fate they seem to have inherited.

title: Heremias (Book One: The Legend of the Lizard Princess)
synopsis: The odyssey of one man from his village to the city and back; more, it’s his journey from a state of absolute innocence to knowledge, disillusionment, guilt.

title: Hermanas
synopsis: Argentinian sisters Elena and Natalia, who were separated, meet again in Texas in 1984.

title: Heroes Don't Die
synopsis: Called out by a stranger in the street, Joachim believes he is the reincarnation of a Serbian soldier who died on the very day he was born. Troubled by such possibility, he embarks with his friend Alice and a small film crew on a journey to Bosnia in order to track down details of his former life.

title: Heroes of the East
synopsis: A Chinese kung fu master must salvage his honor after accidentally insulting the family of his new Japanese bride. With his loyalty—and marriage—on the line, the dishonored martial artist can only attempt to regain his in-laws’ trust by dueling with seven skillful Japanese ninjas.

title: Herself
synopsis: Struggling to provide her daughters with a safe, happy home, Sandra decides to build one—from scratch. Using all her ingenuity to make her ambitious dream a reality, Sandra draws together a community to lend a helping hand to build her house and ultimately recover her own sense of self.

title: Hesitation Wound
synopsis: Criminal lawyer Canan divides her time between mornings in court and evenings at her mother’s hospital bed. On the day of the sentencing hearing of a murder suspect whom Canan is defending, she must make a moral choice that will affect the lives of her mother, the judge, and the defendant.

title: Hey Sweet Pea
synopsis: Parental aging and an existential wave collide in the suburbs of LA. Dislocated B-roll, meandering voicemails, and readings from the 1984 children’s sci-fi movie The Neverending Story combine to situate collective grief in the mundanities of everyday life.

title: Hey There!
synopsis: While Istanbul is under lockdown, Felek and Kerim have their scheme set up: they plan to infiltrate the computers of people at home, pretend they’re the government, scare them with their “crimes,” and rip them off. But this is Istanbul, and people come in all types.

title: Hidden Agenda
synopsis: Belfast, late 1980s. American civil rights lawyer Paul Sullivan is shot in an incident involving three policemen. Deputy Chief Constable Kerrigan is flown from England to lead an inquiry into the murder, joining forces with Paul’s activist-lawyer partner Ingrid, who is gathering evidence of her own.

title: Hide and Seek
synopsis: In urban Pakistan, queer individuals manage personal conflicts and the pressures of society. Drag performer Kami lives openly with his boyfriend. Jenny, a trans student, just underwent surgery. Meanwhile, Neeli has been instrumental in changing Pakistan’s constitution to recognize the third gender.

title: High and Low
synopsis: As Kingo Gondo finally gathers all his assets to become the majority shareholder of his company, he receives shocking news: his chauffeur’s son has been kidnapped, and a huge ransom is demanded. Gondo is faced with a moral dilemma: can he sacrifice his entire fortune to save another man’s child?

title: High Heels
synopsis: After being estranged for fifteen years, flamboyant singer Becky del Páramo re-enters her daughter Rebeca’s life when she visits Madrid to perform a concert. Rebeca, she finds, is now married to one of Becky’s ex-lovers. As mother and daughter try to mend their broken relationship, a murder occurs.

title: High Life
synopsis: Monte and his baby daughter are the last survivors of a damned and dangerous mission to deep space. The crew—death-row inmates led by a doctor with sinister motives—has vanished. As the mystery of what happened onboard the ship is unraveled, father and daughter must rely on each other to survive.

title: High & Low - John Galliano
synopsis: Fashion designer John Galliano was widely recognized as one of the most influential names in 1990s and 2000s couture until his career abruptly ended in 2011. Candid footage—plus conversations with Naomi Campbell, Kate Moss, Anna Wintour and more—trace Galliano’s turbulent career through the decades.

title: High School
synopsis: At a public high school in Philadelphia, students attend classes, debate current affairs, and engage in extracurriculars—even simulating a trip to outer space. The parameters of their educational lives, however, are dictated by parents, teachers, administrators: adults who reinforce social mores.

title: Hiroshima mon amour
synopsis: In postwar Hiroshima, a French actress and a Japanese architect engage in a brief, intense affair. Their consuming mutual fascination compels them to exorcise their own scarred memories of love and suffering.

title: The Ignorant Fairies
synopsis: AIDS doctor Antonia’s husband is killed by a car. She gets depressed until she learns he had been cheating on her with a man.

title: His Three Daughters
synopsis: When their father’s health worsens, three estranged sisters come together to try to plan for the inevitable.

title: History and Geography
synopsis: Gioconda Martínez, a well-remembered comedic television actress, decides to return to her hometown to stage a play about the conquest of Chile, hoping to regain the artistic recognition she believed she had lost—but never truly had.

title: Hit the Road
synopsis: An unorthodox family of four—two parents and their quiet adult son and hyperactive six-year-old boy—drive across the Iranian countryside. Over the course of the trip, they bond over memories of the past, grapple with fears of the unknown, and fuss over their sick dog.

title: Hit Man
synopsis: Posing undercover as a fake hitman to arrest those who try to hire him, Gary Johnson finds he excels at embodying just what each person wants. When he breaks protocol to help a woman get away from an abusive boyfriend, he falls for her and begins living the life of one of his false personas.

title: Hive
synopsis: Fahrije has battled grief and financial struggle since her husband went missing during the war in Kosovo. In hope of providing for her family, she launches a business selling hot pepper preserves, a controversial act of independence that scandalizes her patriarchal village.

title: Hoard
synopsis: Maria’s childhood in South London with her mother Cynthia, an obsessive hoarder, feels magical until tragedy separates them. Years later, Maria seeks to reconnect with her mother in the only way she knows how—by rummaging through bins for discarded treasures and collecting bags full of garbage.

title: Hoax
synopsis: Hoax is the re-editing of One Day When the Rain Falls by its producer. The original version of the film is shown exclusively in Jakarta and Yogyakarta.

title: Hockney
synopsis: British painter David Hockney, considered one of the most influential icons of the 20th century, still paints seven days a week. The remarkable life of this free-spirited artist, who defied categorization, is chronicled through an exclusive tour of his archives and into his studio.

title: Hokum
synopsis: When novelist Ohm Bauman retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents’ ashes, he is consumed by tales of a witch haunting the honeymoon suite. Disturbing visions and a shocking disappearance forces him to confront dark corners of his past.

title: Holiday
synopsis: A perilous, violent love triangle unfolds over a Turkish Riviera vacation between a young Danish girl, her possessive drug lord boyfriend, and the free-spirited, yacht-owning Dutch traveller she flirts with.

title: Hollywood 90028
synopsis: Mark, a disturbed cameraman, films porn by day and stalks Los Angeles by night, strangling women he lures from peep shows and strip clubs. When he pursues a model from one of his shoots, a frustrated Mark is led to shoot a different kind of Hollywood ending…

title: Holmes & Watson
synopsis: When a dead body is discovered in Sherlock Holmes’ birthday cake at Buckingham Palace, it seems that the perpetrator is their longtime enemy, criminal mastermind James Moriarty. As their investigation uncovers one twist after another, Holmes and Watson face the greatest threat of their partnership.

title: Holy Motors
synopsis: From dawn to dusk, a few hours in the life of Monsieur Oscar, a mysterious man who journeys from one life to the next, while being chauffeured around Paris in a limousine by a loyal driver. He is, in turn, assassin, beggar, monster, family man. He seems to be playing roles—but where are the cameras?

title: Holy Spider
synopsis: In the holy city of Mashhad, journalist Rahimi investigates the murders of sex workers by the “Spider Killer”—a man who believes he is on a divine mission to cleanse the city of sinners. As she tries to bring him to justice, support for his actions grows as many hail him a hero on a religious quest.

title: Home
synopsis: The story of Kevin, who has just been released from a remand home. Going back to live with his parents is no longer an option, so he is going to move in with his aunt’s family. Will his new home be able to save him from juvenile delinquency? Or will he miss this opportunity?

title: Home Cooking
synopsis: Selma is excited to make pizza for her father’s birthday and for the whole family to go to the amusement park together. But when her father fails to show up on time, the day unravels. He joins them eventually, but by then the siblings have split off in search of a good time without him.

title: Homework
synopsis: In this documentary, Iranian schoolboys complain about the amount of homework they have to do.

title: Honey Don't!
genres: Comedy, Mystery, Crime, Film noir, LGBTQ+
synopsis: A sharp-witted private investigator in Bakersfield, normally focused on cases of infidelity, becomes entangled in a far more dangerous puzzle when a local woman’s death leads her into the world of religious cults, domineering pastors, and an unforeseen romance.

title: Honeyland
synopsis: Hatidze lives with her ailing mother in the mountains of Macedonia, making a living cultivating honey using ancient beekeeping traditions. When an unruly family moves in next door, what at first seems like a balm for her solitude becomes a source of tension as they, too, want to practice beekeeping.

title: Out of Season
synopsis: Mathieu lives in Paris, Alice in a small seaside resort in Western France. He is a famous actor, about to turn 50. She is a piano teacher in her 40s. They were in love fifteen years ago, then separated. When Mathieu goes try to overcome his melancholia in a thermal spa, he stumbles upon Alice.

title: Horse Money
synopsis: Ventura, an elderly Cape Verdean immigrant living in Lisbon, is seemingly the inmate of a cavernous, antiquated psychiatric ward. As he traverses a seemingly endless night, an odyssey into his real, imagined and nightmarish memories begins.

title: Hot Fuzz
synopsis: Nicholas Angel is the finest police officer London has to offer. He’s so good he makes everyone else look bad. As a result, Angel’s superiors send him to a place where his talents won’t be quite so embarrassing: the sleepy and seemingly crime-free village of Sandford.

title: Hot Milk
synopsis: Sofia and her ailing mother, Rose, travel to the Spanish seaside town of Almería to seek the help of Dr. Gómez, an enigmatic healer who may hold the key to Rose’s mysterious illness. As long-buried tensions simmer between them, Sofia finds herself drawn to the magnetic and free-spirited Ingrid.

title: Hot Summer Nights
synopsis: American flags wave as fireworks light the sky, it’s 1991 in Cape Cod, Massachusetts, and summer is in full swing. A lonely teenage boy is taken under the wing of the town rebel, falls in love with the prettiest girl in town, and gets entangled in a drug ring.

title: Hot Thrills and Warm Chills
synopsis: Rita Alexander stars as the towering gang leader of a trio of hoodlum gals looking to make one last big score, run away with a mess of diamonds and live the dream in paradise. An eccentric gem from Texas wildcard director Dale Berry, underscored by a relentlessly brilliant Perez Prado soundtrack.

title: Hotel Mumbai
synopsis: The true story of the Taj Hotel terrorist attack in Mumbai in 2008. Hotel staff risk their lives to keep everyone safe as people make unthinkable sacrifices to protect themselves and their families.

title: House by the River
synopsis: While his wife is away, Stephen Byrne—a wealthy, deranged, and failed writer—accidentally murders his maid after she resists his advances. He ropes his brother John into helping him hide the body and then does his best to pin the blame for the murder on his sibling.

title: House of Seven Belles
synopsis: The late Andy Milligan never completed his Southern melodrama, and all he left behind was a single unfinished workprint. As he said, “it’s all there, except the finale I was unable to shoot.” Thus, it may be left to the viewer to complete his Civil War epic, revealed here for the first time.

title: House of Tolerance
synopsis: The dawn of the 20th century: L’Apollonide, a luxurious and traditional brothel in Paris, is living its last days. In this closed world, where some men fall in love and others become viciously harmful, the women share their secrets, their fears, their joys and their pains.

title: House on Bare Mountain
synopsis: Exploitation film maven Bob Cresse goes full drag as the matriarch of “Granny Good’s School for Good Girls” in this delightfully silly “nudie cutie,” which somehow mashes the “old dark house” monster movie, lowbrow comedy, the rock & roll dance party and the peep show, in eye-popping candy colors.

title: Housekeeping for Beginners
synopsis: Dita never wanted to be a mother, but circumstances force her to raise her girlfriend’s two daughters, tiny troublemaker Mia and rebellious teen Vanesa. A battle of wills ensues as the three continue to butt heads and become an unlikely family that must fight to stay together.

title: Housewife of the Year
synopsis: The story of Ireland’s treatment of women through the lens of a televised competition that ran from 1969 to 1995, where women competed for the title of Housewife of the Year before a live audience. Former contestants reflect on their acceptance of societal norms and share their personal experiences.

title: How Did the Pandas Become Extinct?
synopsis: As dominant religions take hold, a once-vibrant Shamanist community quietly slips into decline.

title: The Boy and the Heron
synopsis: A young boy named Mahito, yearning for his mother, ventures into a world shared by the living and the dead. There, death comes to an end, and life finds a new beginning.

title: How Good to See You Alive
synopsis: In Brazil, four years after the 1964 coup d’état, civil rights were suspended, and torture became a systematic practice. Eight women who were political prisoners during the dictatorship are interviewed—their stories framed by the fantasies and imaginings of an anonymous character.

title: How I Learned to Overcome My Fear and Love Arik Sharon
synopsis: As the elections approach, director Avi Mograbi sets out to make a documentary film about Israel’s most maligned politician, Arik Sharon. To his surprise, Mograbi discovers that Sharon is warm and friendly, and completely different from the man he thought him to be.

title: How to Blow Up a Pipeline
synopsis: Xochitl’s frustration with the climate crisis leads her to engage in symbolic acts of sabotage and property destruction. With radical determination, she assembles a crew of friends and strangers, each with their own struggles, to undertake a daring mission to destroy a pipeline in West Texas.

title: How to Disappear
synopsis: While Ekin (27) and Murat (28) return from a wedding at night, Ekin fails to see a bump in the road and his carelessness results in two flat tires. When they arrive at the repair shop with the help of a tow truck, Ekin and Murat see that the mechanics have set up a table with drinks and music.

title: How to Have Sex
synopsis: Three British teenage girls go on a rites-of-passage holiday, drinking, clubbing and hooking up in what should be the best summer of their lives. As they dance their way across the sun-drenched streets of Malia, they find themselves navigating the complexities of sex, consent and self-discovery.

title: How to Kiss
synopsis: As a brave couple demonstrates, the narrator uses quotes, examples and advice to help us all reach the highest heights in the art of kissing.

title: How to Make Love to a Woman
synopsis: An animated look at the 11 essential steps to make the pilgrim’s progess from finding a woman to making love to her.

title: How to Save Asiye
synopsis: After receiving a letter from a woman named Asiye asking for help to save her, the President of the Associations Against Prostitution visits the brothel to save Asiye. However, she finds herself in a strange musical show.

title: How to Survive a Plague
synopsis: In a desperate effort to save their own lives, an unlikely group of mostly HIV-positive young men and women took on Washington and the medical establishment. Archival footage from the 80s and 90s reveals the heated meetings, the painful failures, and the joyful breakthroughs of heroes in the making.

title: Howl
synopsis: San Francisco, mid ’50s. Poet Allen Ginsberg lives with fellow writers Jack Kerouac and Neal Cassady. He is about to publish Howl, an electrifying poem which will make him a cultural icon and define the soon-to-be Beat Generation. But soon after its release, Ginsberg is put on trial for obscenity.

title: Huda's Salon
synopsis: A woman whose visit to a hair salon turns into a nightmare when she is blackmailed by its owner.

title: Hugo
synopsis: A young orphan living in the hidden corners of a Paris train station in the 1920s, discovers a mystery left behind by his late father—a broken automaton, a heart-shaped key, and a secret tied to a toy shop owner. With the help of his friend Isabelle, he uncovers a lost chapter of early cinema.

title: Human Traffic
synopsis: This is the real story of youth in the 1990s: chemicals, clubs, bars, pubs, pushing the vinyl, blagging the guest list, mobile phones, trainers, care-less, mashed, sorted, safe. And here it is in all its pupil-dilated, teeth grinding, club-hopping glory. The weekend has well and truly landed…

title: Humanist Vampire Seeking Consenting Suicidal Person
synopsis: Sasha is a young vampire who is too sensitive to kill. When her exasperated parents cut off her blood supply, Sasha meets Paul, a lonely teenager who is willing to give his life to save hers. But their friendly agreement soon becomes a nocturnal quest to fulfill Paul’s last wishes before day breaks.

title: Humpday
synopsis: Two college buddies reunite after a decade apart. Ben is married and Andrew is a free spirit who has spent the last 10 years traveling the globe. Their constant need to one-up each other results in a daring proposition. The staunchly heterosexual friends must star together in a gay adult film.

title: Hundreds of Beavers
synopsis: In the nineteenth century, a drunken applejack salesman loses his business in a fire and finds himself stranded in the wilderness. Facing starvation, he must survive a surreal winter landscape overrun by beavers, and devise clever traps to stay alive and win the hand of a mischievous lover.

title: Hunger
synopsis: In Northern Ireland’s Maze prison in 1981, 27-year-old Irish Republican Army member Bobby Sands is imprisoned with fellow IRA inmates. Demanding to be recognized as political prisoners, ‘dirty protests’ progress to hunger strikes. Soon, Sands’ body and mind are pushed to the uttermost limit.

title: How to Make a Killing
synopsis: A man hatches a murderous plot to work his way back into a super-rich family, in order to regain his birth right and inherit their fortune.

title: Hustler White
synopsis: Bruce LaBruce teams up with photographer Rick Castro in a wild re-imagining of Sunset Boulevard, set in 90’s Santa Monica. Anthropologist Jurgen Anger heads to LA to research hustling as a social phenomenon, but after spotting angel-faced hustler Montgomery Ward, he falls hopelessly in love.

title: Hyenas
synopsis: Dramaan Drameh is a respected, convivial shopkeeper in the tiny village of Colobane. But a forgotten act of cruelty committed thirty years in his past comes back to haunt him when the young girl he impregnated and abandoned returns seeking revenge.

title: Hysteria
synopsis: A film shoot takes a dark turn when the burning of a Quran throws the crew into turmoil. Caught in the crossfire of accusations, intern Elif is drawn into a dangerous game of secrets and lies and finds herself at the heart of an all-absorbing conspiracy.

title: I Am Divine
synopsis: The ultimate outsider turned underground royalty. This biography honors Divine in a way she always craved: as a serious artist and immortal star. Featuring rare movie footage, live performances, and brand new interviews with Divine’s family, friends, colleagues and forever indebted devotees.

title: I Am Frankelda
synopsis: Frankelda, a determined 19th-century Mexican writer, journeys into her subconscious to face the monsters she’s written about. Guided by a tormented prince, she must restore the balance between fiction and reality before it’s too late.

title: I Am Love
synopsis: Among the upper classes in turn-of-the-millennium Milan, ailing patriarch Edoardo Sr passes the family business over to his son Tancredi and grandson Edoardo Jr. Tensions soon begin to show beneath the family’s controlled veneer as Tancredi’s wife, Russian-born Emma, succumbs to an illicit affair.

title: I Am Not a Witch
synopsis: In Zambia, eight-year-old orphan Shula is accused of witchcraft and exiled to a witch camp run by a corrupt government official. As the only child witch, Shula is exploited by adults for financial gain and forced to decide whether to resign herself to life on the camp, or take a risk for freedom.

title: I Am Not Your Negro
synopsis: In 1979, the writer and civil rights activist James Baldwin embarked on a project to tell the story of America through the lives of three of his murdered friends: Medgar Evers, Malcolm X and Martin Luther King, Jr. He died before it could be completed and Raoul Peck imagines the book he never wrote.

title: I Do Not Care If We Go Down in History as Barbarians
synopsis: Mariana, an outspoken young artist, is planning an ambitious play reconstructing the anti-Semitic 1941 Odessa Massacre. But resentment among the extras and authorities wanting to censor the spectacle are standing in the way. The performance, conceived as a wake-up call, slowly turns into a farce.

title: I Had a Dream You Won’t Understand Even If I Tell
synopsis: In 1992, Tevfik Esenç, the last person speaking the Ubykh language, died as the Ubykh language disappeared from the world. Directed by Burcu Esenç and Cantekin Cantez, this documentary tells the story of the people of Ubykh and the disappearance of a language from the world.

title: I Hired a Contract Killer
synopsis: Henri Boulanger wants to die. Since his helpless attempts to end his days go down the drain, he hires a contract killer to do the job. While waiting for the killer, however, he makes the mistake of sipping a whisky for the first time in his life, meets a woman and promptly falls in love.

title: I Killed My Mother
synopsis: Sixteen year-old Hubert Minel dislikes his mother and only sees her ugly sweaters and kitschy décor. Confused and consumed by their love-hate relationship, he moves through the turbulent adolescent rites of passage by engaging in illicit affairs.

title: I Knew Her Well
synopsis: The enchanting and seemingly liberated Adriana pursues her ambitions in Rome. Across a series of encounters—with different men, looks, and settings—her naïveté is tested as her dreams collide with the realities of the city.

title: I'm Not There
genres: Biography, Drama, Music, Musical, History, Anthology, Comedy
synopsis: Six characters (an actor, a folk singer, an electrified troubadour, the French poet Arthur Rimbaud, outlaw Billy the Kid, and the American singer Woody Guthrie) embody the different personas of music legend Bob Dylan in scenes that chronicle his rise from unknown folk singer to international icon.

title: I'm Still Here
synopsis: Brazil, 1971. As the country falls under the tightening grip of a military dictatorship, Eunice Paiva, a mother of five, is forced to rebuild her life after her husband is abducted by the regime. As time passes without answers, she raises her children amid fear and uncertainty.

title: I Married a Strange Person!
synopsis: A newlywed develops a strange lump on his neck that gives him the ability to transform people or objects at will. His wife is very upset. Meanwhile, the CEO of Smilecorp learns of this man and his ability and sees a way to achieve world domination if only the man can be taken alive.

title: I, Of Whom I Know Nothing
synopsis: Filmed during the Autumn and Winter of 2012/2013 at John Calder’s – Samuel Beckett’s London publisher, collaborator and close friend – home in Montreuil. It witnesses his very particular domestic life, as well as his journey to London to visit for the last time legendary actress, Billie Whitelaw.

title: I Saw the Devil
synopsis: Kyung-chul is a dangerous psychopath who kills for pleasure. On a snowy night, his latest victim is the beautiful Juyeon, daughter of a retired police chief and pregnant fiancée of special agent Soo-hyun. Obsessed with revenge, Soo-hyun is determined to track down the murderer at all costs.

title: I Saw the TV Glow
synopsis: Teenager Owen is just trying to make it through life in the suburbs when his classmate introduces him to a mysterious late-night TV show — a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. In the pale glow of the television, Owen’s view of reality begins to crack.

title: I Thought the World of You
synopsis: The elusive Canadian outsider-artist musician Lewis’ landmark album L’Amour was recorded in 1983 but lay in obscurity until later discovered in 2008. In between speculative episodes from Lewis’ life and career, fans discuss the myths surrounding him on an online forum.

title: I, Tonya
synopsis: Figure skater Tonya Harding is a natural talent, but her working-class origins mean she’s never quite fit into the snobby skating world. With the 1994 U.S. Championships looming and her opponent Nancy Kerrigan posing a threat, her ex-husband takes matters into his own hands to ensure Tonya succeeds.

title: I Trust You
synopsis: Susana and Nélida met in a convent. They abandoned their calling and adopted three-year-old Erika. They were happy, but in 2006, the women were accused of a crime and sentenced to twenty years in prison, although they maintained their innocence.

title: I vitelloni
synopsis: Five men, the not-so-young sons of middle-class parents, linger in a postadolescent limbo, dreaming of adventure and escape from their small coastal town. Perpetually unemployed, they waste their lives away by spending their families’ money on drink, women, and nights at the pool hall.

title: I Walked with a Zombie
synopsis: A Canadian nurse, Betsy, arrives on a Caribbean island to tend to an invalid woman who appears to suffer from an unexplained paralysis. The horrific truth soon emerges, however—amid the haunting rhythms of the voodoo drums.

title: Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance with Somebody
synopsis: A joyous, emotional, heartbreaking celebration of the life and music of Whitney Houston, one of the greatest female R&B pop vocalists of all time, tracking her journey from obscurity to musical superstardom.

title: I Was a Simple Man
synopsis: In the rustic countryside of the north shore of O’ahu, Hawai’i, an elderly man facing the end of his life is visited by the ghosts of his past. The ghosts also haunt the countryside, journeying from the high-rises of contemporary Honolulu to the pre-WWII pastorals of O’ahu—and into the beyond.

title: Ice Cream
synopsis: Eleven-year-old Rojhat lives with his mother in a small village of Van. One day, an ice cream seller arrives with his motorcycle, to the delight of the children in the village. They buy ice cream in exchange for eggs, copper wires, and old objects they have brought from their houses.

title: Here and Elsewhere
director: Jean-Luc Godard, Jean-Pierre Gorin, Groupe Dziga Vertov, Anne-Marie Miéville
synopsis: A montage of images contrasts Palestinian fighters in the Middle East with a French family watching television, combining archive and newly shot footage to explore daily life, political struggle, and the role of media across different worlds.

title: A City Runs Through the Festival
synopsis: A film from a team inspired by the movies they watched at the Istanbul Film Festival, celebrating both the 25th year of the festival and a reflection on those 25 years.

title: Ida
synopsis: Anna is a young novitiate nun in 1960s Poland who, on the verge of taking her vows, discovers a dark family secret dating back to the Nazi occupation. She embarks on a journey with her only living relative to find out more about their ancestors, revealing certain truths that were best left hidden.

title: Identification of a Woman
synopsis: After his wife leaves him, a film director starts a passionate affair with a young aristocratic woman. Soon a stranger threatens him to stop seeing her and, after a lover’s row, she vanishes. Whilst searching for her, he meets a young actress, whose curiosity is piqued to find the missing woman.

title: Idiots and Angels
synopsis: Angel, a selfish and morally bankrupt man, wakes up one morning with wings on his back, in this dark comedy about a person’s battle for their soul.

title: If Beale Street Could Talk
synopsis: 19-year-old Tish and her sculptor fiancé Fonny live together in poverty-stricken 1970s Harlem. Wrongly accused of raping a woman, Fonny is sent to prison without trial. Not long after, Tish discovers she’s expecting Fonny’s baby. Tish sets out to get Fonny out of jail before the baby’s born.

title: If Footmen Tire You, What Will Horses Do?
synopsis: A piece of unadulterated Christian propaganda spiced with enough violence and bloodletting to satisfy the most jaded gorehound.

title: If I Didn't Care
synopsis: Hitchcockian film noir/thriller set in the exclusive resort community of The Hamptons. Trophy husband Davis Meyers meets local investigator Linus. Davis Meyers’ ill-fated attempt to produce an heir leads to infidelity, murder and tragic consequences.

title: If I Had Legs I’d Kick You
synopsis: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child’s mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

title: Igor Levit: No Fear
synopsis: At 34, Igor Levit is a leading force in classical music—a bold, restless artist always seeking new challenges. With over 100 global concerts planned, the COVID-19 pandemic brings his journey to a sudden halt and pushes him to rethink and redefine his artistic path.

title: Ikiru
synopsis: After learning that his stomach cancer has left him with less than a year to live, a Tokyo bureaucrat struggles to reconcile with his impending death and begins looking for ways to make his remaining days meaningful.

title: Il Boom
synopsis: During Italy’s economic boom, Giovanni falls into debt to maintain the living standards his family has become accustomed to. After defaulting on a loan, he finds himself faced with financial ruin. When a wealthy, partially blind stranger asks to buy one of Giovanni’s eyes, he accepts in desperation.

title: Il buco
synopsis: In August 1961, speleologists explored Europe’s deepest cave in the Calabrian hinterland, reaching 700 meters below Earth for the first time. Their venture went unnoticed by the inhabitants of a neighboring village, but not by an old shepherd whose solitary life interweaves with the group’s journey.

title: Il capo
synopsis: In the quarries of Carrara, Italy, men and machines dig Monte Bettogli for marble. Managing, coordinating, and guiding quarrymen and their heavy-duty machines is the chief—“Il Capo”—who uses a language consisting solely of gestures and signs to coordinate this dangerous, noisy operation.

title: Il divo
synopsis: In Rome, at dawn, when everyone is asleep, one man is awake. That man is Giulio Andreotti. Calm, ambiguous, inscrutable, Andreotti is synonymous with power in Italy for over four decades. Without arrogance or humility, he advances towards his 7th mandate as Prime Minister, unscathed from everything.

title: Il paese delle spose infelici
synopsis: A group of boys friends’ lives take an unexpected turn when a strange stray ‘madonna’, the lovely Annalisa, literally flies into their midst from the top of a church, dressed as a bride. Smitten, Zazà and Veleno awkwardly approach her and experience pure ecstasy…

title: The Peacock's Paradise
synopsis: On a cold winter day, Nena’s family reunites in their house in front of the sea to celebrate her birthday. Everybody in the family is there—including Paco, Alma’s peacock, who falls in love with a little painted dove. This impossible love will force the whole family to reckon with their feelings.

title: Il posto
synopsis: When young Domenico ventures from the small village of Meda to Milan in search of employment, he finds himself on the bottom rung of the bureaucratic ladder in a huge, faceless company. The prospects are daunting, but Domenico finds reason for hope in the fetching Antonietta.

title: Il solengo
director: Alessio Rigo de Righi, Matteo Zoppis
synopsis: A group of elders gathers in a hunting lodge and recalls the life of Mario “de’ Marcella”, a man who lived in a cave over 60 years of his life. Why he chose to live a solitary existence is unknown. Perhaps it had something to do with a mysterious and tragic event of his childhood.

title: Ilo Ilo
synopsis: In Singapore, the Lim family welcomes their newly arrived maid, Teresa. Like many other Filipino women, she has come to this city in search of a better life. Her presence in the family worsens their already strained relationship. Jiale, the young son, starts to form a unique bond with Teresa.

title: I'm a Cyborg, But That's OK
synopsis: Young-goon, a patient at a psychiatric clinic, is convinced she is a cyborg. Her life changes the day that Il-soon is admitted. Il-soon believes he possesses the uncanny ability to steal other people’s personality traits and souls. It is not long before a tender romance develops between the two.

title: I Am Not Him
synopsis: Nihat, an introverted employee in a hospital cafeteria, is confused by Ayşe, a mysterious woman who just started working there as a dishwasher.
