When Nihat discovers a picture of the woman’s husband and realizes that he looks astoundingly like him, their relationship becomes even more toxic.

title: I'm the Angel of Death: Pusher III
synopsis: As drug lord Milo struggles to prepare his daughter’s 25th birthday party, his business proves equally challenging when a shipment of ecstasy arrives instead of heroin. Forced to work with a new drug he knows little about, he must find a way to maintain his dominance atop the Copenhagen underworld.

title: Immoral Tales
genres: Drama, History, Anthology, Comedy, Avant-Garde, Erotica
synopsis: Four erotic stories revolving around taboos—virginity, female masturbation, bloodlust, and incest—take place, each one delving further back in time. Spanning humanity’s history, the tales cover Italian noblewoman Lucrezia Borgia, Hungarian serial killer Erzsébet Báthory, and present-day teenagers.

title: In Absentia
synopsis: A woman alone in a room repeatedly writes a letter with tiny broken off pieces of pencil lead. Outside her window, vistas of ever-changing light register her every emotion.

title: In Another Country
synopsis: In a Korean seaside town, three versions of a French woman named Anne—each imagined by a young screenwriter—navigate a series of misadventures. As she encounters familiar faces, including a flirtatious lifeguard and a filmmaker lover, uncanny differences and strange echoes start to accumulate.

title: In Camera
synopsis: Aden dreams of becoming a successful actor, but the grind of the auditions, with its rejections and microaggressions, is starting to take its toll. But when self-assured fashion and lifestyle guru Conrad moves in, his confidence inspires Aden to take it upon himself to find a new part to play.

title: In Danger and Deep Distress, the Middleway Spells Certain Death
synopsis: Frankfurt, 1974. A documentary crew captures political demonstrations, carnival fun, and debate within the SPD Party’s Congress. Interwoven with this footage are tales of two seemingly different women. One woman seduces men and then robs them. The other is a spy from the Eastern Bloc.

title: In His Fortress
synopsis: A young woman goes to clear out her father’s house shortly after his death and, during her time there, begins to feel intensely the ups and downs of the grieving process.

title: In Jackson Heights
synopsis: In Jackson Heights, one of the most culturally diverse neighborhoods in New York City, immigrants from Mexico, India, Afghanistan, China, and other nations live side-by-side. As gentrification encroaches on their beloved district, residents and local businesses find themselves being priced out.

title: In My Room
synopsis: Lost in life and beset by a recent passing, Armin has nowhere to go and just as much to show for himself. Fate intervenes when Armin awakes one morning and discovers that seemingly all of humanity has disappeared, leaving him to his limited devices and opening the door for self-discovery.

title: In omaggio all'arte italiana!
synopsis: Presented at the 2015 Venice Biennale, this short film by Jean-Marie Straub is a fragment of the last reel of his film History Lessons, based on Bertolt Brecht’s The Business Affairs of Mr Julius Caesar and  dedicated to the memory and materiality of cinema.

title: In Search of Dad One Night
synopsis: Two brothers who want to get a share from the sale of their father’s home spend the night looking for him. But the siblings must first face the trust issues between them before they get to him.

title: In the Aisles
synopsis: The reclusive Christian takes a job working the night shift at a big box store, when he becomes enamored by his charming but mysterious co-worker Marion. But Marion has secrets of her own and when she suddenly goes on sick leave, Christian is tempted to fall into habits of his dark past.

title: In the Blind Spot
synopsis: In a remote city in north-east Turkey, the stories of a German film team and a Turkish secret service agent whose little daughter seems to be haunted by a mysterious force intertwine. This is when a complex net of conspiracy and trauma enfolds.

title: In the Court of the Crimson King: King Crimson at 50
synopsis: One of rock’s most enigmatic bands, King Crimson’s final lineup tours the globe during the group’s 50th anniversary. Through intimate access and candid interviews—past and present—reveal the tensions, dedication, and artistry that have defined the band’s half-century legacy.

title: In the Cut
synopsis: After the body of a young woman is found in her New York neighbourhood, literature professor Frannie becomes entwined in an erotic affair with the police detective leading the investigation. As her attraction to him grows, so does her suspicion that he may be in some way connected to the murder.

title: In the Fade
synopsis: When her husband and young son are suddenly killed in a bomb attack, Katja’s life is torn apart. A police investigation points to a pair of young neo-Nazis as the key suspects, but when a lack of evidence fails to fully incriminate them, Katja is forced to take matters into her own hands.

title: In the Family
synopsis: Chip Hines, a precocious six year old, has only known life with his two dads, Cody and Joey. When Cody dies suddenly in a car accident, Joey and Chip struggle to find their footing again. Just as they begin to, Cody’s will reveals that he named his sister as Chip’s guardian.

title: In the Grey
synopsis: Revolves around two extraction specialists who have to designate a route of escape for a senior female negotiator.

title: In the Heat of the Night
synopsis: While on a trip back home in Mississippi, detective Virgil Tibbs is arrested for the murder of a prominent industrialist. His only crimes: being out late at night and being Black. After some prodding by his boss, Tibbs joins forces with the bigoted town sheriff to catch the real killer.

title: In the Highest of Skies
synopsis: A clergy-appointed gathering of twelve people, including a priest, a teenage girl, businessmen and nuns, meet in the lobby of the Vatican and step into a spacious elevator only to have it break down between floors. With no way to contact the hotel’s overseers, the atmosphere quickly turns toxic.

title: In the Loop
synopsis: The US President and UK Prime Minister fancy a war. But not everyone agrees that war is a good thing. However, after Cabinet Minister Simon Foster accidentally backs military action on TV, he and his team need to go to Washington to fix things. Now they just need to get in with the right people.

title: In the Mood for Love
synopsis: In the sleepy, proper Hong Kong of 1962, Mrs. Chan and Mr. Chow, a journalist, move into neighbouring apartments on the same day. Their encounters are formal and polite—until a discovery about their respective spouses creates an intimate bond between them.

title: In the Name of Christ
synopsis: In a small village in West Africa, a pig-herd decides to save his people after nearly drowning, presenting himself as the cousin of Christ. Somewhat crazy and a bit of a thief, he rules as master and pushes his convictions to the limit, going as far as having himself crucified like Christ.

title: In the Realm of the Senses
synopsis: Sade Abe is a former geisha working as a hotel maid in pre-World War II Japan. After she begins a torrid affair with the owner, they become completely infatuated. Their experimental sexual encounters spiral into an all-consuming and destructive love affair where even life is worth sacrificing.

title: In the Rearview
synopsis: A Polish vehicle traverses the roads of Ukraine. On board, people are evacuated following the Russian invasion. This van becomes a fragile and transitory refuge, a zone of confidences and confessions for exiles who have only one objective, to escape the war.

title: In the Shadows
synopsis: Trojan is a professional criminal who specializes in armed robbery. Released from prison, he picks up from where he left off—but now he has to begin again almost from scratch. Meanwhile, numerous obstacles get in the way of Trojan’s pressing need for independence.

title: Incendies
synopsis: Twins Simon and Jeanne visit a notary to hear their mother’s will and are surprised to find that they have a brother and that their father is still alive. They travel to an unnamed Middle Eastern country where they discover that the fortunes of their family were determined by the region’s conflicts.

title: Incident at Restigouche
synopsis: June 11 and 20, 1981. The Quebec Provincial Police raid Restigouche Reserve, Quebec. At issue are the salmon-fishing rights of the Mi’kmaq. With salmon a traditional source of food and income for the Mi’kmaq, the Quebec government’s decision arouses both dismay and anger in the community.

title: Incoherence
synopsis: A teacher hides his pornographic magazine from a female student. A jogger steals milk and blames it on a newspaper delivery boy. A drunk man desperately searches for a public toilet late at night. Over three episodes, three respectable middle-aged men find themselves behaving badly.

title: Incompatible with Life
synopsis: From her personal experience of pregnancy with a diagnosis of fetal malformation incompatible with life, the filmmaker sheds light on women who went through a similar situation in Brazil, where abortion may lead to prison.

title: Incredible But True
synopsis: Alain and Marie are a middle-aged bourgeois couple who move to their new house in a quiet suburb. A key feature of their new abode that the estate agent points out is a mysterious tunnel in the basement. Little do they realize that it will turn their lives upside down…

title: Indecent Desires
synopsis: A man finds a doll in a garbage can, and seeing that the woman he lives with looks like the doll, he starts touching. However, the doll transmits these touches to her.

title: Indian Summer
synopsis: In Italy, the gambler and professor of poetry Daniele Dominici arrives in the seaside town of Rimini and is hired to teach for four months in the Liceu, replacing another teacher. His relationship with his lover Monica is in crisis and he spends most of the time with his new acquaintances.

title: Inescapable
synopsis: One afternoon, on a typical day at work, Adib is confronted with devastating news: His eldest daughter, Muna, has gone missing in Damascus. Now Adib, who has not been back in over 30 years, must return to Syria and deal with his secret past in order to find her.

title: My Own Private Hell
synopsis: Deusimar’s bar is very special. The kind of place where the bartender wears a pink rabbit suit and the vocalist doesn’t quite make the notes. Gay, straight, dragqueen or Disney fan: here people can live out their dreams to the full, surrounded by flashing Christmas lights and pink glitter trimmings.

title: Inferno
synopsis: Riddled with horrid suspicion, the young American poet, Rose Elliot, writes to her brother and musicology student in Rome, Mark, about the startling findings in the dark and dank basement of her New York Art Deco apartment building. Where do the long and shadowy corridors of Rose’s building lead?

title: Infinite Football
synopsis: A provincial town in Romania is home to a man who for many years now has been championing radical changes to the rules of soccer: the shape of the field, the offside rule—everything needs changing to set the ball free.

title: Infinity Pool
synopsis: A young couple is enjoying an all-inclusive beach vacation in the island of La Tolqa, when a fatal accident exposes the resort’s perverse subculture of hedonistic tourism, reckless violence and surreal horrors.

title: Ingrid Goes West
synopsis: Ingrid is an unhinged social media stalker with a history of confusing “likes” for meaningful relationships. Taylor is an “influencer” whose perfectly curated lifestyle becomes Ingrid’s latest obsession. When Ingrid moves to LA, she manages to insinuate herself into the social media star’s life.

title: Inland Empire
synopsis: Actress Nicki Grace has landed a hot new role, but when she falls for her co-star, she realizes that her life is beginning to mimic the film she’s shooting. Adding to her confusion, she discovers the film is a remake of an unfinished Polish production—never finished due to an unspeakable tragedy.

title: Inpaintings
synopsis: Between the unexpected death of her closest friend in Paris and a shattered, sibylline Ottoman painting in Istanbul; a young fine art conservator tries to navigate through her mid-twenties.

title: Inshallah a Boy
synopsis: Jordan, nowadays. After the death of her husband, Nawal, 30s, has to fight for what she thinks is her inheritance for her only daughter in a region where having a son is a game changer.

title: Inside
synopsis: Sarah and her unborn baby are the sole survivors of a car crash that claimed the life of her husband. On Christmas Eve, she stays home alone, preparing to go to the hospital the next morning for her delivery. But when an frantic woman shows-up unannounced, the night turns into a fight for survival.

title: Inside the Yellow Cocoon Shell
synopsis: Thien must take responsibility when a family tragedy pushes him to search for his long lost brother in the mystical landscape of Vietnam. His journey, interrupted by enthralling dreams and re-awakened desires, leads him to question what is worth living for.

title: Insidious: The Red Door
synopsis: The Lamberts 10 years after the last installment, as Dalton begins college.

title: Insomnia
synopsis: An insomniac detective investigates the murder of a teenage girl in a sleepy Alaskan town. He enters a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse with the main suspect and must fight the instability of his consciousness to keep up.

title: Inspector Ike
synopsis: After the conniving understudy of an avant-garde theater group knocks off the star actor, he finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse with Inspector Ike, New York City’s Greatest Police Detective.

title: Instinct
synopsis: Psychologist Nicoline starts work at a secure men’s rehab facility and meets Idris, a charming, manipulative sex offender nearing probation. While others trust him, Nicoline remains skeptical. As her intrigue escalates to infatuation, Nicoline recognizes in Idris something unsettled in herself.

title: Institute Benjamenta, or This Dream People Call Human Life
synopsis: Heralded as “the strangest, prettiest, most mesmerizing debut since Eraserhead” by the Village Voice, Institute Benjamenta is the first live action feature from acclaimed animators The Brothers Quay.

title: Instructions for a Light and Sound Machine
synopsis: The hero of Instructions for a Light and Sound Machine is easy to identify. Walking down the street unknowingly, he suddenly realizes that he is not only subject to the gruesome moods of several spectators but also at the mercy of the filmmaker.

title: Intermission
synopsis: In Dublin, the breakup of two young lovers initiates a series of events with cataclysmic force. From a hell-raising petty thief to a maverick detective to a sex-starved single guy and beyond, all are blissfully unaware of how the accidental nature of life is binding them together.

title: International Departures
synopsis: Deniz has won the Greencard and is preparing to start this journey along with the sad, pessimistic, indifferent, angry, hopeful, and worried reactions of all.

title: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
synopsis: The innocent Ai Nu is sold to a brothel run by evil Madam Chun Yi, who falls in love with her at first sight. Quickly becoming the brothel’s most desirable courtesan, Ai Nu climbs the ranks in Chinese society. Meanwhile, she secretly plots bloody revenge against all who have wronged her.

title: Into Paradiso
synopsis: In a cosmopolitan Naples, the lives of a shy Italian scientist and a former Sri Lankan cricket champion intertwine. Forced to live together in an illegally built rooftop shack, these two unlikely companions forge a bond that empowers them to confront their destinies and rewrite their futures.

title: Introduction
synopsis: A group of characters—mostly parents and their grown offspring—try to relate to one another via a series of thwarted or stunted meetings and introductions. They all center around Youngho, a man on the cusp of adulthood who is confused about his romantic relationships and professional goals.

title: Invention
synopsis: In the aftermath of a conspiracy-minded father’s sudden death, his daughter inherits his patent for an experimental healing device.

title: Invisible Demons
synopsis: In the sprawling mega city of Delhi, the dangers of climate change are present, not future, for 30 million inhabitants fighting to survive. Invisible Demons explores the dramatic consequences of India’s growing economy, capturing a city in crisis, and our collective climate realities.

title: Involuntary
synopsis: It’s almost summer in Sweden, minor misbehaviour abounds. Leffe likes to play pranks when he’s drinking. Meanwhile, a righteous school teacher doesn’t know where to draw the line. Then there are two teenage girls who like to party, but one night in a park, one of them is found passed out drunk.

title: Io capitano
synopsis: Two Senegalese teenagers, Seydou and Moussa leave Dakar for Italy. On a journey neither of the boys could have anticipated, they experience the dangers and the beauty of the desert, the shock of detention centres in Libya, and the perils of the sea in their pursuit of a better life.

title: Irma la Douce
synopsis: Nestor, a young Paris policeman, falls for Irma, a streetwise sex worker. To keep her off the streets, he invents a wealthy alter ego, Lord X, who becomes her only client. The ruse unravels when Irma confesses she loves Lord X—not Nestor.

title: Irma Vep
synopsis: Hong Kong action diva Maggie Cheung (playing herself) comes to France when a past-his-prime director casts her in a remake of the silent classic Les Vampires. Clad in a rubber catsuit and unable to speak a word of French, Cheung finds herself adrift in the insanity of the film industry…

title: Irreversible
synopsis: A woman’s lover and her ex-boyfriend take justice into their own hands after she becomes the victim of a rapist. Because some acts can’t be undone. Because man is an animal. Because the desire for vengeance is a natural impulse. Because most crimes remain unpunished.

title: Irreversible: Straight Cut
synopsis: A woman’s lover and her ex-boyfriend take justice into their own hands after she becomes the victim of a rapist. This reconfigured vision allowed audiences to see the events of the film unfold in chronological order, providing pivotal new context.

title: Is This Thing On?
synopsis: Facing middle age and an impending divorce, Alex seeks new purpose in the New York comedy scene. Meanwhile, his wife Tess confronts the sacrifices she made for their family. Their unraveling marriage forces them to navigate co-parenting, identity, and whether love can take a new form.

title: It Follows
synopsis: After Jay sleeps with her new boyfriend, she discovers she’s the latest recipient of a fatal curse. Death will creep towards her, taking the form of anyone it chooses. As her friends begin to see the phantom assassins, they band together to help Jay escape or confront the terrifying presence.

title: It Must Be Heaven
synopsis: Elia Suleiman escapes from Palestine seeking an alternative homeland, only to find that Palestine is trailing behind him. The promise of a new life turns into a comedy of errors: however far he travels, from Paris to New York, something always reminds him of home.

title: It's All About Peace and Harmony
synopsis: Hicran, her sister, Vildan, and their mother, Dudu, lead totally different lives under the same roof. Although each of them is driven by singular obsessions, they share similar desires. When Dudu fields a marriage proposal, the household is thrown upside down.

title: It's Burning
synopsis: In Germany, an Arab family named Amal, Omar, and their son Ahmad encounter a man named Franz in a playground. Unfortunately, things escalate when he attacks Amal due to her headscarf. This leads to a court case, where everything changes.

title: It's Never Over, Jeff Buckley
synopsis: Rising musician Jeff Buckley had only released one album when he died suddenly in 1997. Now, never-before-seen footage, exclusive voice messages, and accounts from those closest to him offer a portrait of the captivating singer.

title: It’s Only the End of the World
synopsis: After 12 years of estrangement, a writer returns to his hometown, planning on announcing his impending death to his family. However, his mother, tempestuous siblings, and sister-in-law have their grievances to air. As resentments threaten to surface, fits and feuds begin to unfold.

title: It's What Each Person Needs
synopsis: Artist Becca Willow engages in a series of phone calls to two very different sets of clients. There are the lonely men who crave female companionship, and there are the elderly who require kindness and sometimes a nostalgic old song.

title: It Was Just an Accident
synopsis: When an auto mechanic encounters the man who may have been his torturer in prison, he kidnaps him to exact vengeance. But since the sole clue to Eghbal’s identity is the squeak of his prosthetic leg, Vahid turns to other now-freed victims for confirmation. And the danger only escalates.

title: It Was Nice to Meet You
synopsis: Deniz and Can are two siblings with SMA who are bedridden and live with the support of their mother, Aysel. After losing their home in the Maraş earthquake, the family now lives with a relative in Alaçatı. Five days of interviews shed light on their lives and perspectives.

title: It's a Disaster
synopsis: Four feuding couples meet for their monthly brunch. What starts as an airing of domestic grievances takes a sudden turn when the city falls victim to a mysterious, apocalypse-threatening attack. Trapped in the house and unsure of their fates, the eight frenemies become increasingly unhinged.

title: It's a Free World...
synopsis: Angie, a recently fired job recruiter, decides to launch her own employment agency out of her apartment, catering to local migrants desperate for work. But as she ventures into a world of cheap labor and exploitation, Angie must make some troubling compromises to keep her business alive.

title: It's a Wonderful Life
synopsis: Beset with personal and professional problems, George Bailey finds his previously happy life falling apart on Christmas Eve. Seeing no way out, he considers jumping off a bridge. Then, however, his guardian angel Clarence intervenes to show George what his beloved hometown would be like without him.

title: Ivo
synopsis: Ivo is a palliative care nurse. She has become close friends with her patient Solveigh. Ivo works with Solveigh’s husband to care for her. Soon they begin sleeping with each other. When Solveigh decides to end her life, she asks Ivo to help her.

title: IWOW: I Walk on Water
synopsis: Over the summer of 2019, the lives of director Khalik Allah and his muse—a 60-something schizophrenic, homeless Haitian man named Frenchie—become increasingly intertwined. Meanwhile, Allah meets Fab 5 Freddy, Wu-Tang Clan members, and his mother to discuss romance, spirituality, and mortality.

title: Jacquot de Nantes
synopsis: Once upon a time, a boy was raised in a garage where everyone enjoyed singing. He is fascinated by every kind of show, and soon buys a camera. Meanwhile, footage of the aging director Jacques Demy unveils intimate reflections on his life’s journey and his love for cinema and musicals.

title: Jaggi
synopsis: In rural Punjab, a schoolboy’s impotence sparks rumours about his sexuality, leading to relentless bullying. As family secrets surface and inner demons grow, he’s pushed to the brink. When faced with an arranged marriage, he must make a devastating choice.

title: Jakub
synopsis: After WWII, the people from Ruthenia’s Carpathian villages were promised a better life in Bohemia. But in their new homes, they felt like strangers—so telling stories quickly became very important to the homesick people. One of these beloved tales is about Jakub, a man who knew the bible by heart.

title: James White
synopsis: James White is a troubled twenty something trying to stay afloat in a frenzied New York City. As he retreats further into a hedonistic lifestyle, his mother’s battle with a serious illness faces a series of setbacks that force him to assume more responsibility.

title: Jane Austen Wrecked My Life
synopsis: An aspiring author looking to get more out of life takes up a writing residency and finds herself in the sort of romantic entanglements that could come from the pages of a Jane Austen novel.

title: Jane B. par Agnès V.
synopsis: On the eve of turning 40, icon Jane Birkin reflects on her career with director Agnès Varda. Candid interviews mix with film sequences where Birkin has creative freedom, playing different parts and Janes, including a classical muse, Calamity Jane, a femme fatale, Jane from Tarzan, and Joan of Arc.

title: Janet Planet
synopsis: Rural Massachusetts, 1991. Eleven-year-old Lacy spends the long summer at home with her mother, Janet. As Lacy fully immerses herself in her own world, she slowly begins to fall out of love with her mother.

title: January
synopsis: After murdering his wife, Horatio and his lover Lucrecia run away to a cabin in the country. As Horatio becomes increasingly consumed by guilt and memories of his dead wife, Lucrecia starts to question whether she should remain by his side or not.

title: Jauja
synopsis: In 1880s Patagonia, Danish engineer Captain Gunnar Dinesen joins the Argentine army with his teenage daughter, Ingeborg. When she runs off with a young soldier, Dinesen defies orders and sets off alone into hostile territory to find her—beginning a solitary quest.

title: Jawan
synopsis: A man is driven by a personal vendetta to rectify the wrongs in society, while keeping a promise made years ago. He comes up against a monstrous outlaw with no fear, who’s caused extreme suffering to many.

title: Jay Kelly
synopsis: Everyone knows Jay Kelly, but he doesn’t know himself.

title: Je t'aime moi non plus
synopsis: Johnny is a petite waif-like waitress working in a diner, lonely for love. She develops a crush on gay garbage collector Krassky, who is attracted to her boyish looks. Already an unconventional relationship, matters are further complicated by their inability to consummate it.

title: Jean-Michel Basquiat: The Radiant Child
synopsis: Tamra Davis pays homage to her friend in this documentary but also delves into him as an iconoclast. His dense, bebop-influenced neoexpressionist work emerged while minimalist, conceptual art was the fad; as a successful black artist, he was constantly confronted by racism and misconceptions.

title: Jerichow
synopsis: The dishonorably discharged Afghanistan veteran Thomas returns to his home village of Jerichow, where Ali, a local Turkish-German businessman and owner of a snack bar chain, hires him as a driver. That’s when Thomas meets Laura, his boss’s young wife with a dark past—and a love triangle is born.

title: Jessica Forever
synopsis: In a dystopian world dominated by an oppressive regime, a woman named Jessica rescues orphaned boys and gives them love and understanding—offering them an escape from their violent past. Bound by a united hope for peace and harmony, this matriarchal family fights for a better future.

title: Jesús López
synopsis: A young race driver dies, leaving his town in shock. His cousin Abel, an aimless teenager, is tempted to take his place. He moves in with Jesus’ parents, wears his clothes, and even goes out with his friends and ex-girlfriend. Soon, the resemblance to his cousin becomes disturbing.

title: Jethica
synopsis: On a road trip through New Mexico to flee a stalker named Kevin, Jessica reunites with an old friend. When Kevin mysteriously appears again, Jessica and Elena seek help from beyond the grave to get rid of him for good… but Kevin is different from other stalkers.

title: Jimmy P: Psychotherapy of a Plains Indian
synopsis: At the end of WWII, Jimmy Picard, a Native American Blackfoot who fought in France, suffers from unexplainable symptoms and is admitted to a military hospital. When doctors suspect schizophrenia, an eccentric psychoanalyst takes up the case and starts a conversation with the veteran.

title: Jin
synopsis: A guerrilla lives in a cave and decides to escape from the organization. She finds some civilian clothes and goes down from the mountain to the city. However, the city is no safer than the mountain.

title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
synopsis: Jiro Ono, a chef in his eighties, owns the only sushi restaurant to hold three Michelin stars. Located in a Tokyo metro station, it only has seating for 10 guests who have to reserve a month in advance to enjoy the delicacies prepared before their eyes by the esteemed sushi master.

title: Joan Baez I Am a Noise
director: Karen O'Connor, Miri Navasky, Maeve O'Boyle
synopsis: This intimate and candid portrait of American music legend and civil rights activist Joan Baez interweaves images from her farewell tour with previously unseen footage and highly intimate insights into her life and emotions.

title: John From
synopsis: In the heat of summer, teens Rita and Sara hang out by their building, chatting, listening to music, sipping coffee on the terrace, and roaming supermarkets. But when Rita visits the exhibition of their new neighbor—an explorer wrapped in a haze of exotic fantasies—her world is turned upside down.

title: John Wick: Chapter 4
synopsis: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends into foes.

title: Jojo Rabbit
synopsis: Hitler Youth cadet Jojo Betzler firmly believes in the ideals of Nazism manifested by his imaginary friend, Adolf Hitler. However, his foundations are shaken when he finds a Jewish girl in his house.

title: Joker
synopsis: Failed comedian Arthur Fleck encounters violent thugs while wandering the streets of Gotham City dressed as a clown. Disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow dissent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

title: Joker: Folie à Deux
synopsis: Failed comedian Arthur Fleck meets the love of his life, Harley Quinn, while in Arkham State Hospital. Upon release, the pair embark on a doomed romantic misadventure.

title: Jongole Mitin Mashi
synopsis: A female detective is tasked with the job of taking on an illicit gang poaching wild elephants in the forest. Will she able to overcome the challenges to save the lives of the remaining elephants from extinction?

title: Joram
synopsis: A desperate father flees Mumbai with his infant daughter, escaping deceit, exploitation and violence in search of an idyllic life once left behind.

title: Jour de fête
synopsis: In a French town, postman François spends his working hours casually delivering the mail. When a carnival arrives in town, he watches a film depicting the efficiency of the U.S. Postal Service. Inspired by the footage, François sets out to become just like the mail carriers in the United States.

title: Joy Division
synopsis: An account of the musical journey and ongoing legacy of Joy Division, the influential Manchester post-punk rock band of the late 1970s, featuring interviews with the surviving band members (now known as New Order), never-before-seen live performance footage, and newly discovered audio tapes.

title: Joyland
synopsis: As the patriarchs of the Rana family yearn for the birth of a baby boy to continue the family line, their youngest son secretly joins an erotic dance theatre and falls for an ambitious trans starlet. Their love story slowly illuminates the entire Rana family’s desire for a sexual rebellion.

title: Judy
synopsis: Winter 1968: Showbiz legend Judy Garland arrives in Swinging London to perform in a sell-out run at The Talk of the Town. But Judy is fragile. After working for 45 of her 47 years, she is exhausted; haunted by a childhood lost to Hollywood. Will she have the strength to go on?

title: Juha
synopsis: Everything changes for rural farmer Juha and his wife Marja when a sophisticated stranger is brought fatefully into their lives after his car breaks down in their village. Soon, Marja is seduced by the city slicker and runs away with him, only to find herself in a dire situation in the metropolis.

title: Jules and Jim
synopsis: Two artist best friends—the Austrian Jules and the French Jim—love the same woman, the enigmatic and alluring Catherine. Over three decades, the love triangle’s bond will be strengthened, broken, and tested as events like the Great War take place.

title: Jülide
synopsis: Late at night, Jülide wakes up with the noises coming from upstair. She runs up to see if her neighboor is okay. There she finds a a total stranger, Kaan, who is about to commit suicide.

title: June and John
synopsis: John leads an ordinary life with a monotonous routine. One day John runs into a woman on the subway who is as beautiful as she is mysterious named June. His encounter with her finally leads him to have a goal in his bumptious life.

title: Custody
synopsis: The Besson couple divorce. To protect her son from a father she accuses of violence, Miriam asks for exclusive custody, but the father says his son has been turned against him. The judge, unsure, grants a shared custody. Julien, a hostage between his parents, will do everything to prevent the worst.

title: Kaboom
synopsis: Smith’s everyday life in his college dorms—hanging out with his arty, sarcastic best friend Stella, hooking up with a beautiful free spirit named London, lusting for his gorgeous but dim surfer roommate Thor—all gets turned upside-down after one fateful, terrifying night.

title: Kadıköy'ün En İyi Falcısı
synopsis: Defne, a young woman with special powers, visits Hale, Kadıköy’s top fortuneteller, for a tarot reading. Defne’s odd behavior raises questions: Whose fortune is really being read? And who is the mysterious man in the background? A harsh reality-check awaits them, but not through the cards.

title: Kaili Blues
synopsis: Chen, a preoccupied doctor working in a small clinic in the rain-drenched city of Kaili, decides to fulfill his late mother’s wish and sets off on a journey to look for his brother’s abandoned child. His partner in the clinic, a lonely old lady, asks him to also find her former lover.

title: Kalifornia
synopsis: A writer and his photographer girlfriend leave New York to drive to a new life in California. On the way, they visit various murder sites for their new book on serial killers. They pick up two hitchhikers, one of whom could provide an interesting case study for their research…

title: Kanehsatake: 270 Years of Resistance
synopsis: In the summer of 1990, an armed standoff over a planned golf course on Kanien’kéhaka land unfolded. Filmmaker Alanis Obomsawin embedded herself on the front lines of this conflict for 78 days to film the discord between the protesters, police, and military.

title: Wedding Dance
synopsis: Taxi driver Ahmet, who is about to get engaged to the young girl his mother pushes for, starts a passionate affair with the tailor Leyla, who is his elder. Semih’s return will be a great danger to Ahmet and Leyla’s relationship. From now on, nothing will remain the same.

title: Muleteers
synopsis: Follows a group of villagers, soldiers, and a journalist as they embark on a perilous journey through the snow-covered mountains of southeastern Turkey.

title: Keane
synopsis: New York City. It has been six months since William Keane’s six-year-old daughter was kidnapped. He is barely able to cope and often returns to the site of her abduction. One day, he befriends a single mother and her little daughter. He hides his story from them and tries to start anew with them.

title: Keep the Lights On
synopsis: Filmmaker Erik and closeted lawyer Paul meet through a casual encounter, but find a deeper connection and become a couple. In an almost decade-long relationship defined by highs, lows, and dysfunctional patterns, Erik struggles to negotiate his own boundaries and dignity while being true to himself.

title: Kerr
synopsis: Can witnesses a murder in a small town. The police don’t allow him to leave after his testimony. On the other hand, a quarantine is declared due to rabid dogs. The whole town turns into purgatory with no exit, and is almost at the edge of insanity.

title: Kes
synopsis: Barnsley, England. Billy Casper works a paper round, reads The Dandy, and is a natural with animals. Failed by the school system and harangued at home, he spends his energy keeping and training a kestrel. A teacher and some local shopowners get behind the enterprise, while others come in the way.

title: Keyhole
synopsis: A surreal indoor odyssey of one man, Ulysses Pick (Jason Patric) struggling to reach his wife (Isabella Rosellini) in her bedroom upstairs, this hypnotic dreamlike journey bewilders and captivates.

title: Kids
synopsis: The lives of street-tough Manhattan teens unfold over a frenetic twenty-four hours. Skateboarders Telly and Casper spend their time hanging out, shoplifting, using drugs, and seducing girls. Meanwhile, Jennie follows the pair across New York, desperate to confront them with a terrible truth.

title: Kids Return
synopsis: Masaru and Shinji, two teenage friends, spend most of their school days harassing classmates and playing pranks. Dropping out, they take different paths: one becomes a small-time boxer, the other one a low level gangster. Yet, their life decisions still find a way of catching up with each other.

title: Kikujiro
synopsis: It’s the summer holidays, and Masao is bored: all his friends have left Tokyo, and he spends his time alone while his grandmother works. One day, he meets Kikujiro, a loudmouthed old yakuza, and the unlikely duo embark on a road trip to find Masao’s long lost mother, whom he has never met before.

title: Killer Joe
synopsis: When Chris is in debt to a drug lord, he decides to hire a hit man to kill his mother, whose life insurance policy is supposed to go to his sister Dottie. Chris has heard of crazy Dallas cop Joe Cooper, who moonlights as a contract killer. But Joe demands to take Dottie as carnal collateral.

title: Killers of the Flower Moon
genres: Crime, Drama, History, Western, Mystery, Thriller
synopsis: Members of the Osage tribe in the United States are murdered under mysterious circumstances in the 1920s sparking a major F.B.I. investigation involving J. Edgar Hoover.

title: Kim's Video
synopsis: Kim’s Video, an iconic video store in New York City, mysteriously closed its doors and sent its legendary film archive to a Sicilian village for “safekeeping.” But what starts as an homage to cinema quickly becomes a rescue mission to ensure the eternal preservation of the beloved video collection.

title: Your Name
synopsis: High schoolers Mitsuha and Taki are complete strangers living separate lives. But one night, they suddenly switch places. Mitsuha wakes up in Taki’s body, and he in hers. The two must adjust their lives around each other.

title: Kinetta
synopsis: In a desolate Greek resort town, a chambermaid, a man obsessed with BMW cars, and a photo-store clerk stage re-enactments of a local serial killer’s murders. What seems to be an investigative experiment turns out to be more of an exploration into the depths of their own psychosexual obsessions.

title: King Boxer
synopsis: Hoping to win the top prize in a boxing tournament, Chao Chih-hao joins a fighting school. But when his fingers are viciously shattered by a rival gang, Chao must train his way back to peak form and learn the all-powerful Iron Palm technique. Only then can he wreak vengeance on his enemies.

title: The Promised Land
synopsis: Denmark, 1755. Soldier Ludvig Kahlen arrives on the wild land of Jutland to follow the king’s call to cultivate it, hoping to achieve wealth and honor. But Kahlen quickly makes an enemy in merciless landowner Frederik De Schinkel, who believes he is the sole ruler of the area.

title: Kings of the Road
synopsis: A roving film projector repairman saves the life of a depressed psychologist who has driven his car into a river. They end up on the road together, traveling from one rural German movie theater to another. Along the way, the two men, each running from his past, bond over their shared loneliness.

title: Kiss
synopsis: A young filmmaker gets in trouble with the censors over a scene in his new film.

title: Kiss of the Damned
synopsis: A beautiful vampire meets Paulo, a scriptwriter who falls in love with her. She does not want to drag him into her inevitable destiny, but finally gives in to passion. When her evil sister arrives in the house, their love story and the whole vampire community are seriously endangered.

title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
synopsis: Valentín, a political prisoner, shares a cell with Molina, a window dresser convicted of public indecency. The two form an unlikely bond as Molina recounts the plot of a Hollywood musical starring his favorite silver screen diva, Ingrid Luna.

title: Kisses
synopsis: On the fringes of Dublin, two kids, Kylie and Dylan, live in a housing estate devoid of life. After a violent altercation with his father, Dylan runs away. Kylie decides to go with him, and together, they make their way to the magical nighttime lights of Dublin to search for Dylan’s brother.

title: Love
synopsis: Marianne, a doctor, and Tor, a nurse, avoid relationships. After meeting on a ferry where Tor seeks casual encounters, Marianne explores the possibility of spontaneous intimacy, questioning societal norms.

title: Kneecap
synopsis: There are 80,000 native Irish speakers in Ireland. 6,000 live in the North of Ireland. Three of them became a rap group called Kneecap. This anarchic Belfast trio becomes the unlikely figurehead of a civil rights movement to save the mother tongue.

title: Knife + Heart
genres: Thriller, Mystery, LGBTQ+, Horror, Drama, Cult, Crime
synopsis: Paris, 1979, Anne produces gay adult films but a recent break-up with her editor Loïs has thrown her into alcoholism. When one of the stars of Anne’s latest productions is murdered, the shoot is thrown into turmoil. However, she pushes ahead with the film, not knowing the murderer will strike again.

title: Knives and Skin
synopsis: What happened to Carolyn Harper? After the high school girl’s disappearance, a wave of fear spreads among traumatized town residents. While the darkness lurking beneath everyday life gradually reveals itself, a sense of awakening overcomes the town’s teenagers, who take on strange coping techniques.

title: Knives Out
synopsis: On the day after his 85th birthday party, a wealthy crime novelist is found dead. A famed detective is enlisted on the case and suspects foul play. Everyone is a suspect and as the investigation heats up, the money-grubbing family begins to be revealed as far more competitive than they first appear.

title: Kokomo City
synopsis: Daniella Carter, Koko Da Doll, Liyah Mitchell, and Dominique Silver are four Black transgender women navigating the sex work industry in Atlanta and New York City. They recount tales of resilience, survival, and identity—challenging stereotypes and revealing the harsh realities of their world.

title: Nobody's Home
synopsis: After her father’s sudden death, Feride takes on the role of the father in the family. Her mother, Nurcan, desperately tries to replace her lost husband with Feride, while her brother, İlker, starts to drift away from the family. Feride decides to break free, changing everyone’s fate.

title: Kokuho
synopsis: After the death of his yakuza father, 14-year-old Kikuo is taken in by a famous kabuki actor. Alongside Shunsuke, the actor’s only son, he wholly dedicates himself to theater. For decades, the two young men grow and evolve together, but only one will become the greatest Japanese master of kabuki.

title: Kontinental '25
synopsis: Orsolya is a bailiff in Cluj, the main city in Transylvania. One day she has to evict a homeless man from a cellar, an action with tragic consequences that triggers a moral crisis which Orsolya must weather as best she can.

title: Cosmos
synopsis: Kosmos is a thief and a miracle-worker. He appears one morning in a tiny, snowbound border village where he is welcomed with open arms – on account of arriving just in time to resuscitate a small boy who would otherwise have drowned.

title: Krisha
synopsis: After a long absence, a woman reunites with her family for a holiday gathering. She sees it as an opportunity to fix her past mistakes, cook the family turkey and prove to her loved ones that she has changed for the better. But her delirium takes her family on a holiday that no one will forget.

title: Kuttey
synopsis: A van carrying crores of cash. One rainy night in the outskirts of Mumbai. Unaware of each other, three stray gangs cross paths on the hunt. Unfortunately, all of them have the same plan. Will they bite the bone or will they lose to greed?

title: The Piano Accident
synopsis: Magalie, a social media sensation famous for posting shocking content online, takes a break after suffering a serious accident while filming one of her videos. Isolated in a mountain chalet with her personal assistant, her retreat is interrupted by a journalist who begins to blackmail her.

title: Double Lover
synopsis: After starting therapy, Chloé falls in love with her psychoanalyst Paul. When they move in together, everything seems perfect until some discoveries lead her to suspect that he may be living a double life. As she begins investigating, she dives into a dark world of smoke, mirrors, and doppelgangers.

title: L'avance
synopsis: Aliou, a burgeoning student at Les Beaux-Arts in Paris, sells a painting of his dead mother for 3000 euros to a famous collector. Upon delivering the painting, he is taken on a journey through which he will bear the burden of the money he has just earned.

title: L'Eclisse
synopsis: A young woman named Vittoria has recently ended a love story with an older man. After meeting Piero, a stock market trader, the two start seeing each other and wander through the deserted, modernist suburbs of Rome. Their affair, however, will soon reveal itself to be a doomed one.

title: Scarlet
synopsis: In northern France, Juliette grows up alone with her father, Raphaël, a veteran of the First World War. Passionate about singing and music, the lonely young girl meets a magician one summer who promises that scarlet sails will one day take her away from her village.

title: Last Summer
synopsis: Anne, a brilliant lawyer, lives in perfect harmony with her husband Pierre and their daughters in a house on the heights of Paris. One day, Theo, Pierre’s seventeen-year-old son from a previous marriage, moves in with them. Anne and Theo quickly form an unexpected connection.

title: Happening
synopsis: France, 1963, Anne is a bright student with a promising future. But when she falls pregnant, she sees her chance to finish her studies and escape the constraints of her social background disappearing. With her exams approaching, Anne resolves to act, even if she has to confront shame and pain.

title: Souleymane's Story
synopsis: As he pedals through the streets of Paris to deliver meals, Souleymane repeats his story. In two days, he must pass his asylum application interview, the key to obtaining papers. But Souleymane is not ready.

title: L'immensità
synopsis: A sun-drenched 1970s Rome belies the quiet desperation simmering inside Clara, a vibrant woman trying to keep things upbeat for her children while trapped in an abusive marriage. Her eldest child, Adriana idolizes their fun-loving mother but also feels trapped, albeit in the wrong body.

title: La antena
synopsis: An entire city has lost its voice. Mr. TV, the owner of the city’s only television channel, is carrying out a sinister plan to control all of the city’s inhabitants. He kidnaps a singer, the only one who still has The Voice. An inventor witnesses the kidnapping and flees to thwart approaching doom.

title: The Muleteer
synopsis: In 1930s Jalisco, a daring teenage girl ventures from the ranch where she grew up to find her father, adopting the guise of a muleteer.

title: The Beast
synopsis: The head of a failing French family thinks that fate has smiled down on him when the daughter of a wealthy man agrees to be married to his son. The daughter and her aunt then travel out to the French countryside to meet with the family, unaware that a mysterious ‘beast’ is stalking the vicinity.

title: La Bonga
synopsis: Two decades after a death threat from right-wing paramilitaries caused a maroon community to flee, the townspeople embark on a symbolic journey through the jungles of the Colombian Caribbean to resurrect a home that exists only in their memories.

title: La Chimera
synopsis: In 1980s rural Italy, English archaeologist Arthur aids a ragtag group of local graverobbers to find ancient tombs filled with valuable artefacts. But Arthur, who mourns the loss of his love, Beniamina, uses the digs to search for the door to the afterlife, where he imagines reuniting with her.

title: La ciénaga
synopsis: In Salta, Argentina, Mecha and her family’s holiday is coming to an end. Time becomes distended, punctuated by naps around the stagnant water of the pool, visits from cousins and children playing war in the jungle. A muted tension and a series of incidents slowly begin to disrupt the family order.

title: La Cocina
synopsis: In the sweltering back kitchen of a Times Square restaurant, undocumented cook Pedro is caught between mounting pressures at work and a complicated romance with waitress Julia. When money goes missing, suspicion spreads, igniting tensions that threaten to upend the fragile hopes of the staff.

title: La collectionneuse
synopsis: After his fiancée goes to London, Adrien decides to spend his vacation experimenting with monastic life in a large house in St Tropez. However, the villa already has two occupants: his artist friend Daniel and Haydée, a woman who collects lovers and comes home at all hours of the night.

title: La Confessione
synopsis: As the world nears its end, two young lovers, lost in a suspended past, begin to question their feelings. Consumed by the collapse of their love, they fail to see the catastrophe unfolding around them.

title: Wild Foxes
synopsis: At a boarding school specialising in sports, Camille, a young boxing star recently crowned French champion, is narrowly saved from a fatal accident by his best friend Matteo. As anxiety slowly gnaws away at him, he begins to question his passion for boxing and his close friendship with Matteo.

title: La dolce vita
synopsis: Marcello Rubini is a playboy paparazzo who gallivants around the vibrant city of Rome. While Marcello contends with the overdose taken by his girlfriend, Emma, he also pursues heiress Maddalena and movie star Sylvia, embracing a carefree approach to living.

title: A Brother's Love
synopsis: After failing to secure a faculty position in the philosophy department, 35-year-old Sophia is forced to “temporarily” move in with her older brother Karim. Their unbreakable bond will be put to the test when Karim falls deeply in love. Feeling abandoned, Sophia is forced to finally become an adult.

title: La Flor de Lis
synopsis: Set in the mid-nineteenth century in the western U.S., five sheriffs are looking for a serial murderer who has terrorized the local population.  Suspense and intrigue increases as the murderer remains faceless.

title: The Big Feast
synopsis: In a country mansion, four friends indulge in gluttony and carnal pleasures, aiming to eat themselves to death. Their hedonistic pursuits intertwine with encounters with local women, including a daring schoolteacher, leading to a spiral of excess and consequence.

title: La grazia
synopsis: As his tenure as President of Italy nears its end, Mariano De Santis faces wrenching decisions—both political and deeply personal. Amid these moral quandaries, he must confront his own conscience and seek guidance from those closest to him, including his confidante and daughter, Dorotea.

title: La Haine
synopsis: A regular housing estate with no specific problems wakes up one morning in a state of siege after learning that a 16-year-old resident, Abdel, is between life and death after being injured by a police inspector. Three of his friends wander around the city, waiting for news about his well-being.

title: It Would Be Night in Caracas
synopsis: In a collapsing Caracas, Adelaida buries her mother and returns home to find it seized by a violent militia. As society crumbles around her, she must risk everything—even her identity—to survive.

title: La jauría
synopsis: Eliú is incarcerated in a minors’ center in the heart of Colombian forest, for a crime he committed with his friend El Mono. The teenagers perform manual labor and intense group therapy. One day, El Mono is transferred to the same center.

title: La jetée
synopsis: After World War III, Paris lies in ruins. A scientist researching time travel hopes to send subjects to various time periods. He finds a suitable subject in a prisoner with a vivid pre-war childhood memory. The prisoner travels in time and comes to understand an incident he witnessed as a child.

title: La La Land
synopsis: Sebastian and Mia are drawn together by their common desire to do what they love. But as success mounts, they are faced with decisions that begin to fray the fragile fabric of their love affair, and the dreams they worked so hard to maintain in each other threaten to rip them apart.

title: La libertad
synopsis: Matriarchs have assembled around a backstrap loom, a pre-Hispanic technique preserved by indigenous women of Mesoamerica. Unfolding like a weaving of figures and the gestures making up this labor, the film circulates between a domestic space, an archaeological museum, and a weavers’ cooperative.

title: The Mountain of Terror
synopsis: Part of Antoine Barraud’s triptych devoted to three Japanese directors.

title: The Death of Louis XIV
synopsis: August 1715. After going for a walk, Louis XIV feels a pain in his leg. Over the next few days, the king keeps fulfilling his duties, but his sleep is troubled and he has a serious fever. This is the start of the slow agony of the greatest king of France, surrounded by his relatives and doctors.

title: The Velvet Queen
synopsis: High up on the Tibetan plateau amongst unexplored valleys lies one of the wild world’s last sanctuaries. Vincent Munier, one of the most renowned wildlife photographers, takes the adventurer and novelist Sylvain Tesson with him on his latest mission. Together they try to spot the rare snow leopard.

title: La Paz in Buenos Aires
synopsis: Erasmo Chambi is a Bolivian migrant who survives on the outskirts of Buenos Aires by giving lucha libre wrestling performances in small local clubs, bringing his own hand-made ring to each show. Back home, he was a legendary wrestler named “El Ciclon.” Now, he trains his son to become his successor.

title: The Endless Film
synopsis: A parallel film history crafted from the fragmented remains of never-completed Argentine feature films. Stories and images that were once considered unsuccessful now take on a new meaning. Inert images and sounds never heard before are finally opened up for fresh discovery.

title: The Little Sister
synopsis: Fatima, 17, the youngest daughter of a French-Algerian family in a Paris suburb, leaves school for a prestigious prep class. She plays football, has a secret boyfriend, but hides that she loves women. In Paris, new freedoms clash with family tradition and faith, forcing her to find her own path.

title: The Swimming Pool
synopsis: The bronzed and beautiful Marianne and Jean-Paul are spending their summer vacation on the Côte d’Azur. But their tranquil holiday is interrupted by the arrival of an old acquaintance and his eighteen-year-old daughter—unleashing a gathering wave of sexual tension, jealousy, and sudden violence.

title: La Pointe Courte
synopsis: A penetrating study of a marriage on the rocks, set against the backdrop of a small Mediterranean fishing village. Both a stylized depiction of the complicated relationship between a married couple and a documentary-like look at the daily struggles of the inhabitants of Sète in the South of France.

title: La Suprema
synopsis: In a remote Colombian village without electricity, a strong-willed teenager convinces her whole town to find a way of watching her estranged uncle compete in a world championship boxing match.

title: The Ice Tower
synopsis: Jeanne, a 15-year-old orphan, witnesses the shoot for a film adaptation of the fairy tale The Snow Queen, and she becomes fascinated by its star, Cristina, an actress who is just as mysterious and alluring as the Queen she is playing.

title: Laberint Sequences
synopsis: Laberint d’Horta, Barcelona. In the park’s garden, at the center of its maze, a statue of Eros waits. Several journeys take place in search of the center. While navigating the maze’s false pathways, structures start to crack, and a mysterious underworld floods its gates.

title: Lady
synopsis: An unnamed woman in a red wig welcomes a documentary crew into her New York apartment. The crew captures her everyday life, as she fights with her boyfriend and gossips with her friend. These scenes alternate with black-and-white footage of a woman in a red wig escaping a suburban existence.

title: Lady Macbeth
synopsis: England, 1865. Katherine is stifled by her loveless marriage to a man twice her age, and his unforgiving family. When she embarks on a passionate affair with a young worker on her husband’s estate, a force is unleashed inside her so powerful that she will stop at nothing to get what she wants.

title: Lady Vengeance
synopsis: After being wrongfully convicted, a woman is imprisoned for 13 years and forced to give up her daughter. While in prison she gains the respect of her cellmates and plots her revenge on the man responsible. Once released, she begins her elaborate plan of retribution, but discovers a horrifying truth.

title: L'âge d'or
synopsis: A surrealist tale of a man and a woman who are passionately in love with one another, but their attempts to consummate their love are thwarted by their families, the Church, and the bourgeois society.

title: Lâl
synopsis: Born from a word out of nothing, the creature must eat one of its own to survive. This word which the creature has managed to pronounce brings him friends, enemies, and new prey, although it’s difficult to maintain the balance.

title: Lalanna's Song
synopsis: Two young women on what seems to be a routine day dealing with prejudice and sexism. Their world starts to break down into David Lynch-like shards, triggered by their encounter with a possibly supernatural young girl, Lalanna, whose song may bring death with it.

title: Lamb
synopsis: A couple living alone on a remote farm in Iceland find their quiet existence shaken by the astonishing discovery of a mysterious newborn amongst their sheep. They decide to raise the child as their own, but soon face the consequences of defying the will of nature.

title: L'Amour Fou
synopsis: Claire, an actress, is happily married to Sébastien, a director. But when she struggles to embody Hermione in the play Andromaque, Sébastien abruptly replaces her with his ex-wife. As rehearsals progress, life slowly imitates fiction, and Claire descends into a devastating madness.

title: Land and Shade
synopsis: Alfonso, an aging farmer, returns to his family home in rural Colombia to care for his son, whose work in the toxic sugarcane fields has left him gravely ill. As ash rains from the burning crops, the family struggles to survive—torn between love, labor, and a land that is slowly destroying them.

title: Land of My Dreams
synopsis: After many years apart, Bianca and her mother meet again in the streets of Porto. Together, they hit the road with their stripping show, running after lost time, impossible love, and strange fantasies.

title: Lands Close to Paterson
synopsis: In New York to present her film Siberia, Joana Preiss documents the city through its pace and meetings. We are wrapped in a mysterious journey through her imagination, which is both breathtaking and hypnotic.

title: The Arrival
synopsis: First you see the arrival of the film itself, which shows the arrival of a train at a station. But that train collides with a second train, causing a violent crash, which leads us to an unexpected third arrival, the arrival of a beautiful woman—the happy-end.

title: Lars and the Real Girl
synopsis: Extremely shy Lars finds it impossible to make friends or socialize. His brother and sister-in-law worry about him, so when he announces that he has a girlfriend he met on the Internet, they are overjoyed. But Lars’ new lady is a life-size plastic woman.

title: Last Film Show
synopsis: When the magic of movies conquers nine-year young Samay’s heart; he moves heaven and earth in pursuit of his 35mm dreams unaware of heartbreaking times that awaits him.

title: Last Nomads in Anatolia: Sarikecilis
synopsis: Sarikecilis are the last representatives in Anatolia of the centuries-old tradition of nomadism. Making their way to sea level in winter, and to the highlands in summer, they spend seven months of the year in transit, living off of the goats they keep.

title: Late Autumn
synopsis: Three ageing businessmen gather in a ceremony to commemorate their friend Miwa, who died a few years ago. When college nostalgia inspires them to match-make for their friend’s widow and her daughter, they have no idea of the strife their careless interference will cause.

title: Late Shift
synopsis: Floria, a dedicated nurse, navigates the relentless pace on a surgical ward with unwavering dedication, infusing humanity and warmth into her patient care even though the shift is understaffed. As the day intensifies, the film transforms into a gripping race against time.

title: Late Spring
synopsis: Noriko is a young, single, professional woman who lives with her father. She is encouraged by him and her friends to marry but has yet—or is unwilling—to find someone suitable. So, to prompt her to take her suitors seriously, her father pretends he is considering a new marriage.

title: Lateral
synopsis: Artist Charlie Shackleton realizes he can trick the human brain into detecting 3D images without using two cameras. He scours cinema history for hidden depths, testing out tracking shots from various films, including works by Chantal Akerman and Stanley Kubrick.

title: Laurence Anyways
synopsis: In the ’90s, Laurence tells Fred that she identifies as a woman. Over ten years, in spite of the odds, in spite of each other, the couple confront the prejudices of their friends, ignore the council of their families, and brave the bigotry of the society they offend.

title: Law and Order
synopsis: The film follows the members of the Kansas City Police Department, who are largely white, as they engage in daily patrol activities, interacting with members of the public. The scope of their activities is broad, ranging from bringing a lost child to the police station to making arrests.

title: Law of Desire
synopsis: Pablo loves Juan but Juan is lukewarm about the relationship. Antonio becomes obsessed with Pablo after one evening intended to be a mere one-night stand. Paralleling this dangerous love triangle is the story of Pablo’s sister Tina, a transgender woman about whom Pablo is writing a play.

title: Lawrence of Arabia
synopsis: The Great War. Lieutenant T.E. Lawrence traverses the Arabian peninsula by camel, mediating between nomadic tribes and the British military. If his manner rankles his superiors in Cairo, it makes him a gifted liaison in the desert, where he jointly leads a decisive charge against Ottoman forces.

title: Layla
synopsis: Layla is a struggling Arab drag queen whose confident façade hides their desperate desire for love. When their performance at a corporate Pride event turns into a transgressive takedown, they are surprised to catch the eye of marketing executive Max, whose attentions sweep Layla off their feet.

title: Happy as Lazzaro
synopsis: Lazzaro, a peasant so good that he is often mistaken for simple-minded, meets Tancredi, a nobleman cursed by his imagination. They find joy in a pastoral world of deception and lies. The truth will separate them, but Lazzaro’s loyalty will lead him to travel in time, landing in a bleak city.

title: Le bonheur
synopsis: François, a happily married carpenter with a young family, falls in love with telephone operator Emilie. As he basks in the joy of his new relationship, his feelings for his family intensify. But when he tries to share his joyful news with his wife, her reaction is far from the delight he hoped for.

title: The Red Circle
synopsis: A skilled thief who lives in elegance when he’s not locked up in jail plans an elaborate jewelry store heist with two collaborators picked up almost at random: a notorious escaped convict and an alcoholic ex-cop. With a determined inspector on their tail, they face impossible odds.

title: Le doulos
synopsis: Short after being released from prison, enigmatic gangster Maurice is already involved in what should be a simple heist. While he prepares for it with the help of a friend, he discovers that his trusted partner might be as untrustworthy as he is.

title: The Fabulous Ones
synopsis: A group of trans women—who call themselves The Fabulous Ones—reunite after 20 years at the house where they once lived together. They have gathered together in respect of their deceased friend Antonia. Emotions are running high, but they still find a remarkable way to fulfill Antonia’s wishes.

title: The Son of Joseph
synopsis: Summer in Paris. Fifteen-year-old Vincent refuses to join in with his schoolmates torturing rats or selling sperm on the Internet. He lives with his single mother Marie and finally wants to find out who his father is. His investigations lead him to a famous publisher with an obnoxious character.

title: The Deep End
synopsis: Lucille, an introverted eleven year old girl, lives with her parents in a public swimming pool, where they are caretakers. She refuses to brave the deep end, as she rejects her own confused and ambiguous desires for the swimming instructor.

title: Le Havre
synopsis: In the French harbor city of Le Havre, fate throws young African refugee Idrissa into the path of Marcel Marx, a well-spoken bohemian who works as a shoe-shiner. With innate optimism and the tireless support of his community, Marcel stands up to officials pursuing the boy for deportation.

title: Le jour des rois
synopsis: As they do every Sunday, three sisters with opposite personalities get together. For Epiphany, the schedule is full: visiting the cemetery, having lunch out, eating the galette and picking the king, and going to see a senior comedy troupe in which their eccentric fourth sister performs.

title: Winter Boy
synopsis: 17-year-old Lucas is drifting through his last year of boarding school until the sudden death of his father strips away everything he took for granted. Left filled with anger and despair, he visits his older brother in Paris seeking comfort in the new city.

title: Le Moulin
synopsis: Poetry, literature, painting and old film clips converge in this lyrical, unusually designed film essay about Le Moulin, the Taiwanese poets’ collective which protested in the 1930s against the cultural superiority of the Japanese occupier and the domination of realism in poetry.

title: The Eight Mountains
synopsis: In a secluded village in the Italian Alps, an unlikely brotherhood forms between two boys, Pietro and Bruno. Over the years Bruno remains faithful to his home while Pietro aspires to greater heights, but as decades pass and lives unfold, their paths ultimately lead them back to where they first met.

title: Kung-Fu Master!
synopsis: On a rainy day in spring, Mary-Jane, a divorced mother of two of almost 40, falls in love with Julien, a boy of nearly 15, a video game-obsessed classmate of her daughter. But is it romance—or a desperate attempt to turn back time in the face of middle age?

title: Le Pont du Nord
synopsis: In Paris, Marie, a claustrophobic ex-con, encounters the wild and knife-wielding Baptiste. Baptiste accompanies Marie on her quest to solve the mystery behind the contents of her former lover’s suitcase: a mix of clippings, patterns, and maps of Paris that points to a vastly unsettling labyrinth.

title: The Animal Kingdom
synopsis: In a world hit by a wave of mutations that are transforming some humans into animals, François does everything he can to save his wife, who is affected by this mysterious condition. As creatures disappear into a nearby forest, François embarks with his teenage son Emile on a life-changing quest.

title: Le samouraï
synopsis: Jeff Costello, nicknamed the Samurai, is an enigmatic hitman, meticulous in crafting airtight alibis. After assassinating a nightclub owner, he becomes a suspect in the murder investigation by a detective. But the witness statements contradict each other.

title: Léa
synopsis: Léa, a student in Le Havre, takes care of her grandmother who requires constant attention, and works as a waitress to make ends meet. But when she is accepted at a prestigious school in Paris, she must make decisions. In order to pay her way through school, she becomes a stripper.

title: Lean on Pete
synopsis: Charley Thompson, a teenager living with his single father, gets a summer job working for horse trainer Del Montgomery. Bonding with an aging racehorse, Charley is horrified to learn he is bound for slaughter, and so he steals the horse, and the duo embark on an odyssey.

title: Leaving Las Vegas
synopsis: Ben is an alcoholic with no future and no friends. Sacked by the Hollywood studio where he works, Ben heads to Las Vegas to drink himself to death. But when he arrives, he meets Sera, a sex worker. They fall in love and decide to live together, accepting each other as they are to the very end.

title: Lebanon
synopsis: June 6, 1982. Israeli armed forces enter Lebanon in the First Lebanon War. How is the event seen by four Israeli recruits reduced to the extremely limited perspective of a tank’s peephole? The 20-year-olds are dispatched to search a hostile town—a simple mission that turns into a nightmare.

title: Lee
synopsis: The story of photographer Elizabeth ‘Lee’ Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

title: Left Bank
synopsis: Marie is a professional runner with hopes of making it to the European Championships in Portugal. When she is diagnosed with a mysterious blood disease, Marie is sidelined. Hoping to ease her disappointment, she moves in with new boyfriend, Bobby. There, she uncovers a disturbing mystery.

title: Legally Blonde
synopsis: Elle Wood, a blonde sorority queen, is dumped by her boyfriend. He is planning to become a politician and wants to find a smarter girlfriend. Elle decides to follow him to law school to get him back, but once there, she learns she has more legal savvy than she ever imagined.

title: Legendary Weapons of China
synopsis: The Qing court is sending kung fu fighters to combat gun-wielding foreigners, and clan leader Lei Kung is appalled by this senseless slaughter. His dissent puts him on the path of deadly masters who want him silenced. His only chance for survival lies in a secret arsenal of bizarre, deadly weapons.

title: Lek and the Dogs
synopsis: In his adaptation of Hattie Naylor’s play Ivan and the Dogs, experimental filmmaker Andrew Kötting travels to the Chilean desert to recreate the life of the young boy who left his Moscow apartment to live with a pack of wild dogs. A crossover between narrative film and contemporary art piece.

title: Lemming
synopsis: Alain, a young and brilliant engineer and his wife Benedicte move to a new city following Alain’s work transfer. They invite Alain’s new boss and his wife to dinner one evening. The discovery of a mysterious dead rodent in their drain marks the descent into pandemonium of their once perfect life.

title: Lemon Tree
synopsis: At a Halloween carnival, a young father steals a magician’s rabbit to impress his ten-year-old son. The thrill of the petty theft quickly dissolves when the young boy is tasked with getting himself, his father, and his new pet home safe.

title: Leningrad Cowboys Go America
synopsis: A struggling Siberian rock band leaves home in the lonely tundra to tour the United States because, as they’re told, “they’ll buy anything there.” The musicians bravely venture across the States, carrying a bandmate and some beer in a coffin, and sporting hairdos resembling unicorn horns.

title: Leningrad Cowboys Meet Moses
synopsis: Living in Mexico with a top-ten hit under their belts, the Leningrad Cowboys have fallen on hard times. But when their manager, who has become a delusional self-proclaimed prophet, secures a gig for the band on Coney Island, they must illegally cross the Mexico-United States border to get there.

title: Leningrad Cowboys: These Boots
synopsis: The music video for “These Boots” by the Leningrad Cowboys. A history of Finland from 1952 to 1969, beginning with the birth of a Leningrad Cowboy, who soon discovers the joys of drinking, loving, and Finnish saunas.

title: León and Olvido
synopsis: Olvido is a twenty-one year old woman,  Leon, her brother, is almost the same age and has Down syndrome. Four or five years ago, they became orphaned, and the only inheritance was their rented house in which they are living and an old car.

title: Léon: The Professional
synopsis: Mathilda, 12, has an abusive father who stores drugs for corrupt police officers, and a mother who neglects her. Léon, her neighbour, works as a hired hitman for a mobster. When her family is murdered by a crooked agent, she joins forces with a reluctant Léon to learn his trade and take revenge.

title: Leonor Will Never Die
synopsis: Leonor Reyes, a former pioneer of Filipino action cinema, now struggles with ageing, debt, and her son’s death. After being struck by a falling TV, she’s knocked into a coma. In the hospital, fantasy and reality blur as she awakens inside her own story.

title: Leonora in the Morning Light
synopsis: In the early 1930s, painter Leonora Carrington, a rebel against social expectations, joins the surrealist movement and its iconic figures like André Breton and Salvador Dalí in Paris. A whirlwind love affair with artist Max Ernst confronts her with her inner demons.

title: Les choses simples
synopsis: Vincent is a famous successful entrepreneur. One day, a car breakdown on a mountain road temporarily interrupts his frantic lifestyle. Pierre, who lives apart from the modern world in the middle of sublime nature, comes to his aid and offers him his hospitality.

title: The Five Devils
synopsis: Vicky has a mysterious gift: she can recreate any scent she comes across, even that of her beloved mother Joanne. When her estranged aunt suddenly returns to town, the invocation of her fragrance plunges the young girl back in time to unravel a past replete with family secrets and queer romance.

title: Les Misérables
synopsis: Stéphane has recently joined the Anti-Crime Squad in Montfermeil, in the suburbs of Paris. Alongside his new colleagues, he quickly discovers tensions running high between local gangs. When they find themselves overrun during the course of an arrest, a drone captures the encounter.

title: Paris, 13th District
synopsis: A group of four loosely connected young adults alternate between being friends and sometimes lovers as they navigate their lively neighbourhood in the French capital’s 13th arrondissement.

title: Les vacances c'est la liberté
synopsis: A group of four young workers, caught up by a need for change, decide to head for the sea after a day of work. Elsewhere, farther away, a young woman, victim to solitude, wanders in the streets of Paris.

title: Lesbian Space Princess
genres: Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Sci-Fi, LGBTQ+
synopsis: Shy Princess Saira, raised by the queens of planet Clitopolis, spirals after her girlfriend Kiki leaves her. When Kiki is abducted by hostile outsiders, Saira has 24 hours to recover a missing royal weapon, crossing queer space, testing her independence, and forming an unexpected bond.

title: Lessons of Darkness
synopsis: Shortly after the Gulf War, oil fires were raging all through Kuwait. In the week before this sea of fire would be extinguished, Werner Herzog filmed this apocalyptic landscape with its murky skies, scorched earth and capricious flames.

title: Lesvia
synopsis: A sun-soaked, blissfully nostalgic yet impressively complex insight into the hidden stories of Lesbos, birthplace of Sappho and meeting place for lesbians since the 1970s.

title: Let the Bullets Fly
synopsis: In warlord-dominated China of the 1920s, notorious bandit Zhang descends upon a remote town posing as its new mayor, an identity he has hijacked from the former mayor, himself a small-time imposter. Hell-bent on making a fast buck, Zhang soon meets his match in the tyrannical local thug Wang.

title: Let the Sunshine In
synopsis: Isabelle is a successful painter living in Paris, whose apparent independence belies what she desires most: real romantic fulfillment. Isabelle reveals deep wells of yearning, vulnerability, and resilience as she tumbles into relationships with all the wrong men.

title: Let It Be Morning
synopsis: A Palestinian-born Israeli citizen receives an invitation to his brother’s wedding, requiring him to return to the Arab village where he grew up. After the wedding, with no explanation, his hometown is put under military lockdown by the government, and chaos erupts within the community.

title: Leto
synopsis: Leningrad, one summer in the 80s. Smuggling LPs by Lou Reed and T-Rex, the underground rock scene is thriving ahead of Perestroika. Musician Mike and his wife Natasha meet Viktor Tsoi, and a love triangle soon emerges. Together they will change the destiny of rock’n’roll in the Soviet Union.

title: Letter
synopsis: In a remote village in the Northwest of Russia, a psychiatric ward exists in an old wooden house. The place and its inhabitants seem to be untouched by civilization. But in this pristine setting, no articulate human voice is heard, and all pain is muted.

title: Letter from an Unknown Woman
synopsis: In turn-of-the-century Vienna, concert pianist Stefan Brandt recalls his relationship with Lisa when he receives a letter from her. The letter tells how Lisa fell in love with him as a girl, but was devastated when, after spending the night with him, he vanished from her life…

title: Letter from Siberia
synopsis: A traveler goes on a journey through the vast territory and isolated villages of Siberia, recording his observations on its people and places, wildlife and culture. Urbanization, reckless deforestation and the demise of the wooly mammoth all fall under his critical gaze.

title: Letters to Max
synopsis: A record of the epistolary encounter between French artist and filmmaker Eric Baudelaire and Maxim Gvinjia, former Foreign Minister of the breakaway Caucasian state of Abkhazia, Letters to Max is both a chronicle of a developing friendship and an ingenious and unusual essay film.

title: Leviathan
