synopsis: In a small coastal Russian town, Kolya decides to fight against the corrupt local officials who impose a compulsory purchase order on his land. He defiantly refuses to give up his home, and recruits a lawyer friend to help, but the man’s arrival brings further misfortune for Kolya and his family.

title: L'heure Exquise
synopsis: Filmmaker René Allio narrates the story of his family—Italian immigrants who came to work on Marseille’s construction sites. Against the backdrop of scenes from neighborhoods such as the Le Panier and La Belle de Mai, his voiceover recounts childhood memories and personal anecdotes from his city.

title: Liberal Arts
synopsis: Bookish and newly single Jesse Fisher returns to his alma mater for his favorite professor’s retirement dinner. A chance meeting with Zibby – a precocious classical music-loving sophomore – awakens in him long-dormant feelings of possibility and connection.

title: Liberté
synopsis: Just before the French Revolution, a group of libertines expelled from the court of Louis XVI flees for Germany, where they rendezvous with the legendary seducer and freethinker the Duc de Walchen. Their goal? Export libertinage, a philosophy centered on the rejection of morality and authority.

title: Lick the Star
synopsis: Kate has been absent from high school for a week due to a broken foot. Upon returning, she learns her clique of girlfriends has devised a secret plan with arsenic—codenamed “Lick the Star”—to make the boys weak.

title: Life
synopsis: In 1955, young Magnum photographer Dennis Stock is hired to photograph the rising Hollywood star James Dean during one of his movie shoots. As the pair travels from Los Angeles to New York City and Indiana, a close bond develops between them, just weeks before Dean’s untimely death.

title: And Life Goes On...
synopsis: A filmmaker drives with his son through the nightmarish chaos caused by the 1990 Iranian earthquake catastrophe. They are searching for two young actors from a movie the director made a few years ago. While on their journey, they discover a resilient community pressing on in the face of tragedy.

title: Life Is Not a Competition, But I'm Winning
synopsis: If history is written by the victors, where does that leave those who were never allowed to be part of the game? A collective of queer athletes enters the Olympic Stadium in Athens and sets out to honour those who were excluded from standing on the winners’ podium.

title: Life Is Sweet
synopsis: Just north of London live Wendy, Andy, and their twenty-something twins, Natalie and Nicola. Wendy clerks in a shop, Andy is a cook who forever puts off home remodeling projects, Natalie is a plumber and Nicola is jobless. This film is about how they interact and play out family, conflict and love.

title: Life Span of the Object in Frame (A Film About the Film Not Yet Shot)
synopsis: Choosing photography as his subject and memory as a guide, the director finds himself trapped in a labyrinth. Engaged in a back and forth between theoretical meditations and visual flashes, he winds through the image-filled maze, encountering an angel, Dante, Muybridge’s sequences and much more.

title: Lifelong
synopsis: Ela and Can seemingly have it all. Yet in this affluent section of Istanbul, love turns to suspicion, success delivers only material comfort and truth keeps playing hide-and-seek.

title: Light in the Tropics
synopsis: A film like a monument: a tribute to the rich greens of the Amazon and the forests of New England in winter, celebrating the indigenous peoples of both Americas and flowing as a film as freely as a winding river.

title: Lights from Afar
synopsis: After reunification, a young photographer from East Berlin enjoys his new-found freedom. But soon he feels constrained by the new order in which financial success is the only measure of success. Paralyzed as an artist, he watches as his hometown transforms into an international metropolis.

title: Lights in the Dusk
synopsis: Outcast by his co-workers and living alone, Koistinen is a security guard who works the night shift in a luxury shopping mall in Helsinki. But when icy blonde Mirja approaches him, the lonely Koistinen falls helplessly for her, unaware she is manipulating him for her criminal boyfriend.

title: Like a Boss
synopsis:
Two female friends with very different ideals decide to start a beauty company together. One is more practical, while the other wants to earn her fortune and live a lavish lifestyle.
(Also known as Limited Partners.)

title: Like Father, Like Son
synopsis: One day, Ryota and his wife get an unexpected phone call from the hospital. Keita, the six-year-old boy they have raised, is not their son. The news is hard to take for stern businessman Ryota. He meets his actual child, Ryusei, who has been brought up in a poorer, but more loving environment.

title: Like in Uruguay
synopsis: The story is about a trio-two women and one man-who abduct the CEO of the Deutsche Telekom (played by Knepperges) in order to get his communication company to revert back to the country’s traditional public yellow phone booths, which they had replaced with more modem, pink ones.

title: Like Someone in Love
synopsis: In Tokyo, sociology student Akiko works nights as a high-class sex worker. Instead of studying for her exams, she reluctantly goes to her new client, retired sociology professor Takashi. However, when Takashi drives Akiko to her university the next day, they strike up an odd role-playing routine.

title: Lilting
synopsis: The world of a Chinese mother mourning the untimely death of her son is suddenly disrupted by the presence of a stranger who doesn’t speak her language. Through a translator, they piece together memories of a man they both loved dearly.

title: Limbo
synopsis: An offbeat observation of the refugee experience. On a fictional remote Scottish island, a group of new arrivals await the results of their asylum claims. Among them is Omar, a young Syrian musician burdened by the weight of his grandfather’s oud, which he has carried all the way from his homeland.

title: Bardo, False Chronicle of a Handful of Truths
synopsis: Silverio is a renowned Mexican journalist and documentary filmmaker living in Los Angeles, who, after being named the recipient of a prestigious international award, is compelled to return to his native country, unaware that this simple trip will push him to an existential limit.

title: Lingui, The Sacred Bonds
synopsis: On the outskirts of the capital of Chad, determined single mother Amina works tirelessly to provide for herself and her 15-year old daughter Maria. When Amina discovers Maria is pregnant and does not want a child, the two women begin to seek out an abortion, condemned by both religion and law.

title: Lips of Blood
synopsis: When a photograph of a decrepit seaside château evokes a childhood vision of an encounter with a mysterious girl, Frederick is compelled to investigate. Soon, he uncovers a surreal and erotic netherworld of vampirism from which he might never return.

title: Listen Up Philip
synopsis: As Philip awaits the publication of his second novel, he feels pushed out of his adopted home city by the constant noise and a deteriorating relationship with his girlfriend Ashley. When Philip’s idol offers his summer home as a refuge, he finally gets to focus on his favorite subject: himself.

title: Little Big Soldier
synopsis: In the aftermath of a great battle between rival kingdoms, only two men remain standing: a peasant soldier and a warrior prince, who has been wounded fighting for his country. Tempted by the chance to collect a large reward, the soldier overpowers the prince and sets off to collect his bounty.

title: Little Fugitive
director: Morris Engel, Ray Ashley, Ruth Orkin
synopsis: When the seven-year-old Joey is cruelly tricked into believing he killed his older brother, he flees to New York’s nether wonderland: Coney Island. Upon and beneath the crowded boardwalk, Joey experiences a day and night filled with adventures and mysteries.

title: Little Girl
synopsis: 7-year-old Sasha has always known that she is a girl. Sasha’s family has recently accepted her gender identity, embracing their daughter for who she truly is while working to confront outdated norms and find affirmation in a small community of rural France.

title: Little Joe
synopsis: Single mother Alice is a dedicated plant breeder at a corporation engaged in developing new species. She has engineered a special crimson flower: if kept at the ideal temperature and spoken to regularly, it makes its owner happy. Against company policy, Alice takes one home for her teenage son, Joe.

title: Little Men
synopsis: 13-year-old Jake befriends Tony, raised by his mother Leonor. When feud ignites between the parents—Brian and Kathy and Leonor—the boys remain silent against their parents in protest.

title: Little Otik
synopsis: When a childless couple learn that they cannot have children, the man finds a piece of root in the backyard and chops it into the shape of a child. The woman takes the root as her baby which comes to life, but its appetite is much greater than a normal child.

title: Little Women
synopsis: Determined to make her own way in the 1860s, a writer looks back at the tough yet tender times spent with her three spirited sisters and a close friend.

title: Live Flesh
synopsis: Víctor falls hard for Elena, but she doesn’t reciprocate his feelings. She does, however, have feelings for David, a policeman who arrives to break up an argument between her and Víctor. That encounter however takes an unexpected turn that leads these characters down a dark, twisty path.

title: Living
synopsis: London, 1953. Civil servant William is a cog within the city’s bureaucracy. Buried under paperwork at the office and lonely at home, his life has long felt empty. However, when he receives a shattering medical diagnosis, he is forced to act to try and grasp fulfilment before it goes beyond reach.

title: Living Still Life
synopsis: In a world in decay, Fièvre, an enigmatic woman, collects dead animals. She brings them to life by filming them and creating animated films. However, one day, a man comes to see Fièvre. He has a request for her regarding his dead wife…

title: Lizard
synopsis: Lagos. Unsettled by a vague sense of imminent danger, an eight-year-old is sent out of Sunday school for what is framed as idle distraction. Outside the church’s walls, she encounters an animalistic world of hypocrite adults and dereliction, where her premonitions begin to unfold.

title: A Lizard in a Woman's Skin
synopsis: Carol Hammond, a married upper-class woman and daughter of a prominent lawyer, experiences disturbing LSD-induced hallucinations in which she imagines wild orgies hosted by her alluring actress neighbor. When the neighbor is found dead under mysterious circumstances, Carol becomes the prime suspect.

title: Lola
synopsis: Roland, a bored young man, meets Lola, a woman he was in love with during his teens. Now a cabaret dancer and a devoted single mother, Lola hopes the father of her child, who deserted during her pregnancy, will return. Roland finds himself falling back in love with her.

title: Lola
synopsis: 1940, Thom and Mars have built a machine, LOLA, that can intercept radio and TV broadcasts from the future.

title: Lola Pater
synopsis: After his mother’s death, 27-year-old Zino decides to go looking for his father, Farid, who disappeared 25 years earlier. He learns that Farid is living in the south of France and that his parents never got divorced. But when he arrives there, instead of Farid he finds Lola, a belly dancing teacher.

title: London River
synopsis: After travelling to London to check on their missing children in the wake of the 2005 terror attack on the city, two strangers come to discover their respective children had been living together at the time of the attacks.

title: Long Day's Journey Into Night
synopsis: Luo Hongwu returns to Kaili, the hometown from which he fled many years before, to find himself musing on the past and trying to retrieve its traces. Back for his father’s funeral, Luo recalls the death of an old friend, Wildcat, and searches for lost love Wan Qiwen, who continues to haunt him.

title: Long Distance Relationship
synopsis: A man has an obsessive fantasy of having sex with extraterrestrial beings. His quest leads him to Brazil, where he enters into an alien phone sex program to edge him closer to his out-of-this-world desires.

title: Longing
synopsis: Markus is a metalworker and volunteer firefighter in his early thirties, married to his childhood sweetheart Ella, who works a few hours a week as a home help and sings in the choir. However, when Markus falls for an attractive waitress from a nearby town, their lives are turned upside down.

title: Longlegs
synopsis: An FBI agent gets assigned to the unsolved case of an elusive serial killer. As the case takes complex turns, unearthing evidence of the occult, she discovers a personal connection to the merciless killer and must race against time to stop him before he claims the lives of another innocent family.

title: Look Into My Eyes
synopsis: A group of New York City psychics conduct deeply intimate readings for their clients, revealing a kaleidoscope of loneliness, connection, and healing.

title: Loose Cannons
synopsis: Tommaso is the youngest son and soon-to-be partner of an Italian pasta tycoon. On a trip home from Rome, where he studies literature and lives with his boyfriend, Tommaso decides to tell his parents the truth about both his sexuality and his life plans. But his older brother Antonio ruins his plans.

title: Lore
synopsis: After being abandoned by their Nazi parents at the end of World War II, five German siblings embark on a harrowing journey across their war-torn country. Led by the eldest, 14 year-old Lore, the children are forced to confront their parents’ actions and the reality of a new world.

title: Loro
synopsis: Sergio is a guileful businessman who manages a group of young escorts that he uses to bribe local politicians and authority figures. With a desire for increased political leverage, he works his way into the ranks of a man with a notorious taste for both hedonism and corruption: Silvio Berlusconi.

title: The Delinquents
synopsis: Bank employee Morán schemes to steal enough money to liberate himself from corporate monotony, then confess and serve prison time while his co-worker hides the cash. Soon under pressure by a company investigator, accomplice Román later encounters a mysterious woman who will transform him forever.

title: Sundays
synopsis: When Ainara announces that she wants to become a nun, chaos arises in her family. Is this a genuine desire or has she been influenced by the religious staff at her school? Or is this life-changing decision due to her father’s inattention and her mother’s absence?

title: Los Reyes
synopsis: Chola and Football, two charismatic dogs, live in a skate park in Santiago, Chile. The park brings together teenagers from different social and cultural backgrounds. From the dogs’ perspectives, stories of adolescence unfold, revealing experiences of love, school, and the pains of growing up.

title: Lost and Beautiful
synopsis: Pulcinella, a foolish servant, is sent to present-day Campania to grant the last wish of shepherd Tommaso: he must rescue a young buffalo called Sarchiapone. In the Royal Palace of Carditello,  the ruins of which were once looked after by Tommaso, Pulcinella finds the buffalo and leads him North.

title: Lost Highway
synopsis: Fred Madison, a musician, starts receiving mysterious VHS tapes of him and his wife in their home and is tortured by the idea that his wife is having an affair. After being suddenly convicted of her murder, he inexplicably disappears and is replaced by a young mechanic leading a different life.

title: Lost in the Post
synopsis: An experiment in the possibilities and impossibilities of communication, refuge, and love in the era of digital connection.

title: Lost in Transition
synopsis: The life of a family takes an unexpected turn when they recieve an official notice about a highway that will be passing through their son’s bedroom. And so begins the fantastic transformation of their house and life.

title: Lost in Translation
synopsis: A disenchanted movie star connects with an equally adrift newlywed in a hotel bar in Tokyo. Crossing the language and custom barriers around them, the two bond deeply over the multidimensional mysteries and marvels of an atmospheric Tokyo, and life itself.

title: Laapataa Ladies
synopsis: It’s a jolly mess when two young brides get lost from a train. Set in 2001, somewhere in rural India.

title: Lou Reed's Berlin
synopsis: A searing song cycle about two lovers going to pieces in the shadow of the Berlin Wall, Lou Reed’s Berlin was greeted by a chorus of rebuke upon its release in 1973. In, 2006, Reed played the album live for the first time, taking a five-night stand at St. Ann’s Warehouse in Brooklyn, New York.

title: Louder Than Bombs
synopsis: The fractious family of a father and his two sons confront their different feelings and memories of their deceased wife and mother, a famed war photographer. Three years after her unexpected death, when an unsettling secret resurfaces, the three men are forced to look at each other in a new light.

title: Louder Than You Think
synopsis: Gary Young, the unpredictable first drummer of Pavement, brought a chaotic energy that shaped the band’s early sound and trajectory. Archival footage and present-day scenes chart his wild ride from lo-fi pioneer to aging survivor—still drumming, still defying expectations.

title: Love
synopsis: Murphy listens to his voicemail: Electra’s mother wants to know whether he has heard from her daughter, now missing for a long time. Murphy finds himself alone in his apartment, reminiscing about the greatest love affair of his life—a burning passion full of promises, games, excesses, and mistakes.

title: Love Affair
synopsis: Irene Dunne and Charles Boyer are chic strangers who fall in love aboard an ocean liner bound for NYC. Though they are both involved with other people, they intend to reconnect six months later at the top of the Empire State Building—until the hand of fate throws their affair tragically off course.

title: Love and Anarchy
synopsis: Tunin, a freckle-faced farm boy, becomes an accidental anarchist and is sent to kill Mussolini. His contact in Rome is Salomè, a sex worker with her own sob story. While they prepare for the assassination, Tunin falls in love with Tripolina, which threatens the entire operation.

title: Love and Anger
director: Marco Bellocchio, Bernardo Bertolucci, Pier Paolo Pasolini, Jean-Luc Godard, Carlo Lizzani, Elda Tattoli
synopsis: New Testament parables and gospels are retold in contemporary settings. In New York, people ignore others needing help. In Rome, a cheerful, innocent young man walking a city street during a time of war pays a price for this innocence. Elsewhere, striking students take over a university classroom.

title: Love & Friendship
synopsis: Young widow Susan Vernon visits her in-laws’ estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass. While there, she decides to secure a husband for herself and her reluctant daughter. Enlisting the help of an old friend, she attracts the attention of many interesting men.

title: Love at Sea
synopsis: A young Parisian woman falls in love with a sailor she meets on holiday. Whilst the summer brings them together, the autumn pulls them apart. They continue to write to each other but live separate lives, he in Brest with his friends, her in Paris waiting to see him again.

title: Love, Deutschmarks and Death
synopsis: The German Federal Republic’s 1961 recruitment agreement with Turkey not only brought workers, but also their music. The stories of the band Derdiyoklar, Radio Yılmaz, protest rocker Cem Karaca’s German exile, and many more are testament to the unique liveliness of Turkish music in Germany.

title: Love in the City
director: Michelangelo Antonioni, Federico Fellini, Alberto Lattuada, Carlo Lizzani, Francesco Maselli, Dino Risi, Cesare Zavattini
synopsis: Six separate episodes exploring themes of love, sex and romance in the Italian capital. A provincial dance hall. An investigative reporter posing as a husband-to-be. A young unwed mother. Girl-watching techniques of Italian men. A glimpse into prostitution.

title: Love Lies Bleeding
synopsis: A reclusive gym manager falls hard for an ambitious bodybuilder headed through town to Las Vegas in pursuit of her dream. However, their love ignites violence, pulling them deep into the web of her criminal family.

title: Love Life
synopsis: Taeko and Jiro live together with six-year-old Keita, from Taeko’s first marriage. Also living in the same building are Jiro’s parents, whose disdain for their son having married a divorcee is all too evident. When a birthday party goes horribly awry, long-suppressed recriminations surface.

title: Love Me Forever or Never
synopsis: Young and recently separated couple meet in a modern house and start discussing their past relationship.

title: Love Me If You Dare
synopsis: Best friends Julien and Sophie continue an odd game they started playing as children—a fearless competition to outdo one another. As the pranks become more and more dangerous, the pair realise that the game is a way of hiding their true feelings for each other.

title: Love Meetings
synopsis: Pier Paolo Pasolini travels throughout Italy, from the factories to the beaches, and interviews passersby about their attitudes toward sex. He questions them, mic in hand, on a wide range of topics: the importance of sex in everyday life, prostitution, homosexuality, and the legalization of divorce.

title: Love on the Run
synopsis: Antoine Doinel, now in his thirties, is amicably divorcing his wife, Christine, while enjoying success as a novelist and still clinging to his romantic fantasies. After falling for a record store clerk, the indecisive Antoine impulsively takes off with an old flame and confronts his chaotic past.

title: Love Rites
synopsis: Vain clothing buyer Hugo meets beautiful Myriam on the subway and pursues her, discovering to his delight that she’s a sex worker. The crafty Myriam, of course, has more in mind for their encounter than smug Hugo bargained for.

title: Love Songs
synopsis: Julie lives with her boyfriend Ismaël, and rather than worry about the time he spends with his colleague Alice, Julie invites Alice to join them. The delicate balance of their idyllic world is threatened when tragedy strikes, challenging them to keep love alive through loss and mourning.

title: Love, Women and Flowers
synopsis: What’s the cost of producing beauty? In the 1970s, foreign companies turned the Bogotá savanna into a flower industry hub, exploiting cheap labor and heavy pesticide use, causing serious health issues and even deaths among the 70,000 women working in the fields.

title: Loveless
synopsis: Zhenya and Boris are going through a divorce marked by resentment and frustration. Already embarking on new lives, they are impatient to turn the page—even if that means threatening to abandon their 12-year-old son Alyosha. But, after witnessing one of their fights, Alyosha disappears.

title: Lovely Rita
synopsis: Rita is a wilful and unruly teenager on the verge of womanhood. Her sexual awakening leads her to intimacy with a young schoolboy and an older bus driver. Rita’s efforts to break out of her solitude and claustrophobic environment isolate her even more until, one day, she crosses the line.

title: Lover for a Day
synopsis: After a bad breakup, the only place 23-year-old Jeanne has to stay in Paris is the flat of her father. But when Jeanne arrives, she finds that his new girlfriend has moved in too: Arianne, a young woman her own age. Each is looking for their own kind of love in a city filled with possibilities.

title: Loving Couples
synopsis: In 1915, three pregnant women from varying social background enter a maternity ward. Cue a swirl of perspective-shifting flashbacks that illuminate the divergent yet interconnected experiences that have brought them there—coming to a head during one lavish, debauched Midsommar celebration.

title: Lúcio Flávio
synopsis: In the 1960s, a vigilante group called Esquadrão da Morte fights crime outside the law. Lúcio Flávio, a notorious bank robber in Rio de Janeiro, tries to change his life in Belo Horizonte. But he faces a predetermined destiny.

title: Lucky
synopsis: Having out-lived and out-smoked all of his contemporaries, the cantankerous, fiercely independent and self-reliant 90-year-old atheist Lucky finds himself at the precipice of life, thrust into a journey of self-exploration, leading towards that which is so often unattainable: enlightenment.

title: Lucky Grandma
synopsis: In New York’s Chinatown, 80-year-old Grandma, a feisty and independent widow, visits a casino after a fortune teller predicts good luck. But when her gamble backfires, she attracts gangsters’ attention. To protect herself, she hires a bodyguard from a rival gang, sparking a Chinatown gang war.

title: Lunana: A Yak in the Classroom
synopsis: When Ugyen is posted to a school in the remote village of Lunana, he is disheartened to find a simple yak herding community lacking basic amenities. But the enthusiasm of his students and the warmth of the village folk buoy his spirits and he must decide if he wants to stay in the captivating land.

title: The World of Jacques Demy
synopsis: In tribute to her late husband Jacques Demy, filmmaker Agnès Varda honors his life and artistic legacy by weaving together film clips, archival footage, and interviews with collaborators such as Michel Legrand, Catherine Deneuve, Jeanne Moreau, and Harrison Ford.

title: Lurker
synopsis: When a twenty-something retail clerk encounters a rising pop star, he takes the opportunity to edge his way into the in-crowd. But as the line between friend and fan blurs beyond recognition, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

title: Lux Æterna
synopsis: Charlotte Gainsbourg agrees to play a witch thrown to the stake in the first film directed by Béatrice Dalle. However, the anarchic organization, technical problems, and psychotic slip-ups gradually plunge the filming into a chaos of pure light.

title: Luz
synopsis: A young cabdriver, Luz, stumbles into a police station on a rainy night. As a psychiatrist hypnotizes her to retrace her past, a demonic entity that longs for her slips into the session, blurring memory and possession with dangerous consequences.

title: LYNCH (one)
synopsis: Compiled from over two years of footage, the film is an intimate portrait of David Lynch’s creative process as he completes his latest film, Inland Empire.

title: Lynch2
synopsis: Short film by blackANDwhite, featuring behind-the-scenes footage from the making of INLAND EMPIRE.

title: M. Hulot's Holiday
synopsis: Monsieur Hulot goes on a holiday to a seaside resort, but accidents and misunderstandings follow him wherever he goes. The peace and quiet of the hotel guests don’t last very long with Hulot around, because although his actions are in good faith, they always turn out catastrophically for everybody.

title: The Student
synopsis: Teenager Veniamin studies the Bible obsessively and comes to believe that the world is nearing its end. His studies lead him on a path to religious fanaticism, drawing him into conflict with his mother, his classmates and his biology teacher Elena, who will alone challenge him on his own ground.

title: Macbeth
synopsis: Macbeth, the Thane of Glamis, receives a prophecy from a trio of witches that one day he will become King of Scotland. Consumed by ambition and spurred to action by his wife, Macbeth commits a treasonous act and takes the throne for himself.

title: Machete Maidens Unleashed!
synopsis: Fast moving odyssey into the subterranean world of the rarely explored province of Filipino genre films of ’70s and ’80s, when low-budget exploitation-film producers were free to make nearly any kind of film they wanted with karate-kicking midgets, paper-mache monsters, and busty babes with blades!

title: Machine Gun McCain
synopsis: After serving 12 years behind bars for armed robbery, tough guy Hank McCain finds himself the pawn of a ruthless mob runt’s rebellion against a high level don.

title: Mad Bills to Pay (or Destiny, dile que no soy malo)
synopsis: Rico’s summer is a wild mix of chasing girls and selling homemade cocktails out of a cool box on Orchard Beach in the Bronx. But when circumstances force his teenage girlfriend Destiny to move in with his family, his carefree days come to an end.

title: Mad Detective
synopsis: The film centers on Bun (Lau Ching-Wan), a schizophrenic, former police inspector who comes out of retirement to help a rookie detective (Andy On) solve a complex murder case, involving a missing colleague and a suspected policeman (Lam Ka-Tung) suffering from a multiple personality disorder.

title: Madame
synopsis: An elderly piano teacher, diagnosed with terminal cancer, fears not death, but who will care for her beloved cat. As she searches for someone to help, she faces the harsh realities of a changing Istanbul and a clash of generations, confronting the unsettling shifts of modern life.

title: Madame Bovary
synopsis: Bored with the tedious nature of provincial life in 19th-century France, the fierce Emma Bovary finds herself in calamitous debt and pursues scandalous sexual liaisons with absolute abandon. However, when her volatile lifestyle catches up to her, the lives of everyone around her are endangered.

title: Mädchen in Uniform
synopsis: After being sent to a strict Prussian all-girls boarding school, Manuela is drawn out of her shell by the young and empathetic teacher Elizabeth von Bernburg. But when Manuela starts to fall in love with her kind-hearted teacher, a scandal erupts and rocks the school’s very foundation.

title: Made in England: The Films of Powell and Pressburger
synopsis: Martin Scorsese celebrates the enduring legacy of visionary writer-directors Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger—two of British cinema’s greatest filmmakers. With a treasure trove of clips and rare archival footage, Scorsese investigates the duo’s bold genius and colossal impact on cinema history.

title: Madeinusa
synopsis: Madeinusa is a girl who lives in an isolated village in the mountains of Peru. This strange place is characterized by its religious fervor, and seemingly odd custom: from Good Friday at three o’clock in the afternoon to Easter Sunday, the whole village can do whatever it feels like.

title: The Crime Is Mine
synopsis: In the 1930s in Paris, Madeleine Verdier, a young, penniless, and talentless actress, is accused of the murder of a famous producer. Helped by her best friend Pauline, a young lawyer, she is acquitted on the grounds of self-defence. A new life of fame and success begins, until the truth comes out.

title: Madeleine Collins
synopsis: Judith leads a double life with two families: raising a daughter with one partner in Switzerland, and another two sons in France. With a decision needing to be made on which life she wants to choose, Judith decides to run away from it all while the situation spirals out of control.

title: Madeline's Madeline
synopsis: Sixteen-year-old Madeline has become an active member of an experimental theatre troupe. When its ambitious director pushes Madeline to weave her rich interior world and her troubled relationship with her mother into their collective art, the lines between performance and reality begin to blur.

title: Madonnas
synopsis: After being neglected as a child, Rita gives birth to six children of her own and challenges her mother to act as a parent to her grandchildren. Rita is sent to prison, and upon her release, she takes back her kids. With the aid of Marc—a US soldier—she develops something of a normal family life.

title: Parallel Mothers
synopsis: Janis and Ana meet in a hospital before giving birth. Both are single and became pregnant by accident. Janis, middle-aged, doesn’t regret it. Adolescent Ana is scared. A close link between the two blossoms, which develops into a complex relationship that will change their lives in a decisive way.

title: Magallanes
synopsis: A struggling taxi driver, once a soldier, receives help from his former superior officer. A woman from his army days unknowingly reveals something that alters his perspective.

title: Magdalena Viraga
synopsis: In east Los Angeles, Ida is a sex worker who is accused of killing a client. She is dragged into a prison overseen by nuns and shadows of the crucifix. However, the other prison is her inner life. She battles at the walls which surround her—both material and psychic.

title: Maggie's Plan
synopsis: Maggie is a thirty-something New Yorker who, without success in finding love, decides now is the time to have a child on her own. But when she meets John, a married novelist, Maggie falls in love. Maggie kickstarts a new plan that catapults her into a nervy love triangle with John and his wife…

title: Magic Farm
synopsis: When a misguided American documentary crew in search of their next viral segment ends up in the wrong town in rural Argentina, chaos ensues. As they collaborate with locals to fake a new music trend, unexpected relationships form and an unfolding health crisis becomes apparent.

title: Magnificent Obsession
synopsis: Reckless playboy Bob Merrick crashes his speedboat, requiring emergency attention from the town’s only resuscitator, while Dr. Phillips dies waiting for the life-saving device. Merrick then tries to right his wrongs with the doctor’s widow, Helen, falling in love with her in the process.

title: Mainstream
synopsis: In West Hollywood, California, young filmmaker Frankie thinks she’s found a path to internet stardom when she starts making YouTube videos with  Link, a charismatic stranger living off the grid. However, the dark side of viral celebrity soon threatens to ruin them both.

title: Maison du Bonheur
synopsis: In 30 carefully constructed segments, Maison du bonheur paints an endearing picture of the everyday life of 77-year-old Juliane Sellam, a long-time resident of Paris. Alone in her Montmartre apartment, Sellam enjoys the little things in life.

title: Majonezë
synopsis: Ersekë, Albania. Elyria lives with her family following the strict rules imposed by her father, hiding her anger with obedience. A powerful desire for rebellion grows in her day by day that will lead her to the fulfillment of a bitter but necessary act of revolution.

title: Majority
synopsis: Mertkan drifts through an aimless life in Istanbul, working at his father’s construction firm, loitering in malls with friends, and cruising the city in a 4×4. Wrapped in comfort and routine, he feels no urgency to confront the emptiness beneath it all.

title: Making Mr. Right
synopsis: Scientist Dr Jeff Peters has invented a robotic clone of himself, named Ulysses. When his company hires top image-maker Frankie Stone to train the robot in human behaviour, it isn’t long before she’s imbued him with all the feelings and sentiments that make him the man of her dreams.

title: Mala Noche
synopsis: In Portland, a young store clerk named Walt falls for Johnny, a Mexican migrant worker. Despite the language barrier and Johnny’s indifference, Walt pursues him, drawing himself into a tangled web of desire, frustration, and fleeting connection on the city’s fringes.

title: Malaikottai Vaaliban
synopsis: Follows the life of a legendary man whose struggles and life pave the way for next generations.

title: Malcolm X
synopsis: Biographical epic of the controversial and influential Black Nationalist leader, from his early life and career as a small-time gangster, to his ministry as a member of the Nation of Islam and his eventual assassination.

title: Mambar Pierrette
synopsis: Douala, Cameroon. A long line of customers comes to Pierrette to prepare their clothes for upcoming social events and ceremonies. More than a seamstress, she is the confidant of her customers and community. But when rain threatens to flood her workshop, Pierrette will struggle to stay afloat.

title: Mami Wata
synopsis: When the harmony in a village is threatened by outside elements, two sisters must fight to save their people and restore the glory of a mermaid goddess to the land.

title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
synopsis: In this sequel to Mamma Mia!, Sophie learns about her mother’s past while pregnant herself.

title: Mamma Roma
synopsis: In postwar Rome, Mamma is ready to give up her life as a sex worker and bring her son Ettore to live with her in the city. She moves to a respectable neighborhood, hoping that Ettore will go to school, get a good job, and marry. But Ettore is lazy, taking for granted the gains his mother provides.

title: Man on Wire
synopsis: This Oscar-winning documentary depicts the “artistic crime of the century” in which French tightrope walker Philippe Petit performed a brave, illegal high-wire walk between the World Trade Center’s twin towers in New York City in 1974.

title: Man with a Movie Camera
synopsis: 24 hours in the life of the inhabitants of a large city. From dawn to dusk, his device perched on his tripod, the man with a movie camera records and captures the hustle and bustle of an ordinary day.

title: Manakamana
synopsis: High above the jungle in Nepal, pilgrims go on an ancient journey, travelling by cable car to reach the Manakamana temple. Qualified as a remarkable formal experiment, it is also a flat out marvellous and wildly funny kind of a ride.

title: Manchester by the Sea
synopsis: After the death of his older brother, Joe, Lee Chandler is shocked that Joe has made him sole guardian of his teenage nephew. Lee reluctantly returns to Manchester-by-the-Sea. There, he is forced to deal with a past that separated him from his wife, and the community where he was born and raised.

title: Mandabi
synopsis: In Dakar, Ibrahima receives a letter containing a money order from his nephew, a street sweeper in Paris. The news spread fast in his neighbourhood, with several parties interested in their cut of the money. Ibrahima attempts to get his money through the absurd and corrupt Senegalese bureaucracy.

title: Manderlay
synopsis: After leaving Dogville, Grace and her father discover an Alabama plantation whose inhabitants live as if slavery had never been abolished. Grace, feeling a sense of duty to the people behind the heavy gates, stays to liberate the slaves and see them through their first harvest.

title: Mandibles
synopsis: When Manu is hired to deliver a mysterious box, he takes Jean-Gab along for the ride. But when the simple-minded friends find a giant fly trapped in the boot of a car they stole, they name it Dominique—and decide to train it in the hope of making a ton of cash.

title: Mandy
synopsis: Pacific Northwest, 1983 AD. Outsiders Red Miller and Mandy Bloom lead a loving and peaceful existence. When their pine-scented haven is savagely destroyed by a cult led by the sadistic Jeremiah Sand, Red is catapulted into a phantasmagoric journey filled with bloody vengeance and laced with fire.

title: Manhunter
synopsis: FBI criminal profiler Will Graham is called out of early retirement to assist on a deadly case involving a murderer known as the “Tooth Fairy.” After enlisting the help of imprisoned serial killer Dr. Hannibal Lecktor, Graham and the FBI are soon entangled in a menacing cat-and-mouse game…

title: Maniac
synopsis: Just when the streets seemed safe, a serial killer with a fetish for scalps is back and on the hunt in this 3D remake of the 1980 cult classic. Frank is the withdrawn owner of a mannequin store, but his life changes when he has unleashed a long-repressed compulsion to stalk and kill.

title: Manifesto
synopsis: Cate Blanchett portrays 13 distinct characters, including a homeless man, an anchorwoman, a factory worker and a corporate CEO. All of them in vignettes that incorporate timeless manifestos of the nineteenth and twentieth century, ranging from Communism to Dogme 95 and Pop Art.

title: Manta Ray
synopsis: Near a coastal village of Thailand, a local fisherman rescues a stranger, who does not speak a word, offers him his friendship and names him Thongchai. When the fisherman suddenly disappears at sea, Thongchai slowly begins to take over his friend’s life—his house, his job and his marriage.

title: Manufraktur
synopsis: Using found footage from commercials showing mainly women’s legs and cars, a tangled network of movements is woven, broken out of the found footage, and compiled anew. Discharged from all its semantic burden, what remains is a self-sufficient swarm of splinters, fleeting vectors of lost direction.

title: Maps to the Stars
synopsis: In Hollywood, Agatha leaves her psychiatric hospital and rocks the lives of the wealthy Weiss family. Making up the dynasty is patriarch Stafford, a psychotherapist whose self-help books have made him a fortune, and mother Cristina who manages son Benjie, 13, a child star fresh out of drug rehab.

title: Mar
synopsis: Martín goes on vacation with his girlfriend to Villa Gesell, an Argentinian beach. Everything seems normal and stable, until his mother’s arrival. Lightning strikes, and soon they need to make a car disappear.

title: Diego Maradona
synopsis: In 1984 Diego Maradona arrived in Naples and all hell broke loose. The world’s most celebrated football genius and Europe’s most dysfunctional city were a perfect match for each other. Diego could do as he pleased whilst performing miracles, but when the magic faded he became a prisoner of the city.

title: Mardaani 2
synopsis: Shivani Shivaji Roy locks horns with the devil incarnate, a young & remorseless serial killer who is raping & murdering young women.

title: Margin Call
synopsis: Ahead of the 2008 financial crisis, investment firm analyst Peter Sullivan uncovers sensitive information that could plunge the entire business into peril. Over the next 24 hours, Sullivan realizes that the decisions he makes will affect not only his colleagues but the lives of everyday Americans.

title: Maria
synopsis: After years in the public eye, legendary opera singer Maria Callas withdraws to her Paris apartment, grappling with memories from a tumultuous life.

title: Marie Antoinette
synopsis: In 1770, Marie Antoinette, an Austrian archduchess, weds a French royal. Pressured to bear an heir to the French throne, she is ill at ease at the royal court and unready for a gory anti-royal revolt.

title: Mariner of the Mountains
synopsis: Filmmaker Karim Aïnouz decides to take a boat, cross the Mediterranean and embark on his first journey to Algeria. Accompanied by the memory of his mother, Iracema, and his camera, Aïnouz gives a detailed account of the journey to his father’s homeland, interweaving present, past, and future.

title: Mario
synopsis: A story of love and heart break, on and off the pitch, for two young football players.

title: Mario's War
synopsis: The juvenile court assigns nine-year-old Mario to the care of Giulia and Sandro, a childless couple in their forties. Used to a life of abuse, little Mario is now spoiled and pampered by his new parents. Meanwhile, Giulia finds joy as a mother, but Mario has trouble fitting into this new reality.

title: Marius and Jeannette
synopsis: Marius is the keeper of an abandoned cement works staying high above the quarter of l’Estaque in Marseilles. Jeannette is bringing up her two children alone with her poor checkout operator salary. Their meeting won’t be without trouble.

title: Marjorie Prime
synopsis: In the near future, a service that creates holographic projections has provided 86-year-old Marjorie with a handsome representation of her dead husband. This AI recreation feeds the story of her life back to her in case the widow, who has the beginning of Alzheimer’s disease, forgets her past.

title: Marriage Story
synopsis: This portrait of a marriage breaking up and a family staying together draws the rapid tangling and gradual untangling of impetuosity, resentment, and abiding love between a married couple (actor Nicole and playwright Charlie) negotiating their divorce and the custody of their son.

title: Married to the Mob
synopsis: After her mafioso husband is murdered, Angela moves to New York City to start afresh, severing her ties with the Long Island mob. When the don of her husband’s crime family begins to pursue her romantically, Angela is placed under surveillance by FBI agent Mike, who quickly falls for her too.

title: Marseille
synopsis: Young photographer Sophie swaps apartments to get away from Berlin. Alone in Marseille, she struggles to capture its essence until an encounter with a local mechanic, Pierre, helps her find her footing. The more she surrenders to the bustling city, the more impossible her former life begins to feel.

title: Martha
synopsis: Martha is a 75-year old woman who lives alone in a social interest house in the outskirts of Mexico City. When she decides to end her life, Martha’s thrilling journey towards death will surprisingly lead her, for the first time, to life.

title: Martin Eden
synopsis: Martin is a self-taught proletarian with artistic aspirations who hopes that his dreams of becoming a writer will help him rise above his station and marry a wealthy young university student. His dissatisfactions of working-class toil and bourgeois success lead to political awakening.

title: Marty Supreme
synopsis: In Manhattan’s backstreets, shoe clerk Marty dreams beyond his uncle’s shop, chasing a table tennis career after hours in smoky competition halls. Short on money, he turns to lies, stolen cash, and reckless alliances, betting relationships and morals on a fragile chance at fame.

title: Mary is Happy, Mary is Happy
synopsis: A cheerful title for a playful, jittery film. The story that emerges is that of Mary, who is grappling with the the vicissitudes of life in her senior year of secondary school. Confused, but incredibly witty, fun and very freely acted. A Twitter comedy.

title: Mary, Mary, Bloody Mary
synopsis: A beautifull artist moonlights as a vampire while in Mexico, killing lovers of both sex. It seems that the only person who has any chance of stopping her reign of terror is her father.

title: Masculin Féminin
synopsis: Paul is young, just demobbed from service in the French Army, and disillusioned with civilian life. While his girlfriend builds herself a career as a pop singer, Paul becomes more isolated from his peers and from their social politics.

title: Master
synopsis: Three women strive to find their place at an elite Northeastern university as old as the country. When anonymous racist attacks target a Black freshman—who insists she is being haunted by ghosts of the school’s past—each woman must determine where the real menace lies.

title: Master Gardener
synopsis: Narvel is the meticulous horticulturist of Gracewood Gardens. He is as much devoted to tending the grounds of the estate, as he is to pandering to his employer, the wealthy dowager Mrs Haverhill. When she demands that he take on her wayward great niece, it unlocks secrets from a buried violent past.

title: Material
synopsis: Unpublished footage from filmmaker Thomas Heise’s career chronicles his home country from 1980s GDR to Germany in 2008. Heise’s outtakes capture many moments, including the 1989 mass demonstrations outside Alexanderplatz, scenes inside Brandenburg prison, and a far-left attack at a film screening.

title: Materialists
synopsis: Lucy works as a successful matchmaker at the exclusive New York agency Adore, arranging relationships for wealthy clients while still living a modest life herself. Her world shifts when her ex-partner John and her seemingly perfect client Harry draw her into an unexpected love triangle.

title: Matewan
synopsis: A labor union organizer comes to an embattled mining community brutally and violently dominated and harassed by the mining company.

title: Matraga
synopsis: Augusto Matraga, a violent rancher, is betrayed and left for dead. Rescued by a humble couple, he turns to faith to atone for his sins. While recovering, he struggles between his past brutality and newfound mysticism, eventually finding redemption by using his violence for a righteous cause.

title: Matt and Mara
synopsis: In Toronto, creative writing professor Mara bumps into Matt, a free-spirited author from her past. Bonded by their shared interests, the two grow closer as Mara juggles marriage, motherhood and work. But when Matt joins her on a road trip, pressure slowly mounts against their undefined relationship.

title: Matthias & Maxime
synopsis: Two childhood best friends are asked to share a kiss for the purposes of a student short film. Soon, a lingering doubt sets in, confronting both of them with their preferences, threatening the brotherhood of their social circle, and, eventually, changing their lives.

title: Maurice
synopsis: After his lover rejects him, a young man trapped by the oppressiveness of Edwardian society tries to come to terms with and accept his sexuality.

title: Maurice's Bar
synopsis: In 1942, on a train to nowhere, a former drag queen remembers a night from her past in one of Paris’ first queer bars. Lingering fragments of customer gossip conjure memories of the mythic bar and its mysterious Jewish-Algerian owner.

title: Max Richter's Sleep
synopsis: This documentary follows composer Max Richter and his creative partner Yulia Mahr as they prepare to stage an ambitious open-air, overnight performance of his celebrated eight-hour magnum opus Sleep in Los Angeles, while also exploring the origins and impact of this groundbreaking composition.

title: MaXXXine
synopsis: An adult film star and aspiring actress finally gets her big break, but as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of Hollywood, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

title: May December
synopsis: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under the pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past.

title: Maya
synopsis: Gabriel, a 30-year-old French war reporter, is released after four months of captivity in Syria. A few weeks later, unable to find his bearings, he decides to leave for India in an attempt to reconnect with his mother. As he moves into his childhood home in Goa, he meets Maya, a young Indian girl.

title: Mayor
synopsis: A real-life political saga following Musa Hadid, the Christian city leader of Ramallah in Palestine. His immediate goals: repave the sidewalks, attract more tourism, and plan the city’s Christmas celebrations. His ultimate mission: to end the occupation of Palestine.

title: McQueen
synopsis: Legendary couturier Alexander McQueen’s rags to riches story is vividly brought to life by his closest friends and family and through his revolutionary body of work, as inspired, tortured, and visionary as the man himself.

title: Me and the Other
synopsis: The game organized by a lonely, unsuccessful, and hopeless 35-year-old guy to talk to the woman about his problems will result in him facing his own disappointments and fears.

title: Me and You
synopsis: Lorenzo, 14, is a quirky loner. He plans to fulfill his teenage dream of happiness by hiding out in his apartment building’s cellar. To escape his parents, Lorenzo will tell them that he is going away to ski camp. But an unexpected visit from his worldly, older half-sister Olivia changes everything.

title: Me and You and Everyone We Know
synopsis: Single dad Richard meets Christine, a starving artist who moonlights as a cabbie. They awkwardly attempt to start a romance, but Richard’s divorce has left him emotionally damaged. Meanwhile, Richard’s sons—one a teenager, the other 6-years-old—take part in clumsy experiments with the opposite sex.

title: Mean Streets
synopsis: Charlie is in a dilemma: he aspires to be a big shot in New York’s Little Italy mafia, but he also wants to be purged of his sins. He seeks penance in the attempted salvation of his friend, the troublemaker Johnny Boy. But this risks complicating his relationship with his mafioso uncle Giovanni.

title: Medea
synopsis: To win the kingdom of Thessaly back from his uncle, Jason must steal the golden fleece from the barbaric Colchis, where the high priestess Medea is royalty. Medea falls for Jason and aids his quest. Following Jason to Thessaly, Medea is soon abandoned—leading her down a path of shocking vengeance.

title: Medicine for Melancholy
synopsis: In a rapidly gentrifying San Francisco, a one-night stand between two bohemians, Micah and Jo’, spins off into a woozy daylong affair. Their day is filled with tenderness, friction, and intellectual sparring as they explore their relationships with each other, the city, and their own Blackness.

title: Medusa Deluxe
synopsis: After a stylist is found dead at a hairdressing competition, the remaining competitors try to uncover the killer over the course of an evening. Rivalry and mistrust build as the contestants suspect that someone may be trying to rig the competition, by gruesomely picking off its entrants.

title: Meek's Cutoff
synopsis: The year is 1845, the earliest days of the Oregon Trail, and a wagon team of three families has hired the mountain man Stephen Meek to guide them over the Cascade Mountains. Claiming to know a short cut, Meek leads the group on an unmarked path across the high plain desert.

title: Meet Me in the Bathroom
synopsis: Set against the backdrop of 9/11, this immersive film tells the story of how a new generation kick started a musical rebirth for New York City that reverberated around the world. Featuring never-before-seen footage of artists like Yeah Yeah Yeahs, The Strokes, The Moldy Peaches and LCD Soundsystem.

title: Meeting Jim
synopsis: A journey back to the lifetime of Jim Haynes, “the godfather of social networking”, an extraordinary man, a self-proclaimed world citizen who grabbed with heart & soul the spirit of the 60s and continued to carry it throughout his life, making a strong contribution to the artistic scene of his time.

title: Meeting the Man: James Baldwin in Paris
synopsis: In 1970, a British film crew set out to make a literary portrait of James Baldwin set in Paris, insisting on setting aside his activism. The author visits Parisian landmarks and reflects on revolution, colonialism, and what it means to be Black in Europe—while bristling at the filmmakers’ questions.

title: Megalopolis
synopsis: An upstart architect dreams of turning the Big Apple into a utopia, but the Mayor has other ideas for the city. The former’s vision doesn’t correspond with the conservative ideals of the politician, who turns to dirty politics and organized crime to try and bury the progressive architect.

title: Mekong Hotel
synopsis: A quiet hotel overlooking the vast Mekong River in northeast Thailand accommodates both living and undead guests. Its patrons hang around together on the veranda, listen to or play guitar, and rehearse for a film about the relationship between a vampire-like woman and her daughter.

title: Melancholia
synopsis: An eight-hour meditation on the maddening persistence of sadness in this world, divided into three parts following a prostitute, a pimp and a nun who wander the countryside.

title: Melancholia
synopsis: As Justine arrives for her wedding reception in her sister’s mansion home, the battle against her own inner demons resurfaces. Her behavior threatens to ruin the party and family tensions mount. But when a rogue planet named Melancholia appears in the sky, Justine knows it will destroy Earth.

title: Melrose: Rich Little Bitch [MV]
synopsis: The music video for “Rich Little Bitch” by Melrose. The group performs live in front of a crowd during the shoot of Hamlet Goes Business.

title: Memento
synopsis: Leonard Shelby suffers from acute short-term memory loss. He cannot to remember anything for more than a few minutes at a time. This makes things difficult when his one mission in life is to track down his wife’s killers. Aided by notes and tattoos, Shelby embarks on a journey down memory lane.

title: Memoir of War
synopsis: It’s 1944 France, and Marguerite is part of the French Resistance along with her husband. When he is deported to Dachau, she befriends a Nazi collaborator to learn of her husband’s whereabouts. But as the months wear on with no news, Marguerite must begin the process of confronting the unimaginable.

title: Memoria
synopsis: One morning, Jessica Holland, a Scottish orchid farmer visiting her sister in Bogotá, is woken by a loud ‘bang’. This haunting sound dispels her sleep for days, calling into question her identity and guiding her from recording studios to secluded jungle villages in an attempt to find its source.

title: Memories of Murder
synopsis: A sadistic serial rapist and murderer of young women terrorizes a small province in 1980s South Korea. To prevent further crimes, three increasingly desperate detectives with conflicting methods race against time to unravel the violent mind of the killer in a futile effort to solve the case.

title: Memory
synopsis: Social worker Sylvia leads a simple, structured life revolving around her daughter, her job, and her AA meetings. Her daily routine takes an unexpected turn when Saul, a figure from her past, follows her home. This surprise encounter will profoundly impact them as they open the door to the past.

title: Men of War
synopsis: A former U.S. Green Beret mounts a failed coup to remove Venezuela’s president and is pursued by the government he served.

title: Menashe
synopsis: Within Brooklyn’s ultra-orthodox Jewish community, Menashe battles for custody of his son after his wife dies, since they live in a culture that requires a mother present in every home. Menashe’s Rabbi decides to grant him one week to give him a final chance to prove that he can be a capable parent.

title: Menus-Plaisirs Les Troisgros
synopsis: Founded in 1930 and holding three Michelin stars for over 50 years, the Troisgros family restaurant sees Michel and Marie-Pierre passing their craft to their sons. From bustling markets to meticulous kitchens, their culinary world unfolds in step with the seasons and shared devotion.

title: Mermaids
synopsis: In 1963, the unconventional Mrs. Flax and her daughters—teenage Charlotte and young Kate—arrive in smalltown New England. Mrs Flax is prone to moving her family somewhere new whenever a romantic relationship ends. But could the arrival of kind-hearted Lou lead to a permanent stop for the family?

title: Merry Christmas
synopsis: Two strangers meet on a fateful Christmas Eve. A night of delirious romance turns into a nightmare. Revealing anything more would be a crime.

title: Merry Christmas, Mr. Lawrence
synopsis: During WWII, British soldier Jack Celliers is captured by Japanese forces and held in a camp run by Capt. Yonoi and Sgt. Hara. Yonoi develops an obsession with Celliers who is defiant in the face of their old ideas. Meanwhile, a translator tries to find common ground between their opposing beliefs.

title: Métamorphoses
synopsis: When Europe skips class to climb aboard an eight-wheel truck with a magnetic young man named Jupiter, little does she know of the journey of initiation that lies ahead of her. Just off the side of the motorway lies a land inhabited by powerful gods…

title: Metropolis
synopsis: In a highly-stylized city, a wealthy utopia exists above a bleak underworld where mistreated workers live. When privileged youth Freder discovers the grim scene below, he sets out to help the workers and befriends the rebellious teacher Maria. But this puts him at odds with his authoritative father.

title: Metropolitan
synopsis: Home on winter break during the debutante season, middle-class Princeton student Tom falls in with a group of Upper East Side friends from the urban haute bourgeoisie. As naïve Tom is accepted into the group, he becomes smitten with Audrey while struggling with his feelings for his ex Serena.

title: Mia madre
synopsis: Margherita is a director shooting a film with the famous American actor Barry Huggins. Away from the set, Margherita tries to hold her life together while feeling powerless when facing her mother’s illness and her daughter’s adolescence.

title: Mickey 17
synopsis: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

title: Microbe & Gasoline
synopsis: Daniel is a shy boy, often lost in his drawings. Théo is a cool, inventive kid who arrives at school in the middle of the year. The two quickly become best friends. Wanting to escape their families over the summer, the duo fashion a car out of a lawnmower and set off for an adventure through France.

title: Mid90s
synopsis: In 1990s suburban LA, Stevie is a shy thirteen-year-old skateboarding enthusiast who spends his time outside to escape his troubled family life. He soon befriends older skaters who take him under their wing, making Stevie’s summer one of many firsts, transgressions, and newfound freedoms.

title: Midnight Cowboy
synopsis: When Joe Buck, a good-looking, naïve Texas “cowboy,” makes his way to the Big Apple to seek his fortune, the only wealth he finds is in the friendship of Ratso Rizzo, a sleazy, small-time con man with big dreams. Living on the tattered fringe of society, the two outcasts develop an unlikely bond.

title: Midsommar
synopsis: Dani and Christian are a young couple on the rocks. But after tragedy keeps them together, Dani invites herself to join Christian and his friends’ trip to a rural Swedish midsummer festival. What begins as an idyllic retreat quickly devolves into an increasingly violent and bizarre competition.

title: Honey
synopsis: Irene lives alone on the coastline outside Rome. To her father and her married lover, she is a student. In reality, she helps terminally ill patients to ease their suffering. One day, she meets a man who will put to the test Irene’s convictions.

title: Migration
synopsis: A family of ducks tries to convince their overprotective father to go on the vacation of a lifetime.

title: Millennium Actress
synopsis: With the renowned Ginei Studios shutting down and their buildings about to be demolished, filmmaker Genya Tachibana sets out to commemorate this historical moment by interviewing the studio’s former superstar: the now-reclusive Chiyoko Fujiwara. But why did she vanish at the peak of her career?

title: Millennium Mambo
synopsis: In the future of 2011, Vicky recalls her romances that unfolded a decade ago among the techno-scored neon nightlife of Taipei. Back in 2001, Vicky is a free spirit and party girl working as a hostess at a bar who begins to drift away from her DJ boyfriend towards a suave, sensitive gangster.

title: Million Dollar Baby
synopsis: Frankie is a veteran Los Angeles boxing trainer who keeps almost everyone at arm’s length. When Maggie arrives in Frankie’s gym seeking his expertise, he is reluctant to train an inexperienced young woman. Eventually, he relents, and the two form a close bond that will irrevocably change them both.

title: Mimaroğlu Remix Project
director: Serdar Kökçeoğlu, Atıl Altaş, T. Hüseyin Kuru, Bikem Ekberzade, S. Buse Yıldırım, Can Eskinazi, Nesli Ergün, Deniz Çizmeci, Elif Dizdaroğlu, Eytan İpeker, Müge Turan, Levent Çetin, Fatih Karatekin, Hazel Kılınç, İlhan Mimaroğlu
synopsis: A collection of 8mm film reels from İlhan Mimaroğlu’s archive—once tucked away in whisky boxes—has found new life through art. Over 30 artists transformed the footage into fifteen distinct audiovisual pieces, blending experimental soundscapes with contemporary video art.

title: Mimaroğlu: The Robinson of Manhattan Island
synopsis: Legendary electronic music composer İlhan Mimaroğlu and his vibrant wife Güngör migrated to the USA from Turkey in early 1960s. Using the couple’s personal archives, the documentary captures the career of İlhan as an edgy artist, and the power of their life-long companionship.

title: MimiRap
synopsis: Inspired by Reha Erdem’s film Big Big World, this collaborative work with his longtime cinematographer Florent Herry presents a looped video installation featuring Ecem Uzun performing a rap song written by Erdem.

title: Mimosas
synopsis: A caravan escorts an elderly and dying Sheikh to Sijilmasa. His last wish is to be buried with his loved ones. But death does not wait and reaches him while crossing the rugged peaks of the Moroccan Atlas. The caravaneers, fearful of the mountain, refuse to continue transporting the corpse.

title: Minari
synopsis: A Korean American family starts a new life on an Arkansas farm, chasing their version of the American dream. As they navigate the hardships of the Ozarks, they come to understand the strength of family and the true meaning of home.

title: Mine
synopsis: Mine is married to station chief Cemil; at the same time, the entire town attracts the attention of men is a beautiful woman. Mine, exposed to the jealous gaze of the women around her, feels alone and unhappy in her marital life. When Ilhan, the only friend, comes to town, everything changes.

title: Miniatures: Many Berlin Artists in Hoisdorf
synopsis: On a weekend in June 1983, in what was deemed a “country outing,” an impressive number of Berlin-based artists went to a small German village to give the local residents a taste of Berlin’s avant-garde art scene. Back in Berlin, the footage was manipulated to produce an “experimental examination.”

title: Minotaur
synopsis: A wraithlike fantasy that observes three thirtysomethings as they sleep, dream, read and receive visitors in a Mexico City apartment.

title: Minotaur
synopsis: Russia, 2022. When Gleb, a successful company director, finds himself under siege from mounting corporate pressures and an increasingly unstable world, the collapse of his carefully ordered life accelerates toward violence.

title: Mirai
synopsis: When four-year-old Kun meets Mirai, his new baby sister, his world is turned upside down. Kun becomes increasingly jealous of baby Mirai… until one day he storms off into the garden, where he encounters strange guests from the past and future – including his sister Mirai, as a teenager.

title: Miroirs No. 3
synopsis: A young piano student is involved in a car accident in which her boyfriend is killed. Miraculously, she survives the accident unharmed and is taken in by a family. She finds comfort and support in order to get her life back on track, but over time she notices that something is wrong with the family.

title: Mirror Mirror
synopsis: Aylin, Frida and Lale struggle to hold on to their independence in increasingly conservative Istanbul, when their paths cross at Lale’s acting courses.

title: To Catch a Killer
synopsis: A talented but troubled cop is recruited by the FBI to help profile and track down a murderer.

title: Misery
synopsis: Romance writer Paul Sheldon—who just had his life saved by his number one fan—lives to regret it. When Annie Wilkes discovers her favorite character has been killed off in his latest novel, she’ll do anything to make sure he brings her back to life. Now Paul Sheldon must write for his life.

title: Mishima: A Life in Four Chapters
synopsis: November 25, 1970. Yukio Mishima, the acclaimed Japanese author, faces his final day. Meanwhile, interrupting flashbacks intertwine Mishima’s past with scenes from his works, revealing the inner turmoil and contradictions of a man who attempted an impossible harmony between self, art, and society.

title: Miss Juneteenth
synopsis: ‘Miss Juneteenth’ beauty queen and single mum Turquoise Jones attempts to get her rebellious teenage daughter Kai to follow in her footsteps by having her run the same beauty contest, while hoping to keep her from repeating the same mistakes in life that she did. But maybe Kai wants something else.

title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
synopsis: A group of terrorists plans to detonate three plutonium cores for a simultaneous nuclear attack on different cities. Ethan Hunt, along with his IMF team, sets out to stop the carnage.

title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
synopsis: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: to track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity before it falls into the wrong hands.

title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
synopsis: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

title: Mister Lonely
synopsis: A lonely Michael Jackson impersonator falls for a beautiful Marilyn Monroe impersonator. The lovestruck duo retreat to a seaside commune in the Scottish highlands filled with impersonators including the Queen of England, Madonna and Sammy Davis Jr.

title: Misunderstood
synopsis: The British consul in Florence has just lost his wife. He shares the news with his eldest son, Andrew, but chooses to hide the truth from the youngest, Miles. The two brothers are divided by their father’s attitude: while he shows all his tenderness to fragile Miles, the consul abandons Andrew.

title: Mitski: The Land
synopsis: Indie singer-songwriter Mitski takes the stage at Atlanta’s Fox Theater with a seven-piece band. Over the course of three nights in September 2024, they perform music from Mitski’s acclaimed seventh album, The Land Is Inhospitable and So Are We, alongside reimaginings of her earlier work.

title: MLK/FBI
synopsis: Throughout Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.‘s history-altering political career, he was treated by U.S. intelligence agencies like an enemy of the state. Newly declassified files detail the FBI surveillance that dogged King’s activism, fueled by the racist and red-baiting paranoia of J. Edgar Hoover.

title: Model
synopsis: In New York, models juggle the competing demands of various jobs: TV commercials, runway shows, and magazine spreads for luxury and consumer brands. Working alongside photographers and agency executives, they hustle in a high-pressure advertising industry where art and commerce collide.

title: Modern Times
synopsis: Subjected to the infernal production rate of the factory, the Little Tramp suddenly has a nervous breakdown. From hospital, to prison, to unemployment, he gets caught up in the sprockets and cogs of modern industrialization. That is, until he comes across a kind orphaned girl.

title: Mogul Mowgli
synopsis: British Pakistani rapper Zed is a rising star on the cusp of his first world tour. But, struck down by an illness that threatens to derail his big break, he’s forced to confront his past, his family, and the uncertainty of his legacy.

title: Mold
synopsis: Basri, walks every day for miles along the tracks working as a railroad watchman. His only thought is finding his missing son. 18 years ago, while the boy was at the university in Istanbul, the police took him into custody for anti-government activities. Then, he mysteriously disappeared.

title: Mommy
synopsis: A feisty widowed single mom finds herself burdened with the full-time custody of her unpredictable 15-year-old ADHD son. As they struggle to make ends meet, Kyla, the peculiar new neighbor across the street, offers her help. Together, they find a new sense of balance, and hope is regained.

title: Mon oncle
synopsis: Gérard Arpel lives with his parents in a hilariously ultramodern house, but prefers the company of his uncle Hulot, who takes him on trips to the old city. Meanwhile, Gérard’s parents attempt to adjust Mr Hulot to modern life—so they find him a job in Mr Arpel’s antiseptic plastic hose factory.

title: Monangambeee
synopsis: In a Portuguese colonial prison in Angola, a woman visits her husband, who has been arrested for his suspected involvement in a revolutionary uprising. Their tender reunion angers the jailers, who inflict increasingly brutal abuse on the prisoners due to a linguistic and cultural misunderstanding.

title: Moon
synopsis: Sarah, a former mixed martial artist, takes up the offer to work as a personal trainer for the three daughters of a wealthy family in the Middle East. In a palace surrounded by walls and with constant surveillance on the sisters, Sarah finds that they are not really interested in boxing training.

title: Mondays in the Sun
synopsis: In a Spanish port city, a group of former shipyard workers grapple with unemployment and fading dreams. As they spend their days sharing stories, searching for work, and clinging to dignity, their bond offers warmth amid economic hardship and social disillusionment.

title: Monica
synopsis: A transgender woman, Monica, reluctantly returns to her estranged Midwestern hometown as her mother, Eugenia, battles dementia. Having left years ago, Monica feels like a stranger in her family, but now she must confront unresolved tensions and embark on a path of healing and acceptance.

title: Monkey Man
synopsis: A young man ekes out a meager living in an underground fight club where, night after night, wearing a gorilla mask, he’s beaten bloody by more popular fighters for cash. After years of suppressed rage, he discovers a way to infiltrate the enclave of the city’s sinister elite.

title: Monster
synopsis: When a young boy displays increasingly worrying behavior at school and home, his mother decides to discuss it with his teachers. It soon becomes apparent that one of his teachers is the source of all the problems. But as the mystery unfolds, the truth becomes more complex than expected.

title: Monsters
synopsis: After a NASA space probe crashes, an alien infestation quarantines an area between Mexico and the US. As the military battles to contain the creatures, a photojournalist must escort his boss’s daughter through the danger zone to the US border, forcing them to confront the terrifying reality.

title: Montreal Stories
director: Denys Arcand, Michel Brault, Atom Egoyan, Jacques Leduc, Léa Pool, Patricia Rozema
synopsis: Six directors, one city. From a young housewife sampling Montréal’s nightlife, via a kleptomaniac customs officer who steals a memento from each traveler to an older lady reminiscing about her grand love: each tale reflects a vision of a rich and contrasting city.

title: Moon Rider
synopsis: We recognise champions at their pinnacle. But what does it take to get here? Moon Rider looks inside the mental and physical struggle of Danish cyclist Rasmus Quaade to become a professional rider. Shot on stunning super8, the beauty and the torment of the world of cycling is caught at every turn.

title: Moonlight
synopsis: In Miami, young Chiron struggles with school bullies and an abusive mother, finding a father figure in drug dealer Juan. As he also begins to explore his sexuality, Chiron grows into his teenage years and becomes a more resilient adult—but the experiences of his childhood may never truly leave him.

title: Moonrise Kingdom
synopsis: In the summer of 1965, two 12-year-olds fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness. As various authorities and a troop of Boy Scouts try to hunt them down, a violent storm brews off-shore, and the peaceful New England island community is turned upside down.

title: Moonstruck
synopsis: In Brooklyn’s Italian-American community, widowed bookkeeper Loretta agrees to marry kind, steady Johnny. But when she meets Ronny, his passionate and moody younger brother, sparks fly. As family tensions simmer and emotions run high, Loretta finds herself in a dilemma.

title: Moor Mother: Jazz Codes
synopsis: Poet, musician, visual artist, and Afrofuturist Moor Mother roams a hallucinatory Mojave Desert alone. Meanwhile, in Los Angeles, Moor Mother visits the Pan Afrikan Peoples Arkestra HQ and plays with jazz luminaries and elders, including Henry “The Skipper” Franklin, Michael Session, and Maia.

title: More Than Ever
synopsis: Hélène and Mathieu have been together for many years and live a happy and hectic life in Bordeaux. When Hélène becomes seriously ill, she is faced with an existential decision and decides to travel alone to Norway to seek peace—an act that will test the strength of their love.

title: Morgen
synopsis: Nelu, a man in his forties, works as a security guard at the local supermarket in Salonta, a small town on the Romanian-Hungarian border. Every day is the same for him, until the day he “fishes” something different from the river: a Turkish man trying to cross the border. Nelu agrees to help him.

title: Morî
synopsis: The only memory left to Mori from his father is the audio recording of the story he told him. Mori listens to this tale from time to time. One day, a new teacher comes to school. When Mori sees the teacher, he thinks he is his father.

title: Morichales
synopsis: A fictional explorer describes his observations on gold-mining in Venezuela. His mission takes him along the Orinoco, from remote jungle mines to industrial zones. His focus stays on the workers and their environment.

title: Moses Without Rod
synopsis: The life of the writer, intellectual, spokesman of democracy, and activist Musa Anter is now a movie rich in metaphors and images.

title: Motel Destino
synopsis: Motel Destino, a sex hotel in Northern Brazil, is run by the hot-headed Elias and his restless wife, Dayana. When a young gang member on the run named Heraldo stays at the motel, Dayana becomes intrigued with him. As the two navigate a dance of power and desire, a dangerous plan for freedom emerges.

title: Mother
synopsis: Ten years have gone by since Elena’s six-year-old son has disappeared. Nowadays, Elena lives on a beach in France—the last place where her son was spotted. As she begins to heal from this tragic episode, Elena meets a French teenager who strongly reminds her of her lost son.

title: Mother, Couch
synopsis: Estranged siblings David, Gruffud, and Linda are brought together when their mother refuses to move from a large green couch in a furniture store, where they originally intended to collect a dresser. While cajoling and negotiating with her, the three children catch up on each other’s lives.

title: Mother of Many Children
synopsis: Filmmaker Alanis Obomsawin meets with Indigenous women from different First Nations, uncovering a proud matriarchal culture that has been pressured to adopt the values of white society. Women reveal how they struggle to regain a sense of equality and pass on their culture to younger generations.

title: Motion Picture (Employees Leaving the Lumière Factory)
synopsis: In the darkroom, 50 unexposed film strips were laid across a surface, upon which a frame of La sortie des ouvriers de l’usine Lumière was projected to create a new kind of film…

title: Mouchette
synopsis: Mouchette is an adolescent living in the rough countryside. Her mother is dying and her father is absent. Remaining silent in the face of the humiliations she undergoes she finds respite in the woods. Everything changes when she meets poacher Arsene.

title: Mountains
synopsis: In Miami’s Little Haiti, Xavier makes a living as a demolition worker while his wife Esperance holds down two jobs to sustain their cozy household. But when he is tasked with dismantling his rapidly gentrifying  neighborhood, Xavier is faced with the realities of redevelopment

title: Mountains May Depart
