As the camera passes through the hospital’s darkened corridors, it moves from the operating room to the morgue, between life and other states, the real and the virtual.

title: Phoenix
synopsis: German-Jewish cabaret singer Nelly survived Auschwitz but had to undergo reconstructive surgery as her face was disfigured. Without recognizing Nelly, her former husband Johnny asks her to help him claim his wife’s inheritance. To see if he betrayed her, she agrees, becoming her own doppelganger.

title: Photograph
synopsis: Struggling street photographer Rafi takes tourist portraits in Mumbai. When he meets Miloni, a shy stranger from an affluent family, he convinces her to pose as his fiancée when his overbearing grandmother pays him a visit. The pair make a surprising connection, transforming them in unexpected ways.

title: Piano Piano Kid
synopsis: In 1940s Turkey, the war is recently over but the wounds are still fresh and the Second World War is going on next door. A different family lives in each room of a mansion. They all lead a scarce life but hold on to life with hope.

title: Piattaforma Luna
synopsis: A group of six scuba divers specializing in deep underwater operations live for three weeks at the bottom of the ocean. Staying alternately in the recompression chamber on board the platform Luna or conducting work on the bottom of the sea, the divers meticulously adhere to strict protocols.

title: Pickpocket
synopsis: 1997, Fengyang. Xiao Wu is a pickpocket. Having never managed to get away from the streets like his friends, he finds himself alone with his troubles. A cop is out to get him and his love affair with local karaoke hostess Mei Mei is going nowhere. He realises it’s time to think about his future.

title: Pickpocket
synopsis: Michel takes up pickpocketing as a hobby but is arrested almost immediately, giving him the chance to reflect on the morality of his crimes. However, after his release, his mother dies. He rejects the support of friends and returns to pickpocketing, knowing it’s the only way he can express himself.

title: Pictures of Ghosts
synopsis: In the Brazilian city of Recife, director Kleber Mendonça Filho moves through the city’s grand movie theaters, once vital spaces of collective imagination and social life. Archival material, film excerpts, and memories trace a century of dreams, ruptures, and transformations.

title: Pieces of April
synopsis: Quirky and rebellious April Burns lives with her boyfriend in a low-rent New York City apartment miles away from her emotionally distant family. But when she discovers that her mother has a fatal form of breast cancer, she invites the whole clan to her place for a most chaotic Thanksgiving.

title: Piercing
synopsis: A married man plans on murdering an unsuspecting call girl at a hotel to get rid of his devious impulses. However, he becomes allured by the mysterious woman who shows up. First, they relax and get in the mood, but when there’s an unexpected disruption, a dangerous game of chance and chase begins.

title: Pierrot le Fou
synopsis: On impulse, Ferdinand abandons his bourgeois existence with his wife and child to take off with Marianne, an old flame. Being pursued by foreign thugs, they embark on a haphazard crime spree, a crazy adventure involving fast cars, mysterious gangsters, and a Mediterranean idyll that turns sour.

title: Pieta
synopsis: A man works as a loan shark who threatens those who can’t make their payments. One day a woman appears on his doorstep claiming to be the mother who abandoned him as a baby. At first he rejects her, but then gradually accepts her into his life. When she is kidnapped, he must track down the culprit.

title: Pig
synopsis: Following the death of his wife, a truffle hunter and former chef has given up everything and lives alone in the Oregonian wilderness. But when his beloved truffle foraging pig is kidnapped, he returns to his past in Portland and teams up with a young man to find her.

title: Pilgrims
synopsis: A woman travels to a small town near an airport with the brother of her former boyfriend, who was killed there in a violent tragedy. As the pair retrace his steps, they unravel the circumstances of his death.

title: Pillion
synopsis: Colin, a timid man, meets Ray, a confident biker gang leader, who initiates him into a submissive relationship, challenging Colin’s mundane existence and prompting personal growth through their unconventional dynamic.

title: Pina
synopsis: Wim Wenders pays tribute to legendary choreographer Pina Bausch, who died in 2009, and her groundbreaking, inventive work with the Tanztheater Wuppertal ensemble. Longtime troupe members re-create classic pieces for the big screen, pouring out of the theater and into the city of Wuppertal.

title: Pino
synopsis: Rome, 1968. At the pinnacle of his career, artist Pino Pascali died in an accident. 50 years later the Pascali Museum in Apulia—where Pino was born—buys and exhibits one of his works. Old photographs by Pino Pascali—and new ones by Pino Musi—tell the story of a work of art returning to its origins.

title: Guillermo del Toro's Pinocchio
synopsis: A re-imagination of the classic tale which finds a wooden boy on an enchanted adventure that transcends worlds and reveals the power of love.

title: Piranha
synopsis: A secret government plan involving flesh-eating fish causes havoc when, from a secluded secret pool, the leathal creatures are released by mistake into the river flow.

title: Pirates
synopsis: At the dawn of the new millennium, three lifelong friends and pirate radio DJs—Cappo, Kidda and Two Tonne—are looking to bring on the year 2000 in style. A lack of money, tickets, and room in Cappo’s minuscule Peugeot won’t deter them from their desired destination: a raging party in South London.

title: Pity
synopsis: Initially stricken when his wife passes into a coma, a soft-spined lawyer begins to draw a sense of satisfaction from all the compassion, kindness, and attention of his peers. He soon becomes addicted to their pity, so much so that he now feels unhappy when happy—and happy only when unhappy.

title: Pixote: The Law of the Weakest
synopsis: Homeless adolescent Pixote finds himself thrown into a nightmarish prison where sadistic guards torture the young inmates. Fleeing with fellow inmate Lilica and her boyfriend, Dito, he journeys to the streets of São Paulo and becomes enmeshed in an underworld of drugs and violence.

title: Places in the Sun
synopsis: Samuela despairs at struggle to break through as an author. When her boyfriend leaves her, she secretly travels with her brother to the family holiday home on Lanzarote, where she wants to work on her novel. But instead of peace, she finds her father occupying the house.

title: Plainclothes
synopsis: In 1990s New York, police officer Lucas’s daily assignment is casing a shopping mall, looking to lure gay men into intimate situations in the public bathroom so they can be arrested for indecency. During a routine shift Lucas encounters Andrew and struggles to complete his usual mission.

title: Plan 9 from Outer Space
synopsis: Flying saucers visit Earth, and not for the first time. And as ever, their attempts at peaceful communication are ignored by Earth’s generals. This time, the aliens will prove their existence to all humans—by enacting Plan 9: Reanimating the corpses of Earth.

title: Plastic Dream
synopsis: Belma’s self-confidence gets damaged when the doctor she went to for her skin rash problem tells her that she should get Botox. She becomes a woman who is uncomfortable with her skin and gets Botox but things do not go as she expected.

title: Plastic Semiotic
synopsis: The average life of human beings—from birth to old age—is represented by children’s toys. Barbie dolls, plastic dinosaurs, and model cars are assembled to recreate life’s inevitabilities, including holidays, traffic jams, and death.

title: Platoon
synopsis: Innocent teenage soldier Chris Taylor is thrown headfirst into the bloody Vietnam War. As his platoon battles the Viet Cong, tensions mount between ruthless Sergeant Barnes and compassionate Sergeant Elias. Caught between them, Chris fights to survive the battlefield and the war within his unit.

title: Playtime
synopsis: When he has to contact an American official in the French capital, Monsieur Hulot finds himself perplexed by the complexity of a gadget-filled Paris. He gets lost in the city’s maze of modern architecture, and roams around with some American tourists, ending up causing a lot of chaos.

title: Plaza
synopsis: Once dreaming of becoming a teacher, Emre is driven by family pressure into working as a security guard and sent to watch over an empty 27-storey plaza in Istanbul. His long, solitary shifts take an unforeseen turn as strange events unfold and an unlikely love gradually enters his life.

title: Please Baby Please
genres: Drama, Musical, Avant-Garde, Comedy, Crime, LGBTQ+
synopsis: After witnessing a murder on Manhattan’s gritty streets, a bohemian couple become the dangerous obsession of a greaser gang. Fear transforms into thrill and lust as the wife becomes infatuated with the gang’s rough exterior, and the husband singles out a gang member as an object of affection.

title: Please, Please Me
synopsis: Ariane is convinced that her husband Jean-Jacques is interested in another woman. To save her marriage, she asks him to have an affair with this woman, believing this is the best way to get rid of Jean-Jacques’s fantasies.

title: Pleasure
synopsis: Bella arrives in Los Angeles from her hometown in Sweden, with dreams of becoming the next porn superstar. However, as her ruthless ambition leads her into increasingly dangerous territory, Bella struggles to reconcile her dreams of empowerment with the realities of the darker side of her industry.

title: Aga
synopsis: Salim, Veysel, and Şenol are three brothers living in a rural house. Salim and Veysel work as shepherds, while Şenol, forced to leave school by Salim, cares for their bedridden mother and handles household chores. Salim’s costly dream of marriage binds the brothers, leading to a final confrontation.

title: Ploy
synopsis: Ploy is a highly detailed, erotic psychological drama in which three strangers are locked inside one hotel room. It starts with subtle suspicions and builds up to jealousy, as the appearance of a young woman triggers devastating consequences for a married couple.

title: Poison Friends
synopsis: When the new college year starts, Eloi and Alexandre encounter André, the most brilliant student in the lecture theater. Fascinated by his ease and charisma, they quickly fall under his spell: André then offers them his friendship in exchange for complete loyalty to him.

title: Policeman
synopsis: Yaron is one of an elite group of police officers working in an anti-terrorist unit in the Israeli police force. He and his fellow officers are the ultimate defence against the “Arab enemy.” However, an encounter with a radical, violent group turns his life upside down.

title: Polina
synopsis: Growing up in Russia, Polina studies classical ballet with one goal: to make it to the Bolshoi. However, when her dream finally comes true, she discovers not only love but a new form of dance—more contemporary and expressive—that takes her to France, and will change her life forever.

title: Polite Society
synopsis: Ria Khan, a martial artist-in-training who dreams of becoming a world-renowned stunt woman, witnesses her big sister give up on her dreams to get engaged. After enlisting the help of her friends, Ria attempts to pull off the most ambitious wedding heist in the name of independence and sisterhood.

title: Polizei
synopsis: Ali Ekber, who immigrated to Germany from Turkey, works as a sweeper in a theater. Introducing himself as a policeman to the beautiful waiter Babett, whom he falls in love with, Ali Ekber decides to continue this game in order to impress her.

title: Polytechnique
synopsis: Valérie and Jean-François study at a school in Montreal. One day, a brutal event causes irreversible changes in their lives. A 25-year-old man enters the school with a rifle in his hand and his goal is to murder every woman in the building.

title: Pompei: Below the Clouds
synopsis: Naples is a city forever marked by the looming presence of Mount Vesuvius. Beneath the quiet threat of eruption, people go about their days: archaeologists unearth the past, children learn as the earth hums, firefighters wait for the next call.

title: Poor Cow
synopsis: Free-spirited and resilient, Joy is nevertheless struggling to cope while her brutal husband is in jail. Clutching at any slight chance of happiness, she falls for her husband’s associate. Joy and her son decide to move in with him in the hope of a better future—but with heart-breaking results.

title: Poor Things
synopsis: Bella is a young woman brought back to life by a brilliant and unorthodox scientist. Under the scientist’s protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off on a whirlwind adventure across the continents.

title: Popeye the Sailor Meets Sindbad the Sailor
synopsis: Sindbad the Sailor proclaims himself to be the greatest sailor in the world, a claim which is challenged by Popeye’s arrival to his island with Olive Oyl and J. Wellington Wimpy in tow. Sindbad, with the help of his bird Rokh, treats Popeye to a series of challenges to prove his greatness.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
synopsis: In late 18th century France, painter Marianne is commissioned by a countess to paint the wedding portrait of her daughter Héloïse. While posing as her hired companion, Marianne is instructed to complete the portrait in secret. However, intimacy and attraction begin to blossom between both women.

title: Portrait of the Artist
synopsis: A famous filmmaker works on his next film, which will focus on monstrosity. He is obsessed by the idea of finding a painting that will be central to the film and will crystallize all the power and beauty of monsters.

title: Postponed
synopsis: After three people die, their first step in the afterlife is to meet with a death consultant. During this session, the consultant allows each of them to ask one question about anything they desire.

title: Potiche
synopsis: Suzanne is the elegant housewife of the industrialist and iron fist Pujol. When his workers go on strike, she steps in to manage the factory and proves to be competent. However, her new role throws her back in touch with union leader Babin, a romantic fling from the past that still has sparks.

title: Poverty and Other Delights
synopsis: Marcel and Joseph are tireless walkers. Their itinerary is an invitation to discover improbable places and fascinating people. Everlastingly looking for Stanley, Marcel’s only friend, they meet an unlikely crowd of extravagant characters. Each has a story to tell, his hope to share.

title: Prague's Girl
synopsis: Through old photos, Francesco and Eloisa reconstruct the love story of their grandparents. In 1968 Prague, Maša, an exile, and Gianlorenzo, an Italian diplomat, fall in love just before the Russian occupation. They flee to Rome—but Maša is driven by an uncontrollable desire for freedom…

title: Prater
synopsis: Vienna’s Prater is an amusement park and a desire machine. No mechanical invention, novel idea, or sensational innovation could escape incorporation into the Prater. The unique history of its attractions—and their contribution to the rise and fall of the world’s oldest amusement park—is explored.

title: Prayers for the Stolen
synopsis: Three young girls live in a rural village in Guerrero dominated by the violent presence of the local drug trade and the threat of human trafficking. Trained by their mothers to flee at any moment and forced into extreme measures to evade capture, they must learn to navigate their harsh surroundings.

title: Precious
synopsis: In New York City’s Harlem circa 1987, an overweight, abused, illiterate teen who is pregnant with her second child is invited to enroll in an alternative school in hopes that she can re-route her life in a better direction.

title: Predators
synopsis: ‘To Catch a Predator’ was a popular television show designed to hunt down child predators and lure them to a film set, where they would be interviewed and eventually arrested. An exploration of the scintillating rise and staggering fall of the show and the world it helped create.

title: Preparations to Be Together for an Unknown Period of Time
synopsis: At a conference, 40-year-old neurosurgeon Márta falls in love with fellow surgeon János. She decides to leave her successful career in the US behind to return to Budapest to start a new life with him. However, when she arrives, János claims they have never met before, let alone fallen in love.

title: Presence
synopsis: Married couple Rebekah and Chris, and their kids Tyler and Chloe, move into a seemingly ordinary suburban home.  But when strange occurrences unfold, they soon become convinced that something else is in the house with them – and that presence is about to disturb their lives in unimaginable ways.

title: Present Tense
synopsis: Planning to take any job she can get in order to save enough money and leave Turkey for the U.S., Mina is hired as a fortune teller who reads the dregs in coffee cups. She discovers she has the ability to offer comfort and insight to the customers who are just as lost in the wilderness as she is.

title: Pride
synopsis: Margaret Thatcher is in power and the National Union of Mineworkers is on strike. At the Gay Pride March in London, a group of gay and lesbian activists decides to raise money to support the families of the miners. But there’s a problem—the Union seems embarrassed to receive their support.

title: Primary
synopsis: Wisconsin, United States, 1960. Ahead of the state’s primary, Hubert Humphrey, senator for Minnesota, and John F. Kennedy, senator for Massachusetts, rally for votes. From Wisconsin’s main streets to its farmland, the presidential candidates engage with the electorate, each in their own style.

title: First Love
synopsis: Goldsmith Vittorio is looking for the ideal woman. Then he meets Sonia. He becomes obsessed with shaping Sonia’s body and mind as he does gold with fire. When the two lovers isolate themselves in a house in the Italian countryside, they dangerously lose touch with reality and the rest of the world.

title: Prince Avalanche
synopsis: Alvin and Lance spend the summer of 1988 in a deserted, fire-damaged forest, with the monotonous task of repainting the markings on a country road. The isolated landscape becomes a place of misadventure as the men find themselves at odds with each other and the women they left behind.

title: Prince of Darkness
synopsis: In the basement of an abandoned church lies a bottle of green liquid being investigated by local physics students. But as the night draws in, the students soon realise that the relic holds a dark force beyond their control that could well be the essence of pure evil: the remains of Satan himself.

title: Princes and Princesses
synopsis: Each night, two children meet in an abandoned theater. With the help of an old technician, they dress up and invent stories in which they play the main roles. Through shadow theater, they tell six whimsical tales, each revealing different kinds of love: tender, tumultuous, enchanted, or forbidden.

title: Priscilla
synopsis: From a German army base to his dream-world estate at Graceland: through Priscilla Presley’s eyes, Sofia Coppola tells the unseen side of a great American myth in Elvis and Priscilla’s long courtship and turbulent marriage.

title: Problemista
synopsis: Alejandro is an aspiring toy designer from El Salvador, struggling to bring his unusual ideas to life in New York City. As time on his work visa runs out, a job assisting an erratic art-world outcast becomes his only hope to stay in the country and realize his dream.

title: Producing Adults
synopsis: Venla works as a psychologist at a fertility clinic. She dreams of having a child with her long-term boyfriend Antero. When Antero’s secret vasectomy seriously reduces her options, her mind turns to the storeroom at work, housing millions of sperm samples lying dormant in liquid nitrogen.

title: Professor Shanku O El Dorado
synopsis: Trilokeshwar Shonku, a well-known and respected inventor, embarks on a tour of Brazil after being invited to attend a science convention. Once there, Shanku encounters native tribesmen and anaconda while venturing on the quest for the mythical city of El Dorado.

title: Project Hail Mary
synopsis: An astronaut tries to save Earth while alone in outer space. Upon waking up in space, he will, thanks to a surprise encounter, find solutions to the threat of star destruction that could endanger Earth.

title: The King
synopsis: Filmmaker Eugene Jarecki takes Elvis Presley’s 1963 Rolls-Royce on a musical road trip from Memphis to New York, Las Vegas, and beyond. Forty years after the King’s death, voices from all walks of life—including Alec Baldwin, Chuck D, Ethan Hawke, and Mike Myers—reflect on his rise and fall.

title: Prospero's Books
synopsis: Prospero is a magician who gets to keep only a small fragment of his enormous library when he is exiled with his daughter to an enchanted island. As Prospero describes the books he loves, visions begin to unfold. However, problems arise when Prospero’s daughter falls in love with the wrong man.

title: Prototype
synopsis: As the deadliest natural disaster in US history strikes Galveston, Texas, taking between 6,000 and 12,000 lives, a mysterious televisual device projects images of unknown origin.

title: Puberty Blues
synopsis: In 1970s Sydney, two teenage girls who have desperately trying to break into the “in” crowd who dominate the Greenhill beach. Once they are accepted into the group, they realise that the group’s laid-back, ultra-cool facade is just that: a glossy cover-up.

title: Pulse
synopsis: A group of young people in Tokyo experience strange phenomena involving missing friends and technological breakdown. After the unexpected suicides of several friends, three strangers set out to explore a decaying city, and to solve the mystery of a forbidden room in an abandoned construction site.

title: Punch-Drunk Love
synopsis: Struggling to cope with his erratic temper, novelty-toilet-plunger salesman Barry Egan spends his days collecting frequent-flier-mile coupons and dodging the insults of his seven sisters. The promise of a new life emerges when Barry inadvertently attracts the affection of a mysterious woman.

title: Puncture
synopsis: The tattooed and drug-addicted townie has more than his share of personal demons, but can he straighten up long enough to lead a renegade safety-needle inventor to victory against a monopolizing medical supply corporation?

title: Purple Noon
synopsis: Wealthy Mr Greenleaf hires Tom Ripley to bring back his son Philippe from Italy to the US, as he fears that he is squandering his inheritance. However, when Tom becomes attracted to Philippe’s lifestyle and girlfriend, his intentions take a lethal turn as he decides to take on Phillipe’s identity.

title: Push Comes to Shove
synopsis: An animated short in which two volunteers demonstrate the proper way to vent the aggressive feelings that one has for one’s fellow man from time to time. Calmly, quietly, and with as many power tools as possible.

title: Pusher
synopsis: After a complicated heroin deal goes wrong, small-time drug dealer Frank loses both the money and the merchandise, and finds himself massively in debt to Balkan drug baron Milo. As time goes by the pressure mounts, with Frank trying to repay the money in the face of Milo’s increasing frustration.

title: Pushing Hands
synopsis: Elderly Tai chi master Mr. Chu struggles to adjust to life in New York after moving from Beijing. Living with his son, Alex, he immediately butts heads with his white daughter-in-law, Martha. When Chu begins teaching Tai chi at a school, his desire to make a meaningful connection comes to fruition.

title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
synopsis: When Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll and he has burned through eight of his nine lives, he launches an epic journey to restore them by finding the mythical Last Wish.

title: Pussy
synopsis: Alone for the night, a young woman eagerly plans for a sweet solo pleasure session. But as she gets started, unexpected interruptions turn her private moment into a chaotic adventure.

title: Putin's Witnesses
synopsis: On New Year’s Eve, 1999, President of Russia Boris Yeltsin appoints Vladimir Putin as his successor. As the 2000 election draws near, Vitaly Mansky and his team are granted extensive access to Putin’s presidential campaign. Compiling the footage later, Mansky reflects on the leader’s rise to power.

title: Quando o Tempo Cair
synopsis: An elderly man lives in a cramped apartment with his unemployed son and a young grandson too young to grasp their struggles. Hoping to ease the family’s burdens, he sets out to find work—but soon discovers a world that has left him behind.

title: Que Teus Olhos Sejam Atendidos
synopsis: Documentary on the research for the production of the film Lavoura Arcaica (2001), based on the novel of the same name by Raduan Nassar. Two filmmakers take a trip with an uncertain destination through the mountains of Lebanon, Syria and southern Spain.

title: Queen of Diamonds
synopsis: Firdaus is a Blackjack dealer in a Las Vegas landscape juxtaposed between glittering casino lights and the deteriorating desert oasis. Negotiating a missing husband and neighboring domestic violence, Firdaus’ world unfolds as a fragmented interplay between repetition and repressed anger.

title: Queen of Earth
synopsis: Catherine absconds to the sun-soaked serenity of her best friend Virginia’s lakeside cabin, quivering with anxiety and seeking refuge from the haunting memories of the past year. But as their painful pasts come slithering into the already-uncomfortable present, their nerves become intertwined.

title: Queen of Glory
synopsis: Sarah Obeng, the brilliant child of Ghanaian immigrants, is quitting her Ivy League PhD program to follow her married lover to Ohio. When her mother dies suddenly, she bequeaths her daughter a Christian bookstore in the Pelham Parkway section of the Bronx where Sarah was raised.

title: Queen & Slim
synopsis: Slim and Queen’s first date takes an unexpected turn when a policeman pulls them over for a minor traffic violation. When the situation escalates, Slim takes the officer’s gun and shoots him in self-defence. Now labelled cop killers in the media, Slim and Queen have no choice but to go on the run.

title: Queens of Drama
synopsis: Pop diva Mimi Madamour’s career peaks in 2005 before spiraling downwards due to her tumultuous love affair with punk icon Billie Kohler, their passionate and rage-fueled relationship playing out on stage for half a century.

title: Queens of the Qing Dynasty
synopsis: Star, a suicidal teen now too old for foster care, develops a candid rapport with An, a student from Shanghai assigned to watch over her in the hospital. A nightly exchange of secrets, text messages and possessions quickly expands the boundaries of their relationship, altering their inner chemistry.

title: Queer
synopsis: 1950. William Lee, an American expat in Mexico City, spends his days almost entirely alone, except for a few contacts with other members of the community. His encounter with Eugene Allerton, an expat former soldier, shows him that it might be finally possible to establish an intimate connection.

title: Querelle
synopsis: In the port of Brest, handsome Belgian sailor Querelle turns on his drug-smuggling accomplice and murders him. He then goes to a notorious brothel run by the eccentric Lysiane, who will lead him on a voyage of highly charged, violent homosexual self-discovery that will change him forever.

title: Who's Stopping Us
synopsis: Over the course of five years, a group of 21st-century teenagers from Madrid commence their journey towards adulthood. The teens talk about insecurities, wanting to be accepted, and loneliness. Meanwhile, they ask a collective question: who are we, and who do we want to be?

title: Quiet Chaos
synopsis: Aging entertainment industry exec Pietro returns from a beach trip to find his wife dead. Distraught, Pietro renews his dedication to raising his 10-year-old daughter, Claudia. But trouble ensues when he begins neglecting his job, electing to sit on a park bench outside Claudia’s school instead.

title: Quo vadis, Aida?
synopsis: Bosnia, July 1995. Aida is a translator for the United Nations in Srebrenica. When the Serbian army takes over the small town, her family is among the thousands looking for shelter in the UN camp. Aida has access to crucial information. What lies ahead for her family and people—rescue or death?

title: Rabbit Hole
synopsis: In the suburbs of America, Becca and Howie Corbett, once a picture-perfect couple, struggle to return to their everyday existence several months after the loss of their child. Embarking on separate journeys, Becca and Howie make increasingly unexpected choices that threaten to pull them apart.

title: Rabiye Kurnaz vs. George W. Bush
synopsis: The battle for the release of her son Murat from Guantanamo catapults Turkish housewife Rabiye Kurnaz from her house in Bremen straight into world politics and all the way to the Supreme Court in Washington. The temperamental mother and a human rights lawyer fight side-by-side to get Murat out.

title: Radical
synopsis: Sergio is a new teacher at an elementary school in Matamoros, known for having the worst grades in Mexico. For the kids, it feels like a dead end. Determined to make a change, Sergio decides to turn the tables and sets his pupils problem-solving challenges that stimulate and engage them.

title: Radio Arrow
synopsis: Five friends Freccia, Bruno, Tito, Jena and Boris are very keen on music but they live in a little town in northern Italy and spend most of their days at the local bar. They decide to set up an independent radio which soon becomes the voice of a generation.

title: Radio Mary
synopsis: Mary lives alone and is waiting for something to happen in her life. Riding the elevator to work, a strange man grabs her shoulder and speaks to her telepathically: “Do you believe in magic?”. Mary can now hear people’s thoughts, and she starts hearing music that seems to be broadcast from her mind.

title: Radio-Serpent
synopsis: In a futuristic Parisian apartment, five silent characters move beneath strobing lights to a robotic music score. A blue-eyed girl dressed in bold 1980s fashion reappears frequently. She plays songs from a jukebox, lounges on a couch, and finds herself surrounded by colorful falling balloons.

title: Rafiki
synopsis: In Nairobi, Kenya, Kena and Ziki long for a life beyond their circumstances. Despite the political rivalry between their families, the two girls support each other in pursuing their dreams within a conservative society. But Kena and Ziki face a difficult choice when love blossoms between them.

title: Raging Bull
synopsis: In the 1940s Bronx, middleweight boxer Jake LaMotta fights his way to the championship. But the rage and violence that propel him to the top threaten to destroy everything outside the ring—including his marriage, and his relationship with his brother and manager, Joey.

title: Rainbow: A Private Affair
synopsis: Piedmont, mid-1940s. The Italian Civil War rages. Resistance fighter Milton hears rumors of an affair between his former friend, Giorgio, and his unrequited love, Fulvia. Determined to seek answers, he discovers Giorgio has been captured by fascists. Giving chase, his loyalties are tested.

title: Ramen Shop
synopsis: Masato is a ramen chef in Japan. After the sudden death of his father, he finds a suitcase of memorabilia and a notebook—filled with musings and old photos—left behind by his Singaporean mother. Acting on a hunch, he takes off to Singapore for a culinary journey hoping to piece together his life.

title: Ramona
synopsis: A young actress prepares for the role of a pregnant teenager by interviewing young women about pregnancy and motherhood. In the process, the girls candidly recount their lives and circumstances, shaping the character of Ramona who becomes an ode to the power of collaborative creativity.

title: Rampage
synopsis: Another producer/ director George Gittoes journey into the forbidden zones—America’s war in Iraq, and in its own backyard, life in a Miami ‘hood—an exploration of hiphop’s musical innovations.

title: Rams
synopsis: Brothers Gummi and Kiddi are sheep farmers living on neighbouring farms in Iceland. They haven’t spoken to each other for 40 years. Following an outbreak of a potentially lethal disease for sheep, the government insist they have to be slaughtered. The brothers must reunite to save their way of life.

title: Ran
synopsis: After years of ruthless slaughter, warlord Hidetora Ichimonji divides his medieval kingdom among his three sons, seeking a peaceful retirement. However, his life descends into chaos as he is unable to escape the greed and corruption within his own family and the torment within his soul.

title: Rapado
synopsis: Lucio is a young man stuck living at home with his parents. After the theft of his motorcycle, Lucio bums aimlessly around Buenos Aires, drifting from one arcade and record store to the next—indulging in short chats with friends and, more often, setting out onto the streets alone.

title: Rare Exports: A Christmas Tale
synopsis: On Christmas Eve in northern Finland, an archaeological excavation uncovers the real Santa Claus. However, this Santa isn’t the jolly figure you want coming to town. When local children start vanishing, Pietari and his father capture Santa and attempt to sell him to the corporate sponsor of the dig.

title: Rashômon
synopsis: In 11th-century Japan, a samurai is found dead. Four conflicting accounts are given by a woodcutter, a bandit, the samurai’s wife, and the samurai’s spirit, summoned by a medium. Each tells a different version of the crime—but is anyone telling the truth?

title: Rave On
synopsis: Kosmo, a Berlin-based music producer, sets out to hand his new vinyl to a legendary DJ at the city’s most notorious techno club. But a simple mission turns into an odyssey as one long night forces him to face his past, his failures, and the dreams he left behind.

title: Ravens
synopsis: A hard-working farmer, desperate due to the harsh reality of his daily struggle, is determined to have his son take over the farm and continue his legacy. The mother tries her best to keep the family together, but with increasing horror the son witnesses his father’s psychotic behavior escalate.

title: RBG
synopsis: U.S. Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg developed a lengthy legal legacy while becoming an unexpected pop culture icon. But the unique personal journey of her rise to the nation’s highest court has been largely unknown, even to some of her biggest fans—until now.

title: Reading Lolita in Tehran
synopsis: In Tehran, as morality squads raid homes and fundamentalists seize control of universities, professor Azar Nafisi secretly gathers a small group of devoted female students. Behind closed doors, they read forbidden Western classics, still meeting even as repression intensifies.

title: Real Love
synopsis: Once content with his small-town life, Mario is thrown for a loop when his wife of two decades leaves home. He struggles to raise his two teenage daughters by himself as he tries to overcome problems of his own. In a last-ditch effort to revive his marriage, Mario joins a local theater project.

title: Reality
synopsis: Luciano is a charming and affable fishmonger whose unexpected and sudden obsession with being a contestant on the reality show Big Brother leads him down a rabbit hole of skewed perceptions and paranoia. So overcome by his dream of being on reality TV, Luciano’s reality spirals out of control.

title: Reality+
synopsis: Vincent, a young Parisian uncomfortable with his appearance, installs a brain chip named Reality+ which allows users to see themselves and fellow users with their dream body. However, Reality+ only works over 12-hour intervals, proving infuriating for Vincent as he falls for Stella, another user.

title: Reality
synopsis: A former American intelligence specialist receives the longest sentence for unauthorized disclosure of government information to the media. The leaked details pertain to Russian interference in the 2016 United States elections through an email operation.

title: Realm of Satan
synopsis: In sunny California, the Church of Satan has thrived since 1966. Half a century later, its members offer a rare glimpse into their lives, revealing everyday rituals and occult practices—from hanging laundry in the garden to latex orgies and the breastfeeding of a baby goat.

title: Rebuilding
synopsis: After wildfires take his ranch, a cowboy named Dusty winds up in a FEMA camp, finding community with others who lost homes, including his daughter and ex-wife.

title: [REC]
synopsis: Over the course of an evening, a television reporter and her camera crew follow a group of firefighters who are summoned to rescue a woman trapped in a building, with nightmarish results. Before they know it, inhabitants, helpers and crew are locked in the building because of an unknown virus.

title: [REC] 3: Genesis
synopsis: Koldo and Clara’s wedding is horrifically interrupted when some of the guests start showing signs of a strange illness. Before they know what’s happening, the bride and groom find themselves in the middle of a hellish ordeal, as an uncontrollable torrent of violence is unleashed.

title: Recce
synopsis: When a renowned film director clashes with the young son of a house she’s using as a filming location, a power struggle ensues, forcing the director to confront her own arrogance.

title: Recycling Life / I Found Dostoyevsky in Garbage
synopsis: This story is about a beggar, a thief, and a child working on the street, a paper garbage collector, a leftist, a Muslim, a father, and a second-hand book dealer… Oktay Çetinkaya, full of life, tells us the stories of back streets, ghosts with whom he shared his own history, living as one of them.

title: Red Hook Summer
synopsis: Flik, a middle-class boy from Atlanta, is spending the summer with his religious grandfather in a Brooklyn housing project. With his grandfather’s preaching and the culture shock of inner-city life, Flik’s summer is a disaster—until he meets local girl Chazz, who shows him Brooklyn’s brighter side.

title: Red Island
synopsis: Thomas, a young boy, lives under French colonialism in Madagascar during the late 1960s and early 1970s.

title: Red Rocket
synopsis: Down and out in Los Angeles, ex-porn star Mikey Saber returns to his hometown of Texas City, where his estranged wife and mother-in-law live. As he begins to patch things up and make a living as a drug dealer, Mikey becomes smitten with Strawberry, a teenager working at a local doughnut shop.

title: Red Rooms
synopsis: The high-profile case of serial killer Ludovic Chevalier has just gone to trial, and Kelly-Anne is obsessed. When reality blurs with her morbid fantasies, she goes down a dark path to seek the final piece of the puzzle.

title: Red Wood Pigeon
synopsis: Michele is the leader of the Italian communist party and a professional water polo player. Following a car accident, he’s just lost his memory. So he has to learn about his life again—through an improvised psychoanalytic trip symbolized by the friendships and adversities of a water polo game.

title: Refugiado
synopsis: Matias and his mother Laura, find themselves forced to hurriedly abandon the house they live in to escape another outburst of violence from Fabian. Matias is 8 and Laura is newly pregnant. Thus they begin a wandering journey in search of a place where they can feel safe and protected.

title: Rehearsals for Extinct Anatomies
synopsis: Oscillating hands each hold a pen; a man made of wire has a malevolent look and an roving eye as he pokes at a bump on his forehead. Op-art stripes are in the fabric. Lines become jumbles that become balls that oscillate, bounce, or stay suspended in air.

title: Reindeerspotting
synopsis: Jani is a 19-year-old who lives in Rovaniemi, Finland, best known for being the home of Santa Claus. His everyday life is spent in the company of friends, either injecting drugs or committing petty crimes. The question is: For how long can Jani be on the run without having to confront his past?

title: Relay
synopsis: Follows Tom, who keeps his identity hidden while brokering lucrative payoffs between corrupt corporations and the individuals who threaten their ruin, but his rules change after a potential client reaches to seek protection to stay alive.

title: Relic
synopsis: When Edna, the elderly and widowed matriarch of the family, goes missing, her daughter Kay and granddaughter Sam travel to their remote family home to find her. Soon after her return, they start to discover a sinister presence haunting the house and taking control of Edna.

title: Rendez-vous
synopsis: Nina arrives in Paris with dreams of becoming an actress and soon moves in with peep-show performer Quentin and estate agent Paulot. While Nina is attracted to the mysterious and disturbed Quentin, she dismisses Paulot’s advances. However, a tragic event will change all of their lives forever.

title: Rendez-vous romantiques
synopsis: Michka Gorki receives and films, without their knowledge, the men that have approached her in the street. How do men of different ages and backgrounds react when faced with their dream: to be received by a woman that they like, who is rich and consenting?

title: Repo! The Genetic Opera
synopsis: In the near future, as humankind is suffering a worldwide epidemic of organ failures, a multinational biotech corporation launches a finance program for organ transplants. But those who miss their monthly payments are pursued by Repo Men, who retrieve the company’s property swiftly and painfully.

title: Reprise
synopsis: Erik and Philip have been best friends since childhood and both want to become writers. While Erik’s manuscript is refused by the publishers as lacking in talent, Philip is eagerly welcomed and overnight becomes a young star in Norway’s literary scene. Soon, their young dreams clash with reality.

title: Respiro
synopsis: A close-knit fishing community in South-West Sicily has remained unchanged for centuries. However, Grazia, the wife of one of the fishermen, has an unconventional attitude to life. The community decides that Grazia needs medical attention and attempts to have her treated in the city.

title: Rest in Paper
synopsis: Ghulam Ali is an Indian citizen who found himself stateless in 1947. Lacking the correct paperwork, he gets caught in a chain of arrests and deportation, crossing the border many times and eventually loses his sense of belonging and identity.

title: Results
synopsis: Danny is newly divorced, wealthy, and totally aimless. To add structure to his life, he joins a gym where he meets the self-styled owner Trevor. But he quickly falls for his audacious new trainer, Kat, who is Trevor’s ex-flame. Soon, their lives become entangled, both professionally and personally.

title: Return to Reason
synopsis: Filmmaker Jim Jarmusch and musician Carter Logan’s band SQÜRL soundtrack four silent short films by the surrealist Man Ray. As SQÜRL’s cosmic score plays, Return to Reason (1923), Emak-Bakia (1926), L’Étoile de mer (1929), and Les Mystères du château de Dé (1927) form one unique piece.

title: Return to Seoul
synopsis: Wanting to reconnect with her origins, 25-year-old Freddie impulsively returns to her birthplace of South Korea for the first time since she was adopted and raised in France. Freddie begins to track down her biological parents, embarking on an unexpected journey in a country she knows little about.

title: Revanche
synopsis: In a ragged section of Vienna, hardened ex-con Alex works in a brothel, where he falls for Ukrainian sex worker Tamara. Their desperate plans for escape unexpectedly intersect with the lives of a rural cop and his seemingly content wife, leading to acts of vengeance and redemption.

title: Revenge
synopsis: Jen is on a romantic getaway with her wealthy boyfriend, when his friends suddenly arrive for a hunting trip. Tensions in the house mount until things culminate in a shocking act that leaves Jen abandoned to die. Unfortunately for her assailants, Jen survives and reemerges with one intent: revenge.

title: Reveries
synopsis: Two mysterious drifters travel the American landscape and journey into their own unravelling minds and psyches.

title: Reveries: Going Deeper
synopsis: In a dystopian society, two mysterious drifters transmit pirate radio broadcasts from their underground bunker, journeying deep into their own minds… deeper than they’ve ever been before…

title: Reveries: The Mind Prison
synopsis: Two mysterious drifters find themselves in an endless desert landscape. They have been lost for a long time, telling stories through which reality becomes fuzzy, and in which nightmares sometimes look like dreams. They embark on an ambitious journey: to escape from the mind prison once and for all.

title: Revolver
synopsis: Gambler Jake Green enters into a game with potentially deadly consequences.

title: Revolver
synopsis: Cipriani, the deputy warden of Milan’s prison, is blackmailed by his wife’s kidnappers. Forced to help a French thug, Milo Ruiz, escape, he soon realizes they are both just pawns in a vast conspiracy involving politics, the police, and a plot to assassinate an oil tycoon.

title: Rewind & Play
synopsis: In December 1969, legendary pianist and composer Thelonious Monk ended his European tour in Paris. Before the show, Monk appeared on French TV to perform and speak with French jazz pianist Henri Renaud. Newly discovered footage reveals the disconnect between Monk and his interviewer.

title: Rey
synopsis: In the nineteenth century, a French adventurer sets off to establish a kingdom in the inhospitable South of Chile, uniting the feared Mapuche under him. The response of the Chilean army is devastating. At least, that’s one version of this true story.

title: Richard III
synopsis: In 1930s England, a brutal civil war erupts with the Houses of Lancaster and York battling for control of the throne. Amid the turmoil, the despotic Richard, Duke of Gloucester, plots his own route to power, deviously scheming a murderous agenda to ascend as dictator monarch.

title: Riddle of Fire
synopsis: Wyoming, USA. When their mother asks them to run an errand, three mischievous children embark on an odyssey. On the hunt to obtain her favorite blueberry pie, the children are kidnapped by poachers, battle a witch, outwit a huntsman, befriend a fairy, and become best pals forever.

title: Riders of Justice
synopsis: After his wife dies in a tragic train accident, the recently-deployed Markus must return home to his care for his teenage daughter. But when a survivor of the wrecked train surfaces claiming foul play, Markus begins to suspect his wife was murdered and embarks on a mission to find those responsible.

title: Rimini
synopsis: Two men, two brothers, their childhood home in Lower Austria. They drink to their late mother, they bury her. Then they drive back to their real lives. But sooner or later both their pasts will catch up with them.

title: Ring
synopsis: A group of teenage friends are found dead, their faces twisted in terror. Reiko, a journalist and the aunt of one of the victims, sets out to investigate. In the process, she uncovers an urban legend about a cursed videotape, the contents of which causes anyone who views it to die within a week.

title: Riotsville, U.S.A.
synopsis: In the 1960s, while riots were taking place in Chicago, Newark, and Detroit, the U.S. Army built fake towns in an effort to train an increasingly militarized police force. Archival military footage reveals the elaborate staging of protests in front of applauding spectators and rolling cameras.

title: Risk
synopsis: Cornered in a tiny building for five years, Julian Assange remains undeterred even as the legal action he faces threatens to undermine the organization he leads and fracture the movement he inspired. But after years of unparalleled access, the director becomes wary of her subject’s motives.

title: River of Grass
synopsis: Cozy, a thirtyish Florida housewife bored to tears with her drudging life, runs away with Lee, a young loser in search of thrills. After accidentally shooting a man, Cozy and Lee try to go on the lam as every outlaw couple before them—without quite ever getting it right.

title: Rıza
synopsis: Rıza is a truck driver. When his truck breaks down, Rıza can’t work and his livelihood is threatened. Using every possible means, he desperately tries to drum up the money for the repairs. And this includes being prepared to commit a brutal crime.

title: Road North
synopsis: Timo is an esteemed concert pianist whose personal life is on the rocks. One day Timo finds an older, shabby-looking man at his door. The man, Leo, turns out to be his father who left the country when Timo was three — and hasn’t been in touch in 35 years.

title: Road to Ythaca
director: Guto Parente, Luiz Pretti, Pedro Diogenes, Ricardo Pretti
synopsis: Four friends—played by the four directors—have recently lost a fifth friend. After a night of heavy drinking, they decide to travel to the mythical Ythaca. They don’t seem to be looking for a real place but rather for a phenomenon that involves friendship, discovery, and adventure.

title: Robe of Gems
synopsis: Deep in the Mexican countryside, a community is plagued by the constant threat of looming violence. Here, three women from different social classes—a maid, her wealthy employer and a police officer—become tragically affected by a missing-person case related to cartel crime.

title: Robinson's Place
synopsis: Daniel and Jackson, two penniless young men, meet up to pick up girls. In the streets of Montmartre, they approach a woman and decide to accompany her to a dance hall—but once there, she ends up dancing with another guy. Furious, they take their revenge in the pettiest way.

title: RoboCop
synopsis: In a violent future in Old Detroit, murdered police officer Alex Murphy is resurrected as a powerful cyborg law enforcer. As he fights crime, he begins to recover memories of his past and seeks revenge on the gang who killed him.

title: Robot Dreams
synopsis: Dog lives in Manhattan and he’s tired of being alone. One day he decides to build himself a robot, a companion. Their friendship blossoms, and they become inseparable. One summer night, Dog, with great sadness, is forced to abandon Robot at the beach. Will they ever meet again?

title: Rock, Weed and Wheels
synopsis: A car show / music festival gets out of control and the Mexican government has a perfect target to blame for what they claim is the country’s biggest problems. It’s just young people that want to have a good time.

title: Rocket Rain
synopsis: A video artist working on his latest project is unexpectedly visited by his long lost friend, who is having a troubled relationship with his wife. During their awkward reunion, they became aware of how far apart they have grown, and at the same time they engage in earnest conversations.

title: Rocks
synopsis: 15-year-old Rocks fears that she and her little brother Emmanuel will be taken into care and forced apart if anyone finds out that their mother has left them. Against all odds, and with the help of her loyal friends, she evades the authorities and navigates the most defining days of her young life.

title: Rocky VI
synopsis: Touching down in Helsinki, the all-star American boxer Rocky defends the Free World by fighting against a gigantic opponent from Siberia named Igor. Will Rocky finally meet his match?

title: Rodeo
synopsis: Julia, a young misfit who is passionate about riding, meets a crew of dirt riders who fly along at full speed and perform stunts. She sets about infiltrating their male-dominated world, but an accident jeopardizes her ability to fit in.

title: Rodrigo D: No Future
synopsis: Rodrigo and his friends, restless teens in Medellín’s hillside shantytowns, spend their days stirring up trouble. But Rodrigo has dreams of playing rock and roll. He rallies his friends to form a punk band—which emerges as their salvation from a web of aimlessness, violence, drugs, and fear.

title: Rojo
synopsis: Claudio is a middle-aged lawyer with a prosperous life in a quiet town in mid-70s Argentina, just before the military coup. But his life begins to unravel when a Chilean private detective comes to investigate the disappearance of a confrontational stranger Claudio had humiliated some months before.

title: Romance X
synopsis: After three months as a couple together, Paul no longer feels any physical desire for Marie, yet claims he loves her. But for Marie, sex is essential to her expression of love. She decides to look elsewhere for physical affection, and embarks on a series of increasingly extreme sexual encounters.

title: Rome, Open City
synopsis: In WWII-era Rome, underground resistance leader Manfredi attempts to evade the Gestapo by enlisting the help of Pina, the fiancée of a fellow member of the resistance, and Don Pietro, the priest due to oversee her marriage. But it’s not long before the Nazis and the local police find him.

title: Romería
synopsis: A woman travels to the Galician city of Vigo to meet her biological father’s family. Like her mother, he died of AIDS when she was very young. Through her encounters with the family, she attempts to piece together the story of her father and the love he shared with her mother.

title: Room
synopsis: Jack, a spirited five-year-old, is looked after by his devoted Ma, doing typical things like playing games and telling stories. However, they are trapped in a windowless, 11-by-11-foot space. As Jack’s curiosity grows, and Ma’s resilience reaches its breaking point, they plan a risky escape.

title: Room 237
synopsis: In the decades since The Shining’s release, many of the film’s devotees have claimed to have decoded its secret messages. Cultists and scholars are interviewed to deconstruct Kubrick’s classic, addressing everything from the genocide of Native Americans to a range of government conspiracies.

title: Room 666
synopsis: In a small hotel room at the 1982 Cannes Film Festival, Wim Wenders initiates a survey among his colleagues about the future of cinema. Godard, Fassbinder, Spielberg, Antonioni, Herzog, and other filmmakers respond to Wenders’ question: “Is cinema a language about to get lost, an art about to die?”

title: Room in Rome
synopsis: A hotel room in the heart of Rome. Two young women who have only just met travel together on an intimate, passionate journey that will deeply mark their bodies and souls. The story unfolds over twelve nocturnal hours, before each woman departs, Alba to Spain and Natasha to Russia.

title: Rosalie
synopsis: The story of the first bearded lady attraction. Rosalie has a secret—her face and body are covered in hair. She’s concealed her hirsutism all her life, shaving to be accepted in polite society. But her perspective changes when Abel, a bar owner unaware of her secret, marries her for her dowry.

title: Rose
synopsis: In the early 17th century, a soldier arrives at an isolated Protestant village in Germany claiming to be the heir to an abandoned farmstead. Even though he proves to be a good man, the villagers’ suspicions about his identity grow and they force a reckoning.

title: Rose of Nevada
synopsis: A mysterious boat returns to a village 30 years after vanishing. Two men join its crew hoping for better fortune. After one voyage, they find themselves transported back in time, mistaken for the original crew.

title: Rose Plays Julie
synopsis: While studying veterinary science at university, Rose decides to contact Ellen, her birth mother who gave her up for adoption. Ellen, now a successful actress, is reluctant to meet. Eventually, Rose’s tenacity pays off—but Ellen is forced to reveal a secret she has kept hidden for over 20 years.

title: Rosebush Pruning
synopsis: Underneath the Catalonian sun, a rich white American family lives in hedonistic isolation, seeking love and validation through one another, their designer wardrobes and pop music. When an outsider infiltrates the family, buried tensions surface and blood ties are severed.

title: Rotting in the Sun
synopsis: After encountering social media celebrity Jordan Firstman at a gay nudist beach, Sebastián Silva reluctantly agrees to direct his new project. But when Sebastián goes missing, Jordan embarks on a wild, quasi-detective journey through Mexico City.

title: Oh Mercy!
synopsis: During a somber Christmas season in Roubaix, a middle-aged, French-Algerian detective is investigating the fatal strangulation of a poor, elderly woman in her apartment. Suspicion falls on her next-door neighbors, two young white women with a complicated interpersonal bond.

title: Rouge
synopsis: A famous filmmaker works on his next film, which will focus on monstrosity. He is obsessed by the idea of finding a painting that will be central to the film and will crystallize all the power and beauty of monsters.

title: Kaamyaab
synopsis: Sudhir had a brilliant career as an actor, though mostly in supporting roles or as the villain. Now old, he looks up his filmography and realizes that he was in 499 films. To his surprise, one young film buff remembers Sudhir’s past roles, and he really wants a round of 500 films.

title: RRR
synopsis:
An epic tale of a fearless tribal warrior on a dangerous mission, who confronts a steely Indian Imperial Police officer serving the British Raj. 
RRR is a historical fiction film featuring characters inspired by two real-life Indian freedom fighters.

title: Rubber
synopsis: Robert, an inanimate tire that has been abandoned in the desert, suddenly and inexplicably comes to life. As Robert roams the bleak landscape, he discovers that he possesses terrifying telepathic powers that give him the ability to destroy anything he wishes without having to move.

title: Rui Ka Bojh
synopsis: Kishan Shah is a self-respecting, wise old man who has divided his property amongst his family and now lives with his youngest son, Ram Sharan. He is not able, however, to get along with him and his family for too long.

title: Ruined Heart: Another Lovestory Between a Criminal & a Whore
synopsis: Boy meets girl. But no, it’s not about that or the giddiness of a new romance. It’s about untimely death (no one’s sure of anything these days), true love, soul mates. It’s about the gun and the rose. Genre bending. Heart breaking. An avalanche of colors. Deadpan romance. Lips syncing, singing.

title: Rumours
director: Guy Maddin, Evan Johnson, Galen Johnson
synopsis: The leaders of seven wealthy democracies get lost in the woods and face increasing peril while attempting to draft a provisional statement regarding a global crisis.

title: Rush
synopsis: A biography of Formula 1 champion driver Niki Lauda and the 1976 crash that almost claimed his life. Mere weeks after the accident, he got behind the wheel to challenge his rival, James Hunt.

title: Russian Ark
synopsis: Shot in one long, continuous take, a 19th century French marquis takes a surreal trip through Russian and European history via a labyrinth of neverending ballrooms and corridors. Filmed entirely in the The State Hermitage Museum in St. Petersburg.

title: RYUICHI SAKAMOTO: async AT THE PARK AVENUE ARMORY
synopsis: A live performance film capturing an intimate concert by composer, pianist and music producer Ryuichi Sakamoto in New York City. The performance marked the first public unveiling of Sakamoto’s new opus, async, hailed as one of the best albums of 2017 by Rolling Stone and Pitchfork.

title: Ryuichi Sakamoto: Coda
synopsis: One of the most important artists of our era, Ryuichi Sakamoto’s career spans from techno-pop stardom to Oscar®-winning composer and anti-nuclear activist. This intimate portrait explores Sakamoto’s return to music following a cancer diagnosis, leading to the creation of a haunting new masterpiece.

title: Ryuichi Sakamoto | Opus
synopsis: In late 2022, as his health declined, Ryuichi Sakamoto gathered his strength for one final performance. Alone with his piano and filmed by his son, Neo Sora, he plays 20 pieces spanning his career—from his Yellow Magic Orchestra days to his Bertolucci film scores to his final album, 12.

title: Sacred Heart
synopsis: Irene, an unscrupulous business woman, is forced to re-evaluate her priorities after the suicide of her two best friends.

title: Saint Frances
synopsis: Flailing thirty-something Bridget finally catches a break when she meets a nice guy and lands a much-needed job nannying the obstinate six-year-old Frances. However, an unwanted pregnancy introduces an unexpected complication. Amidst her personal issues, a reluctant friendship with Frances emerges.

title: Saint Laurent
synopsis: Over a decade, spanning 1967 to 1976, the legendary French fashion designer Yves Saint Laurent enters an era of freedom. In a dark, hedonistic, and wildly creative time, the couturier moves through a string of ateliers and nightclubs whose centers of gravity all seem to realign around him.

title: Saint Louis Blues
synopsis: At the end of summer, six impatient travelers are in a rush to leave Dakar for Saint-Louis. Through the long taxi journey, with its intense heat and overcrowded routes, these passengers, who seemingly have nothing in common, unite their destinies by turning their life stories into songs.

title: Saint Maud
synopsis: Live-in nurse Maud arrives at the home of Amanda, a former famous dancer. Amanda is intrigued by this religious young woman, who is tormented by a secret past and by messages she believes are from God. As Maud’s grip on reality slides out of control, she embarks on a mission to save Amanda’s soul.

title: Saint Omer
synopsis: Novelist Rama attends the trial of Laurence Coly, a woman accused of killing her 15-month-old daughter. As the legal proceedings move forward, the words of the accused along with witness testimonies begin to shake Rama’s convictions and call into question both her judgment and that of the viewer.

title: Saipan
synopsis: On the eve of the 2002 FIFA World Cup, the Irish captain Roy Keane forfeits his place in the squad at the team’s preparation base in Saipan, following a heated disagreement with the Irish manager Mick McCarthy.

title: Salaam Venky
synopsis: The film is centered around a true story of a mother and her son, Venky, who suffers from Duchenne muscular dystrophy.

title: Salon Kitty
synopsis: Berlin, 1939. SS officer Helmut Wallenburg is commanded to establish a brothel catering to the Nazi elite. Wallenburg selects and trains 20 young Aryan women committed to the ideals of National Socialism and prepared to degrade themselves for their masters.

title: Saltburn
synopsis: Struggling to fit in at Oxford University, Oliver Quick finds himself drawn into the world of the charming and aristocratic Felix Catton, who invites him to Saltburn, his eccentric family’s sprawling estate, for a summer never to be forgotten.

title: Sam Bahadur
synopsis: The highs and lows of Sam Manekshaw, the first Indian Army officer to be promoted to the rank of Field Marshal.

title: Samia
synopsis: Samia, a teen from an Algerian family living on the outskirts of Marseille, must navigate the constraints of her repressive older brother, while also facing the prejudices of close-minded locals. Stifled, Samia takes matters into her own hands to shape the future she desires.

title: San Siro
synopsis: The stadium takes center stage as countless people work its infrastructure and the crowd rises into its columns—all in anticipation of our modern gladiators.

title: Sans soleil
synopsis: An unnamed woman narrates the letters and philosophical reflections of an invisible world traveler accompanied by footage of Guinea-Bissau, Cape Verde, Iceland, Paris, San Francisco and, most significantly, Tokyo—a city whose people, streets, malls and temples inspire the traveler’s observations.

title: Santo vs. the Riders of Terror
synopsis: A bunch of angry lepers escape an institution, turn into outlaws, raid a town, and attract the attention of some local badmen who want to team up with them to wreak havoc. Enter a good hombre with a silver mask: El Santo, who shall restore peace.

title: Santo vs. the Infernal Men
synopsis: Agent Joaquín recalls his latest mission while lying wounded in an ambulance: Joaquín has infiltrated a band of smugglers. When the villains learn the truth about him, they kidnap Joaquín’s fiancée. Santo comes to her rescue and fights the band.

title: Santosh
synopsis: A widow takes her late husband’s job as police officer and learns about some of his dark secrets.

title: Sasquatch Sunset
synopsis: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches—possibly the last of their enigmatic kind— embark on an absurdist, epic, hilarious, and ultimately poignant journey over the course of one year.

title: Satan in High Heels
synopsis: Stacey Kane (Meg Myles) is the anti-hero of Satan in High Heels, a carnival stripper who goes on the lam and proceeds to bend the nightclub world to her devices in a series of intense power plays.

title: Saturdays Disorders
synopsis: During a surreal pilgrimage to the town of Luján, the protagonist Luján finds herself lost in a maze of suburban oddities. Meanwhile, the local tennis complex is hosting a bizarre tournament featuring only two players.

title: Saturn in Opposition
synopsis: This film focuses on contemporary 30- and 40-somethings trying to make sense of their lives in an age in which the old certainties have disappeared.

title: Sauvage
synopsis: Leo is a young sex worker. The men come and go, but he stays there—longing for affection. Leo’s solitude is momentarily relieved when he falls for fellow sex worker Ahd. But after Ahd violently rebuffs his romantic advances, Leo questions if he will ever find the love he desperately craves.

title: Savage
synopsis: An exploration of masculinity and violence. A story of obsession and revenge, as a man tries to come to terms with a brutal, random attack and it’s consequences.

title: Savages!
synopsis: Kéria (11), a vivid indigenous girl, finds an orphaned baby orang-outan, Oshi in the jungle of Borneo. To keep him safe she brings him to a close-by reserve. But her ambitious father, working as a woodsman, cooperates with a poacher in order to steal the baby.

title: Bugonia
synopsis: Two conspiracy-obsessed friends kidnap the CEO of a powerful pharmaceutical company, convinced she is an alien plotting Earth’s destruction. As paranoia mounts, their clash spirals into a dangerous game where reality, ideology, and control violently collide.

title: Scala!!!
synopsis: Amid post-punk Britain, Scala cinema stood out for its diverse film offerings, spanning high art, cult classics, sexploitation, horror, Kung-Fu, and LGBTQIA+. An inspiration for creatives, this documentary tells the riotous inside story and features unseen archive footage, interviews and film clips.

title: Scanners
synopsis: A race of telepaths with the ability to ‘scan’ other humans can read people’s thoughts, control their movement and even take over their consciousness. Most Scanners are harmless, but one Scanner with bad intentions becomes hellbent on building a psychic army to take over the world.

title: Scarlet
synopsis: After failing to avenge her father’s murder, Princess Scarlet wakes up in a fantastical realm between life and death. Struggling to escape from this paranormal purgatory, she encounters Hijiri, an idealistic young man who shows her the possibility of a future free of bitterness and rage.

title: Scenes from a Marriage (Theatrical Version)
synopsis: Doctor Johan and attorney Marianne are a successful professional couple who juggle their careers with marriage and children. Over many years of love and turmoil, their relationship progresses through multiple stages: matrimony, infidelity, divorce, and subsequent partnerships.

title: Chess Story
synopsis: Vienna, 1938: Austria is occupied by the Nazis. To withstand the Gestapo’s psychological torture, an imprisoned lawyer immerses himself the world of chess.

title: Schlingensief: A Voice That Shook the Silence
synopsis: Christoph Schlingensief’s Heimat films, performance art, installations, and provocative television, operatic, and artistic productions shaped Germany’s cultural and political discourse for two decades. Unpublished and newly digitized footage captures the vast spectrum of Schlingensief’s impact.

title: Scott Walker: 30 Century Man
synopsis: Four years in the making, this documentary is an in-depth look at the enigmatic American musician who turned his back on fame to follow a very singular and uncompromising artistic path, and who morphed into one of the most influential and enigmatic figures in rock history.

title: Scrapper
synopsis: Living alone in her flat, 12-year-old Georgie must confront reality when her estranged father, Jason, shows up out of nowhere. Uninterested in a new parental figure, she remains resistant to his efforts. As they both adjust, Georgie and Jason find that they have a lot of growing up to do.

title: Seabirds
synopsis: Over an intimate conversation whilst cooking with her grandmother, eight year-old Nithya learns of the tie between heritage and food and how new borders cut her Chettiar family off from their childhood home.

title: Seagrass
synopsis: Set in the mid 1990s, a Japanese Canadian woman grappling with the recent death of her mother brings her family to a self-development retreat. When her distressed relationship with her husband begins to affect the children’s emotional security, the family is forever changed.

title: Searching
synopsis: After David Kim’s 16-year-old daughter goes missing, a local investigation is opened and a detective is assigned to the case. But 37 hours later and without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets are kept today: his daughter’s laptop.

title: Searching for Rodakis
synopsis: As a Greek tombstone of unknown origin is discovered underneath the floorboards in an old village house in Turkey, an almost forgotten story from the country’s creation unravels; the forced population exchange in 1923.

title: Second Coming
synopsis: Jackie discovers she’s pregnant and knows it is not her husband’s child. Jackie and Mark haven’t been intimate in some time, but Jackie claims she hasn’t been with anyone else either. The unnerving side effects of her pregnancy begin to affect her mental state, creating turmoil within the family.

title: Secret Sunshine
synopsis: Shin-ae moves to her recently late husband’s hometown. Despite her efforts to settle in this unfamiliar and too-normal place, she finds that she can’t fit in. After a sudden tragedy, Shin-ae turns to Christianity to relieve her pain, but when even this is not permitted, she wages a war against God.

title: Secrets & Lies
synopsis: After her adoptive mother’s death, Hortense, a successful Black optometrist, establishes contact with her birth mother: a white working-class single mother named Cynthia. Cynthia denies Hortense is her daughter. Meanwhile, Cynthia and her young daughter Roxanne manage their love-hate relationship.

title: See You Next Tuesday
synopsis: Store clerk Mona is phone-less, friendless, and heavily pregnant. Struggling to take care of herself, she spends time with her mother May, a recovering alcoholic, and leans on her chaotic sister Jordan. Navigating—and stoking—family dysfunction, Mona grows more impetuous as her due date approaches.

title: Self-Criticism of a Bourgeois Dog
synopsis: Young filmmaker Julian, ironically played by director Julian Radlmaier himself, falls for a young expat and offers her the leading part in his wannabe Communist fairy tale film.

title: Selma
synopsis: 1965. Civil rights activists James Bevel, Hosea Williams and Martin Luther King Jr campaign for their right to vote. As Luther King Jr leads hundreds of like-minded people along the 54-mile highway from Selma to Alabama’s capital, Montgomery, they are met with violent conflict and brutal opposition.

title: Semana Santa
synopsis: Dali, her son Pepe, and her new boyfriend Chávez are on a peaceful beach vacation—but the promise of relaxation quickly fades. Pepe longs for his late father, Chávez frets over money, and Dali silently struggles with her grief. As the group grows distant, each person embarks on a separate adventure.

title: Senna
synopsis: A Brazilian motor-racing legend, considered by many the greatest driver to ever live, exploded into Formula One in 1984. Compilations of archival footage reveal a physical and spiritual quest for perfection, both on and off track, until the tragic events of Imola in 1994.

title: Sentimental Value
synopsis: Nora, a successful stage actress, reunites with her estranged father, Gustav Borg—a once-renowned film director planning a comeback with a script based on their family. When Gustav offers Nora the lead role, which she promptly declines, he turns his attention to a rising Hollywood starlet instead.

title: September Says
synopsis: Sisters September and July share an intense bond, speaking in a secret language and keeping the outside world at a distance. After September is suspended from school, their mother brings them to a remote house on the Irish coast—where July begins to resist her sister’s increasingly sadistic control.

title: Séraphine
synopsis: Primitivist painter and outsider Séraphine toils as a maidservant in 1914 in Senlis, France. She harbors a secret passion for painting in the evenings, one that is discovered by German art collector Wilhelm Uhde. Taken by her enormous talent, Uhde becomes determined to bring her art to the world.

title: Serious People
synopsis: Married and expecting a child, music video director Pasqual is struggling to balance the needs of his business and his pregnant wife. When a famous rapper hires him, Pasqual finds a look-alike to impersonate him at work while he focuses on his new family. But his replacement has ideas of his own.

title: Seven Chances
synopsis: Struggling stockbroker Jimmie Shannon learns that, if he gets married by 7 p.m. on his 27th birthday—which is today—he’ll inherit $7 million from an eccentric relative. But, after Mary Jones, whom he’s mooned over for years, turns him down, he has only hours to find a woman who’ll marry him.

title: Seven Veils
synopsis: An earnest theater director has the task of remounting her former mentor’s most famous work, the opera Salome. Some disturbing memories from her past will allow her repressed trauma to color the present.

title: Seventeen Times Cécile Cassard
synopsis: Cécile Cassard is a woman shattered by the accidental loss of her husband. Leaving her young son with her sister, Cecile attempts to start anew in Toulouse, where she strikes up a friendship with Matthieu, a queer barman. Across 17 vignettes, Cecile’s unique path to complete reconstruction unfolds.

title: Sex
synopsis: Two married, heterosexual chimney sweeps face experiences that unsettle their views on sexuality and identity. One has a same-sex encounter without considering it either as an expression of homosexuality or infidelity. The other finds himself in dreams where he is seen as a woman.

title: Sex and Lucía
synopsis: Lucía is a young waitress in Madrid, who seeks refuge on a quiet, secluded Mediterranean island after the loss of her longtime boyfriend. Amidst the fresh air, dazzling sun, and glistening deep blue water, Lucía begins to piece together the dark corners of her past relationship.

title: Sex and Violence
synopsis: In eight minutes, animator Bill Plympton gives us 24 vignettes: seven are clearly about sex, 10 about violence, and seven others deal with human frailties, particularly the body as it ages.

title: Sexual Drive
synopsis: Designer Enatsu worries about his sexless life. Office worker Akane is getting ready to return to work while undergoing rehab at home for panic attacks. Elite advertising agent Ikeyama wants to end his relationship with his lover. A shabby man named Kurita appears before all three with a secret.

title: Sexy Beast
synopsis: Gal Dove, a retired safe-cracker, is living the good life on the southern Spanish Coast. One day his past appears in the form of former associate Don Logan, whose reputation as the most psychopathic gangster in the London underworld is a sign of very bad things to come.

title: Shadow
synopsis: In a kingdom ruled by a young and unpredictable king, the military commander has a secret weapon: a “shadow” look-alike who can fool both his enemies and the King himself.  Now he must use this weapon in an intricate plan that will lead his people to victory in a war that the King does not want.

title: Shadow of a Cloud
synopsis: On a baking hot day in Bucharest, priest Florin Florescu arrives at a quiet home to administer the last rites to a dying woman. But not everyone is happy with the visitor and his Christian ritual.

title: Shadows in Paradise
synopsis: After losing his friend and co-worker to a sudden heart attack, lonely Helsinki garbageman Nikander finds himself completely directionless. But unlikely redemption comes in the form of Ilona, a plain supermarket cashier with whom he begins a tentative love affair.

title: Shagbands
synopsis: In the summer heatwave of 200,. a gang of teenage girls in South London face strange sexual awakenings driven by gossip and the mysterious ritual of shagbands—small plastic bracelets representing the wearer’s sexual history.

title: Shakedown
synopsis: Shakedown was a series of parties founded by and for Black women in Los Angeles featuring go-go dancing and strip shows for the city’s lesbian underground scene. In them, female clientele slipped dollar notes into lap dancers’ panties while celebrating lesbian sexuality to pulsating hip-hop beats.

title: Shakti
synopsis: Federico, in his mid-20s, lives alone in Buenos Aires. The day his grandmother dies, he plans to break up with his girlfriend, only for her to beat him to it, leaving him absurdly fixated on her reaction. The support of his family, his shrink, and a new encounter pull him back to the present.

title: Shall We Dance?
synopsis: Shohei Sugiyama seems to have it all—a high-paying accountancy job, a beautiful home, and a caring family. However, he feels something is missing in his life. One day, while commuting, he spots a woman and decides to find her, which leads him headfirst into the world of competitive ballroom dancing.

title: Shame
synopsis: New Yorker Brandon lives in a high-rise apartment and has a well-paying job. He is also a sex addict who hides his shame behind this facade of respectability. The unexpected arrival of his wayward sister threatens to unravel everything.

title: Shanghai Blues
synopsis: In 1937, amid Shanghai’s bombings, aspiring songwriter Tung and showgirl Shu find solace under a bridge. Though unable to see each other clearly, the young couple fall in love and plan to meet again when the war ends. A decade later, Tung and Shu cross paths again, unaware of their past connection.
