title: Shanty Tramp
synopsis: A small-town Southern white prostitute has to decide between her lust for a black man and her meal-ticket, the sleazy revival-tent preacher who’s just rolled into town.

title: Sharp Stick
synopsis: Sarah Jo is a naive 26-year-old living on the fringes of Hollywood with her mother (longing for money) and sister (longing for exposure.) She just longs to be seen. When she begins an affair with her older employer, she is thrust into an education on sexuality, loss, and power.

title: Shaun of the Dead
synopsis: At nearly 30, Shaun drifts through life between his friends, his flat, and the local pub, leaving little space for his girlfriend Liz. When Liz breaks up with him, he resolves to put his life back on track—just as a zombie outbreak turns London into chaos.

title: She Dies Tomorrow
synopsis: After waking up convinced that she is going to die tomorrow, Amy’s carefully mended life begins to unravel. As her delusions of certain death become contagious to those around her, Amy and her friends’ lives spiral out of control in a tantalizing descent into madness.

title: She-Man: A Story of Fixation
synopsis: A curious cross-dressing hybrid of psychodrama and intrigue, filmed in Florida, clearly made to capitalize on the Christine Jorgensen sex change mania of the 1950s. Directed by a pre-Porky’s and Black Christmas Bob Clark, with an arguably sympathetic viewpoint towards trans men and women.

title: She's Funny That Way
synopsis: When an established Broadway director casts his escort-turned-actress Izzy to star in his new play alongside his wife and her ex-lover, a zany love tangle forms. When Izzy’s therapist Jane—who is in a failing relationship with the play’s writer—enters the scene, things get even more complicated.

title: She Said
synopsis: A testament to the power of investigative journalism. New York Times reporters Megan Twohey and Jodi Kantor break one of the most important stories in a generation—a story that helped launch the #MeToo movement and shattered decades of silence around the subject of sexual assault in Hollywood.

title: She Was Dania
synopsis: A teenage mother faces the challenge of raising a child alone while trying to reinvent herself in an unforgiving social environment.

title: Sheep
synopsis: Aurélien, known as “Mouton” (Sheep), works in a restaurant in a small town. A cheerful 17-year-old, he leads a simple life and is loved by those who get to know him. That’s until Mouton disappears after a bizarre accident. The friends he leaves behind continue on with life, but miss him dearly.

title: Shéhérazade
synopsis: Zachary, 17, is released from prison. Rejected by his mother, he hangs around the mean streets of Marseille, where he meets Shéhérazade, a teenage sex worker. They fall in love and Shéhérazade puts him up in her room. Little by little, without really wanting to, Zach becomes Shéhérazade’s pimp.

title: Sherlock Jr.
synopsis: A film projectionist longs to be a detective, and puts his meager skills to work when he is framed by a rival for stealing his girlfriend’s father’s pocketwatch.

title: She's Lost Control
synopsis: Fiercely independent, Ronah works as a sexual surrogate in New York City, teaching her clients the very thing they fear most—to be intimate. Her life unravels when she starts working with a volatile new client, blurring the thin line between professional and personal intimacy in the modern world.

title: Shine Your Eyes
synopsis: Nigerian Amadi is looking for his brother Ikenna in the city of São Paulo. Little by little he realizes that the supposedly successful mathematics teacher invented an imaginary narrative of his life in Brazil for his family. Amadi slowly uncovers the truth on a quest through the city’s underworld.

title: Shirin
synopsis: A film adaptation of “Khosrow and Shirin”, a 12th-century Persian tale, is shown to an audience of more than 110 celebrated actresses, all Iranian except for one from France. Though the film is invisible, the faces of the women watching the show tell the story as they gaze upon the heroine.

title: Shirley
synopsis: Horror writer Shirley Jackson is on the verge of completing her masterpiece when the arrival of newlyweds Rose and Fred upends her routine. Heightening tensions in her relationship with her philandering husband, Jackson decides to befriend Rose, but Rose becomes unsettled by Jackson’s fragile state.

title: Shirley Adams
synopsis: In the depressed cape Town neighborhood of Cape Flats, a single mother contemplates her fate and cautiously accepts the help of an overeager social worker as she struggles to care for her paraplegic and suicidal son.

title: Shithouse
synopsis: A lonely college freshman forges a strong connection with his resident assistant during a fraternity party.

title: Shiva Baby
synopsis: College student Danielle is faced with a series of awkward encounters at a day-long shiva, a Jewish gathering during a time of mourning. Amongst overbearing relatives, she is rattled by the appearance of an ex-girlfriend and of her secret sugar daddy, who unexpectedly arrives with his wife and baby.

title: Shoah: Part One
synopsis: Through interviews with survivors, witnesses, and former perpetrators, memories of the Holocaust unfold across the landscapes where it occurred. Over images of the Polish fields and forests that once were Treblinka, Chelmno, and Auschwitz, voices recount stories of deportation and survival.

title: Shoah: Part Two
synopsis: Through interviews with survivors, witnesses, and former perpetrators, memories of the Holocaust unfold across the landscapes where it occurred. Over images of the Polish fields and forests that once were Treblinka, Chelmno, and Auschwitz, voices recount stories of deportation and survival.

title: Shoeshine
synopsis: Two shoeshine boys in postwar Rome save up to buy a horse, but their involvement as dupes in a burglary lands them in juvenile prison where the experience takes a devastating toll on their friendship.

title: Shoplifters
synopsis: On the margins of Tokyo, a family is united by fierce loyalty and a penchant for petty theft. One day the father and son meet an abandoned little girl, and, despite their poverty, the family takes her in. But an incident will expose their secrets that upend their tenuous, below-the-radar existence.

title: Short Sharp Shock
synopsis: Gabriel, Bobby and Costa are old friends from Altona, a multicultural hood in Hamburg. Just out of prison, Gabriel wants to turn his back on crime, but the others continue to operate as petty criminals. Friendships are tested as the trio navigate a dark world of mafia bosses and deals gone wrong.

title: Shortbus
synopsis: Sex counselor Sofia has never once had an orgasm. But everything changes when Jamie and James, a gay couple she treats, introduce her to New York’s polysexual sex party scene. As dominatrix Severin helps Sofia to reach climax, Jamie and James’ sex life complicates with the arrival of a third lover.

title: Showgirls
synopsis: Nomi, a young drifter, arrives in Vegas to become a dancer. She gets a job stripping at one of the lesser joints on the strip, but soon catches the eye of talent scouts who hire the performers for a casino. She works her way into the cast, and eventually sets her sights on taking the starring role.

title: Showing Up
synopsis: In Portland, sculptor Lizzy prepares for an upcoming exhibition while navigating daily frustrations—from her artist-landlord’s distractions to family pressures and a wounded pigeon. As the show approaches, tensions quietly mount in her carefully balanced life.

title: Shrooms
synopsis: In a forest just outside Lisbon, Dan, a young Venezuelan man, forages for magic mushrooms. Back in the city, he prepares the mushrooms before distributing them across Lisbon to those who need them the most—using carrier pigeons as his secret delivery service.

title: Shut Up and Play the Piano
synopsis: The son of Hungarian Jews who fled to Canada during the war, Grammy-winning musician Chilly Gonzales inspired and collaborated with the likes of Daft Punk and Drake. Converging between rap, electro and chamber music, the eccentric entertainer invited himself into the ivory tower of classical music.

title: Sibel
synopsis: Sibel, who is only able to communicate by whistling, lives with her father in a remote village. The villagers view her as a second-class citizen. To make up for her loneliness, Sibel keeps herself busy doing field work. One day she meets a deserter from the Turkish army hiding in the forest.

title: Siberia
synopsis: Clint is a damaged man who has retreated to a remote mountain cabin where he hopes to find serenity. On a fateful evening, to confront himself, he begins a journey by dogsled to the world he once knew. He travels through dreams, memory and imagination in an attempt to find his true self.

title: Sibyl
synopsis: Lacking inspiration for her new novel, psychotherapist Sibyl borrows source material from the life of her newest patient Margot, a young actor wrapped up in a dramatic affair with her co-star, Igor. Becoming further enmeshed in Margot’s life, Sibyl starts to blur fiction with reality.

title: [sic]
synopsis: Artist Eric Baudelaire constructed an ‘imaginary reality’ after a sojourn in Kyoto. In an art bookstore, a girl is responsible for ‘bokashi’: obscuring images. The entire book collection has passed through her hands. She determines what we can and cannot see.

title: Sick of Myself
synopsis: Signe and Thomas are young, attractive, and extraordinarily infuriating. Their relationship as a couple degenerates when contemporary artist Thomas achieves celebrity. Jealous, Signe decides to go to any lengths to get herself noticed. Any lengths at all.

title: Sid & Nancy
synopsis: Sex Pistols, a successful punk rock band from England, embarks on their first U.S. tour. Bassist Sid Vicious brings troubled girlfriend Nancy Spungen, causing tension with bandmate Johnny Rotten and manager Malcolm McLaren. Sid and Nancy’s relationship spirals into addiction and co-dependency.

title: Sidewalk Sisters
synopsis: A story about Elif, who, at the age of 16, is forced to confront the harshest and most painful aspects of life. It follows her struggle to remain a good person despite facing tragic events that are too overwhelming for someone so young.

title: Sideway
synopsis: The residents of a small town set between a stormy sea and an ominous forest are becoming insane. They are convinced that successive signs appearing in the town are indications of doomsday.

title: Signal 8
synopsis: Lives carry on in Hong Kong as traces of civic upkeep morph into sites of remembrance. Decorative structures mimic nature then occasionally malfunction, transforming common spectacles into warning signs.

title: Silence
synopsis: Two Christian missionaries travel to Japan in search of their missing mentor at a time when Christianity is outlawed. When they are captured and imprisoned, both men are plunged into an odyssey that will test their faith, challenge their sanity and, perhaps, risk their very lives.

title: Silence is Golden
synopsis: The story of an Albanian immigrant who, while working as a barber in an Italian town, resorts to countless tricks to survive. One day, a stunningly beautiful woman moves in across from his shop, turning his life upside down.

title: Silent Country
synopsis: 1989. An idealistic director comes to a provincial town in East Germany to put on Samuel Beckett’s Waiting for Godot at the local theater. Although the unenthusiastic performers show no interest in the play, he remains undaunted. Meanwhile, far away in the capital, a revolution is taking place.

title: Silent Friend
synopsis: In Marburg’s Old Botanical Garden, an ancient ginkgo tree anchors three lives across a century. In 1908, Grete, the university’s first biology student, turns to plant photography. In 1972, Hannes is changed by close observation. In 2020, a visiting neuroscientist experiments with the tree.

title: Silent Souls
synopsis: When Miron’s wife Tanya passes away, he asks his friend Aist to help him say goodbye according to the rituals of the Merya culture—an ancient tribe from West-Central Russia. As the two men set out on a long journey with her body, Miron relates details of his marriage, with unintended consequences.

title: Silver Linings Playbook
synopsis: After losing his job and wife, Pat Solatano winds up living with his parents. He wants to rebuild his life, but his parents would be happy if he just shared their obsession with the Philadelphia Eagles. Things get complicated when Pat meets Tiffany, who offers to help him reconnect with his wife.

title: Silvia Prieto
synopsis: When she turns 27, Silvia Prieto decides to change her life: she quits marijuana and looks for a job. When she discovers that there are other women who share her name, she develops a bizarre obsession with the “other” Silvias, an obsession that involves unraveling the riddle of her own identity.

title: Simone Barbes or Virtue
synopsis: Simone, a leather-clad porn theater worker, spends her shifts bantering with her coworker and observing eccentric customers in the cinema’s lobby. Tonight, she clocks out and heads off to meet her girlfriend, a waitress at a lesbian club. Later, she’ll encounter a lonely man on the prowl.

title: Identifying Features
synopsis: Magdalena makes a journey to find her son, who has disappeared on his way to the Mexican border with the United States. Her odyssey takes her to meet Miguel, a man recently deported from the US. They start to travel together, Magdalena looking for her son, and Miguel hoping to see his mother again.

title: Sincronía
synopsis: When Arturo is offered a job in another country, he is forced to reevaluate his feelings towards his friend Sandra. Things get even more complicated when Sandra’s request for a loan to start her own business is approved. Soon, they’ll both have to make a decision between love and their careers.

title: Sing Sing
synopsis: Imprisoned for a crime he didn’t commit, Divine G finds purpose by acting in a theatre group alongside other incarcerated men, including a wary newcomer.

title: Singapore Sling
synopsis: One night Singapore Sling finds himself in a mysterious villa, watching two women bury a body. He falls into their trap and, in an atmosphere of isolation and decadence, the trio act out insane pleasure games and a ritual of blood and murder.

title: Singing Women
synopsis: An island off the coast of Turkey is about to be evacuated due to a possible earthquake — but its inhabitants have been stricken with a mysterious illness, consigning them to an uncertain fate.

title: Sinners
synopsis: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

title: Sirât
synopsis: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in the hope that Marina will be there.

title: Sissy Boy Slap Party
synopsis: This film plays like a goofy homage to Kenneth Anger’s Fireworks and Jean Genet as well as some po-faced example of ethnographic documentary.

title: Sister Midnight
synopsis: Trapped in the hell of coupledom, Uma is transformed into a disturbing and ruthless figure, giving free rein to her own feral impulses.

title: Sisters
synopsis: Journalist Grace witnesses a murder in the neighboring apartment of two twin sisters. However, when the police find no evidence of the crime, Grace takes things into her own hands. With the help of a private detective, she soon discovers more about the sisters’ relationship than she bargained for.

title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
synopsis: A man returns to dismantle his family’s house, where they were murdered in war, to rebuild it elsewhere. When the killer, a Red Army commander, tracks him down, a brutal cross-country pursuit begins.

title: Sitcom
synopsis: A conventional French family lives in apparent harmony until one day the father brings home a pet rat. One by one, as they come into contact with the rat, each member of the family goes to pieces and their hidden sexual and psychological perversions are exposed.

title: Skate Kitchen
synopsis: Camille, a reserved teenager, befriends an all-girl, New York City-based skateboarding crew called Skate Kitchen. She falls in with the in-crowd, has a falling-out with her mom, and falls for a mysterious skateboarder, but a relationship with him proves to be trickier to navigate than a kickflip.

title: Skate Story: Shortplay Depth I
synopsis: In the underworld, demons do not sleep. The moon keeps them awake. Most avoid the harsh moonlight and catch what little rest they can. One demon decides to skate through the underworld to reach the moon. This demon will eat the moon and free itself.

title: Skin Deep
synopsis: Leyla and Tristan seem like a happy young couple, but their relationship is on the rocks. To salvage it, they travel to a remote island and take part in a ritual in which they exchange their body for that of another person. When Leyla refuses to return to her old self, the situation escalates.

title: Skinamarink
synopsis: One night in 1995, 4-year-old Kevin and 6-year-old Kaylee awoke to find their father missing… and the doors and windows of their home gradually disappearing as well. As the hours drag on and the unnerving phenomena pile up, are they truly living a nightmare-and will they ever awaken from it?

title: Slack Bay
synopsis: Northern France, 1910. The bourgeois Van Peteghem family return to their towering mansion above ‘Slack Bay’ every summer. An unlikely romance blossoms between the mischievous Bille Van Peteghem and local mussel-gatherer, ‘Ma Loute’. Meanwhile, a series of mysterious disappearances are taking place.

title: Slacker
synopsis: A day in the life of eccentric young people in 1990s Austin, Texas. In a series of loosely connected vignettes, a merry-go-round of amateur philosophers, jilted lovers, inept criminals, aspiring artists, and whacked-out conspiracy theorists searches for a place in society.

title: Sleep of the Crow
synopsis: Nasip, a sleepwalker haunted by the fear of harming his son İsmail, locks them in separate rooms every night. Tormented by guilt and contemplating suicide, he becomes determined to find a trustworthy family to care for his son.

title: Sleeping Beauty
synopsis: Death-haunted, quietly reckless, Lucy is a university student who takes a job as a Sleeping Beauty. In the Sleeping Beauty Chamber old men seek an erotic experience that requires Lucy’s absolute submission. But soon she develops an increasing need to know what happens to her when she is asleep.

title: Sleeping Sickness
synopsis: German doctor Ebbo and his wife have spent two decades combating an epidemic of sleeping sickness in Cameroon. Soon, they will return to Europe, causing an identity crisis for Ebbo. When a young black doctor travels to Africa to evaluate the efficiency of the program, nothing goes according to plan.

title: Sleepless Night
synopsis: A cop races through a packed nightclub, dodging drug dealers, and corrupt cops in a mad chase to rescue his kidnapped son.

title: Sleepy
synopsis: Carlos has a disease called “Fatal Familial Insomnia”, which causes degenerative deterioration of his body and mind. An alternative cure is offered to him, which will unveil a story full of deception, pharmaceutical and political interests as well as an intense debate between life and death.

title: Slow
synopsis: When dancer Elena meets sign language interpreter Dovydas their instant connection bodes well for a romantic relationship. But when Dovydas reveals he’s asexual, their dynamic changes as both try to find a way to be together while fulfilling their respective needs.

title: Slow Machine
synopsis: Stephanie, a vibrant actress, meets Gerard, an NYPD counter-terrorism specialist who’s an aficionado of experimental theater. Flirtation ensues, ends disastrously, and forces Stephanie to the upstate home of musician Eleanor Friedberger, yet this escape is infected by violent memories.

title: Small Body
synopsis: Italy, 1900. Agata is a young woman who embarks herself on a desperate journey to reach a mysterious sanctuary to save her daughter’s soul from the eternal damnation of Limbo.

title: Small Things Like These
synopsis: Bill Furlong toils as a coal merchant to support himself, his wife and his five daughters. Early one morning while out delivering coal at the local convent, he makes a discovery that forces him to confront his past and the complicit silence of a town controlled by the Catholic Church.

title: Smiley Face
synopsis: With madcap charm and what appears to be a body made entirely of rubber, Anna Faris stars as lazy, out-of-work actress Jane F., who one eventful morning unwittingly scarfs down her spacey roommate’s super-charged pot cupcakes and then sets out to try and replace them before he finds out.

title: Smog in Your Heart
synopsis: Five people work at a tennis complex—the owner Manuel, a tennis teacher named La Tenista, new recruit Sergio from San Juan, shy manager Luján, and a dopey accountant Aristegui. Tensions flare as they consider making a pilgrimage to the cathedral of the town of Luján, but don’t actually invite Luján.

title: Smoke Sauna Sisterhood
synopsis: In southeast Estonia, in a traditional smoke sauna, a group of women from the Võro community come together to cleanse their bodies and share their stories. In observing sauna rituals, these women create space for each other as they each regain the strength they need to face the world outside.

title: Smoking Causes Coughing
synopsis: After a devastating battle against a diabolical giant turtle, five superheroes known as the Tobacco Force are sent on a mandatory week-long retreat to strengthen their decaying group cohesion. Their sojourn goes wonderfully well until Lézardin, Emperor of Evil, decides to annihilate planet Earth.

title: Snow
synopsis: Müzeyyen is twenty and still in high school. Her mid-term report shows no sign of improvement. She has a group of friends—Bekir, Ebru, Hazerhan, Ferdane and Kadir—who mean everything to her. One day Ali, a half-brother she has known about but never met, arrives.

title: Snow and the Bear
synopsis: In a snowbound Turkish town where winter feels endless, rumors of bears stir fear. Newly appointed nurse Aslı arrives as a man mysteriously disappears. Amid mounting gossip, she is drawn into a web of power, suspicion, and buried secrets that unsettle the fragile community.

title: Snowden
synopsis: Disillusioned with the intelligence community, Edward Snowden leaves his job at the NSA. He knows that a virtual mountain of data is being assembled to track all forms of digital communication. When Snowden decides to leak this classified information, he becomes a traitor to some, a hero to others.

title: Snowpiercer
synopsis: A post-apocalyptic ice age forces humanity’s survivors aboard a globe-spanning super train that functions via a perpetual-motion engine and through a cruel class system. One of the train’s poorest residents risks everything to incite a revolt for control of the engine, and the future of the world.

title: So Long, My Son
synopsis: Two families in China face upheaval over three decades of social, political and human upheaval in China. After a tragic loss, their paths diverge, and fortunes change. A quest for truth and reconciliation remains despite life’s twists, and goodbyes take a lifetime.

title: Só no Carnaval
synopsis: It is Carnival in Rio de Janeiro. With the help of wives, sisters, and mothers, men continue the time-honored tradition of dressing as women, walking the streets in feminine wigs, skirts, and makeup. Observers and members of the procession contemplate what it is to be a woman only for a day.

title: So Unreal
synopsis: A cinephile collage, both historical and philosophical, of films on artificial intelligence, cyberspace and virtual reality, from 1981 to 2001: cinema as a way and an instrument to cope with humanity’s euphoria, anxiety, fear and obsession with technology.

title: Socialist Realism
synopsis: On one side, we have Lucho and the working class; on the other, intellectuals backing the Popular Unity movement alongside the petite bourgeoisie. Their unlikely friendship escalates into scenes of action, gunfire, and discordant songs, offering a satirical portrayal of the era.

title: Society of the Snow
synopsis: The flight of a rugby team crashes on a glacier in the Andes, few passengers who survived the crash, find themselves in one of the world’s toughest environments to survive.

title: Soft in the Head
synopsis: Thrown out of her New York City apartment, Natalia, a 25-year-old hot mess, relies on the kindness of friends and strangers. Maury, the owner of a shelter, watches out for the wayward young woman, and tries to sidestep the turmoil following in her wake.

title: Soil
synopsis: This short film narrates the journey of a young man carrying a handful of soil into the grave of a deceased soldier who happens to be burying his own dead body.

title: Black Sun
synopsis: Like the black sun of an eclipse, Antonia is a lyrical singer of exuberant and dark beauty. Recovering from a suicide attempt in a rehabilitation institution, all her family ties are irreparably broken. But her sister remains deeply affected by what happened. May they reunite once again?

title: Solo
synopsis: Follows Simon, who must deal with the disappointment of two impossible loves: a passionate but destructive crush on Oliver and a distant and cold relationship with his mother Claire, who has just moved back in after a 15-year absence.

title: Some Like It Hot
synopsis: In 1920s Chicago, two unemployed jazz musicians accidentally witness a deadly mob hit. Dressed up as women, they decide to go into hiding as members of an all-female traveling band on their way to Florida. They both fall in love with Sugar, the band’s vocalist who dreams of marrying a billionaire.

title: Somers Town
synopsis: Tomo is a runaway from Nottingham. Marek lives in the district of Somers Town, between King’s Cross and Euston stations, where his dad currently works on a new rail link. These two teenagers—both newcomers to London—forge an unlikely friendship over one hot summer.

title: Something, Anything
synopsis: In the wake of a life-altering tragedy, Peggy, a seemingly typical Southern newlywed, confronts a profound spiritual crisis and sets out on a quest to discover a higher purpose. Without knowing what she seeks, Peggy jeopardizes her marriage, career, and friendships to find fulfilment.

title: Something Horizontal
synopsis: Stroboscopic glimpses of Victorian domestic surfaces and geometric shadows transform the physical world into an impressionistic fantasia. Elsewhere, a specter emerges from the depths of German expressionist cinema.

title: Something in the Air
synopsis: In the early 1970s, Gilles is a high school student in Paris, swept up in the political fever of the time. Yet his real dream is to paint and make films, something that his friends and even his girlfriend cannot understand. For them, politics is everything: the social struggle is all-consuming.

title: Something Wild
synopsis: A straitlaced businessman meets a quirky, free-spirited woman at a downtown New York greasy spoon. Her offer of a ride back to his office results in a lunchtime motel rendezvous, kickstarting an impulsive interstate road trip that brings the two face-to-face with their hidden selves.

title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
synopsis: Fran likes to think about dying. It brings sensation to her quiet life. When she makes the new guy at work laugh, it leads to more: a date, a slice of pie, a conversation, a spark. The only thing standing in their way is Fran herself.

title: Son of Rambow
synopsis: During a long English summer in the early 1980s, two schoolboys from differing backgrounds set out to make a film inspired by the film First Blood.

title: Son of Saul
synopsis: October 1944, Auschwitz. Saul is a Jewish prisoner working as a Sonderkommando. When he discovers the body of a boy he takes for his son, Saul decides to carry out an impossible task: save the child’s body, find a rabbi to recite the mourner’s Kaddish, and offer the boy a proper burial.

title: Song of Granite
synopsis: Enigmatic and complex, Joe Heaney was one of the greats of 20th-century traditional Irish singing. Shaped by the myths, fables, and songs, Heaney’s emergence from his upbringing in the west of Ireland to life as an NYC doorman to acclaim at the 1966 Newport Folk Festival came at a personal cost.

title: Song of Sea
synopsis: Part of the ‘10 Poets 10 Directors’ project, Song of the Sea transforms a poem into moving image, offering a meditation on rhythm, language, and the invisible pulse connecting words and water.

title: Song Without a Name
synopsis: Peru, at the height of the political crisis of the 1980s. Georgina is an indigenous woman from the Andes whose newborn daughter is stolen at a fake health clinic. Her desperate search for the child leads her to the headquarters of a major newspaper, where she meets Pedro Campos, a lonely journalist.

title: Sonne
synopsis: Three teenage girls in Vienna film themselves twerking in hijab to a pop song. When the video goes viral, Yesmin, the only Kurdish person among the friends, distances herself from her culture. Meanwhile, Nati and Bella meet two young Kurdish patriots, and the situation threatens to escalate.

title: Sorry Angel
synopsis: Paris, 1993. Jacques is a writer and single father in his thirties trying to maintain his sense of romance and humor in spite of the turmoil in his life. While in Brittany, he meets Arthur, an aspiring director in his twenties, who is exploring his sexuality, eager to get out of his parochial life.

title: Sorry, Baby
synopsis: Something bad happened to Agnes, but life goes on for everyone else. When a beloved friend on the brink of a major milestone visits, Agnes starts to realize just how stuck she’s been, and begins to work through how to move forward.

title: Sorry We Missed You
synopsis: Ricky and his family have been fighting an uphill battle against debt since the 2008 financial crash. An opportunity to regain some independence appears by becoming a self-employed delivery driver, but when he and his wife are pulled in different directions, everything will come to a breaking point.

title: Soul Kitchen
synopsis: Owner of a locals-only diner in Hamburg, Zinos is down on his luck. His girlfriend has moved to Shanghai, customers are boycotting the kitchen’s new gourmet menu, and he’s now got back issues. Things improve when a hip crowd embraces his revamped restaurant, but that doesn’t fix Zinos’ broken heart.

title: Sound of Falling
synopsis: Four adolescent girls (Alma, Erika, Angelika, Lenka) each spend their youth in the same farmhouse over the last century. Though separated by decades, resonances between their lives emerge: their desires and distress, secrets and truths, encounters with another’s gaze and defiant gaze in return.

title: Soundtrack to a Coup d'Etat
synopsis: In 1960, UN Security Council convenes as Abbey Lincoln, Max Roach protest US policies, Khrushchev denounces color bar, US sends Armstrong to Congo amid post-colonial coup.

title: Soundtrack to War
synopsis: George Gittoes, a lone documentary filmmaker, ventures into Iraq to see firsthand how music plays a part in the American Army’s life. This film takes us on an emotional roller coaster ride of the young and talented who have found themselves in the hell of war, and who want to stay alive.

title: Sous mon lit
synopsis: Mira, disobeying her parents, stays home alone for the first time during school break… She thinks herself strong and self-reliant, but will be proved wrong when fear comes upon her.

title: South Side Story
synopsis: In Palermo, Nigerian princess Romea sells her body at night. Meanwhile, street singer and Little Tony impersonator Giulietto is taken advantage of by everyone he knows. When Giulietto falls in love with Romea, a tug-of-war between different factions of Sicilian society breaks out.

title: Spa Night
synopsis: David Cho, a timid 18-year-old living with his financially-struggling immigrant parents, chances upon a secret cruising spot when he takes a job at an all-male spa. There he begins to realize hidden desires that threaten his life as a dutiful son and student.

title: Spartan
synopsis: A “lone wolf” U.S. government secret agent, Scott (Kilmer), is assigned the task of rescuing the kidnapped daughter of a high ranking government figure, only to discover along the way a larger, more sinister plot.

title: Special Flight
synopsis: 9 months immersed in the administrative detention center of Geneva. Each year, thousands of men and women in Switzerland are imprisoned without trial or sentence. Simply because they stay in the country illegally, they may be deprived of liberty for up to 18 months before being deported.

title: Spectre: Sanity, Madness & The Family
synopsis: Jean, the youngest of a large family, grew up in a community influenced by Chris, a spiritual guide. After receiving a tape from his sister, he rediscovers voices and sounds from his past. As the memories begin to emerge, he decides to follow in Chris’ footsteps, only to discover his family secret.

title: Spencer
synopsis: The marriage of Princess Diana and Prince Charles has long since grown cold. Though rumours of affairs and a divorce abound, peace is restored for the Christmas at the Queen’s Sandringham Estate. As always, there’s eating and drinking, shooting and hunting. But this year, things will be different.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
director: Joaquim Dos Santos, Kemp Powers, Justin Thompson
synopsis: Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighbourhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. When they clash on how to handle a threat, Miles must redefine what it means to be a hero to save the people he loves.

title: Spilt Milk
synopsis: An 11-year-old boy dreams of becoming a great detective like his TV hero Kojak. He sets up a private investigation with his best friend, but the disappearance of his older brother sets them off down a dark path.

title: Spirits of the Dead
director: Federico Fellini, Louis Malle, Roger Vadim
synopsis: All three segments are based on stories written by Edgar Allan Poe. Roger Vadim, Louis Malle, and Federico Fellini direct Jane and Peter Fonda, Brigitte Bardot, Alain Delon, and Terence Stamp in three stories of souls tormented by their own phantasmal visions of guilt, lust, and greed.

title: Spotless
synopsis: In an Istanbul apartment, a man hides his job loss while his partner, once blocked, channels his silent turmoil into her writing. As he grows obsessed with a small blemish in their home, she engages with those outside their bubble.

title: Spree
synopsis: Kurt Kunkle, a rideshare driver thirsty for followers, has figured out a deadly plan to go viral. As his disturbing livestream is absurdly embraced by the social media hellscape, a stand-up comedian emerges as the only hope to stop this rampage.

title: Spring Night, Summer Night
synopsis: The melancholy story of a half brother and sister in rural southern Ohio whose relationship suddenly turns intimate, sending the already-struggling farm family into a crisis of love, shame and recrimination. Cast entirely with regional actors and filmed on location in shimmering 35mm B&W.

title: Stalker
synopsis: A hired guide leads his two clients—a writer looking for inspiration and a professor seeking scientific discovery—through a hazardous wasteland and into the heart of the Zone, the restricted site of a long-ago disaster. Within the Zone is the Room: a place rumored to fulfil one’s deepest desires.

title: Starbuck
synopsis: David Wozniak has reached his 40s without a single adult responsibility. Just when he decides to take control of his life, news arrives that after a series of sperm donations he made 20 years earlier, he’s fathered 533 children, of which 142 are determined to discover his identity.

title: Stark Fear
synopsis: A noir psychodrama set amongst the oil fields of Oklahoma with obvious nods to a particular Hitchcock classic, Stark Fear is the sole film directed by WWII cameraman Ned Hockman, with B-pic favorites Beverly Garland and Skip Homeier (in a particularly oily performance).

title: Stars
synopsis: Bulgaria, 1943. Wehrmacht sergeant Walter oversees Bulgarian workers in a small-town repair shop while nearby Greek Jews await deportation to Auschwitz. Through the camp’s barbed wire, he meets Ruth, a young Jewish woman, and their conversations awaken unexpected feelings and fragile hopes.

title: Starve Acre
synopsis: In 1970s Yorkshire, Richard and Juliette relocate to Richard’s childhood home of Starve Acre, hoping the idyllic country surroundings will benefit their young son. However, a sudden and tragic event drives a wedge through the family, which triggers Richard to bury himself in a local folkloric myth.

title: State Funeral
synopsis: Moscow, March 1953: in the days following the death of Joseph Stalin, countless citizens flooded the Red Square to mourn their leader’s loss and witness his burial. Though the procession was captured in detail by hundreds of cameramen, their footage has remained largely unseen until now.

title: State of Grace
synopsis: Terry returns to New York’s Hell’s Kitchen after a long absence, falling back in with Irish mobsters Jackie and Frankie, and their sister, Kathleen, an old flame. Jackie’s increasingly erratic behaviour threatens a new alliance with the Italian mafia. Terry, meanwhile, harbors a perilous secret.

title: Steamboat Bill, Jr.
synopsis: While Steamboat Bill Sr. is a hard-working steamboat captain, his son is the opposite: educated, accident-prone, and simple-minded. However, Steamboat Bill Jr. might be able to assist his father in overcoming a rival local business—and win the affections of the rival’s daughter while he’s at it.

title: Steve
synopsis: Follows headteacher Steve battling for his reform college’s survival while managing his mental health. Concurrently, troubled student Shy navigates his violent tendencies and fragility, torn between his past and future prospects.

title: Stiletto: A Pink Family Tragedy
synopsis: Hasan is a night-shift taxi driver in Istanbul. He sees a woman in stilettos passing by while he is on his way back home in the morning. In a world where the boundaries of being a man are already set, he does something that is to become a disaster even greater than global warming.

title: Still the Water
synopsis: In the aftermath of a typhoon on the Japanese island of Amami Ōshima, teenager Kaito discovers a tattooed body washed ashore. Meanwhile, his girlfriend Kyoto must deal with the approaching death of her mother, an island shaman. Together, the pair struggle to find their place in the world.

title: Still Walking
synopsis: Twelve years after their eldest son died by drowning, Kyohei and Toshiko welcome their children home for a family reunion. Younger son Ryota still feels that his parents resent that he isn’t the one who died, while daughter Chinami strains to fill the uncomfortable pauses with forced cheer.

title: Stille Nacht I: Dramolet
synopsis: The Quays’ familiar puppet animation is here enhanced by the use of animated iron filings, which suggest the rapid formation of frost over every surface, the swaying of the individual particles suggesting a hefty buffeting by a keen, piercing wind.

title: Stille Nacht II: Are We Still Married?
synopsis: The Quays’ familiar puppet animation is here enhanced by the use of animated iron filings, which suggest the rapid formation of frost over every surface, the swaying of the individual particles suggesting a hefty buffeting by a keen, piercing wind.

title: Stille Nacht III: Tales from the Vienna Woods
synopsis: The Quays’ familiar puppet animation is here enhanced by the use of animated iron filings, which suggest the rapid formation of frost over every surface, the swaying of the individual particles suggesting a hefty buffeting by a keen, piercing wind.

title: Stille Nacht IV: Can’t Go Wrong Without You
synopsis: The Quays’ familiar puppet animation is here enhanced by the use of animated iron filings, which suggest the rapid formation of frost over every surface, the swaying of the individual particles suggesting a hefty buffeting by a keen, piercing wind.

title: Stinking Heaven
synopsis: Jim and Lucy run a commune for sober living out of their New Jersey home. Although there’s constant bickering and many fires to be put out, they have established a haven for these outcasts. But the harmony is interrupted when Ann, a recovering addict and the ex-lover of one housemate, arrives.

title: Stolen Kisses
synopsis: Dishonorably discharged from the army, 20-year-old Antoine Doinel finds it hard adapting to civilian life in Paris. While resuming his on-again, off-again relationship with Christine, he takes on a series of jobs, including a failed stint as a hotel clerk and a turn working as a private detective.

title: Stone of Destiny
synopsis: The story of Ian Hamilton, a dedicated nationalist who reignited Scottish national pride in the 1950s with his daring raid on the heart of England to bring the Stone of Scone back to Scotland.

title: Stopped on Track
synopsis:
After he finds out his days are numbered, a man leaves wife and children behind, parents, friends, neighbours and yesterday’s lover, the people in his life.
Day by day a little farewell.

title: Stories We Tell
synopsis: What is real? What is true? What do we remember? Using home movies, photographs, and interviews, Sarah Polley delves into the life of her mother, a creative yet secretive woman. But while she is talking to her relatives, her interest lies in the bigger picture of what families hold onto as truth.

title: Storm Children, Book One
synopsis: The Philippines is the most storm-battered country in the world. In 2013 Typhoon Yolanda, considered the strongest storm in history, struck the Philippines, leaving in its path apocalyptic devastation. A few months later, Lav Diaz visited Tacloban Island to film children lives in the aftermath.

title: Story of a Job Interview
synopsis: Erdem is a 35-year-old journalist. He has been unemployed for the last fifteen months and he’s about to become a father. He desperately needs a job. Being rejected once again in a job interview, he takes the news editor as a hostage.

title: Story of a Love Affair
synopsis: A wealthy industrialist becomes curious about his trophy wife Paola’s past and hires a private investigator. The detective discovers that she had fallen desperately in love with the handsome Guido as a young girl, and may have participated in a crime to win his hand…

title: Strange Way of Life
synopsis: After 25 years apart, rancher Silva rides across the desert to visit his former flame, town sheriff Jake. But after an evening of shared intimacy, reminiscing, and reconciliation, the revelation of both men’s link to a local crime suggests there is more to their meeting than a trip down memory lane.

title: Stranger by the Lake
synopsis: Summertime. A cruising spot for men is tucked away on the shores of a lake. Franck falls in love with Michel, an attractive, potent, and lethally dangerous man. Franck knows this—but decides to live out his passion anyway.

title: Stranger Than Paradise
synopsis: New York layabout Willie forms an unexpected bond with his young Hungarian cousin Eva when she pays him a surprise visit. Later, Eva moves in with their aunt in Cleveland, and Willie takes his best friend Eddie to see her—a visit that culminates in a strange, eventful trip to Florida.

title: All of Us Strangers
synopsis: One night in his near-empty tower block, Adam has a chance encounter with a mysterious neighbour Harry, which punctures the rhythm of his everyday life. As a relationship develops between them, Adam becomes preoccupied with memories of the past and finds himself drawn back to the home he grew up in.

title: Strawberry Mansion
synopsis: In 2035, James, a dream auditor working for an all-seeing surveillance state, takes a cosmic journey through the unconscious archive of Bella, a lifelong dreamer who remains resolutely analog. James falls in love with visions of Bella’s younger self, but the lovers’ paradise is soon threatened.

title: Street of Crocodiles
synopsis: A museum keeper spits into the eyepiece of an ancient peep-show and sets the musty machine going. Inside, the puppets partake of a series of bizarre rituals amongst the dirt and the grime.

title: Strokes of Fire
synopsis: In a time of political and social unrest in 19th century Korea, uncouth, self-taught painter Jang Seung-up explores his natural talent amidst the repressive world around him.

title: Submarino
synopsis: Nick and his brother’s childhood was marked by poverty and abuse until the family was torn apart by tragedy. Now 33, Nick has just been released from prison. The brothers live separate lives in Copenhagen but occasionally their paths cross. When they finally find each other, it’s almost too late.

title: Suddenly
synopsis: Reyhan, a 40-year-old woman who has lost her sense of smell, one day decides to change her life into something new. She vanishes without notice only to find her true self again.

title: Suddenly in the Dark
synopsis: Seon-hee leads the life of a perfect housewife. But when her husband hires Mi-ok—the orphaned daughter of a shaman priestess—as a maid, Seon-hee becomes convinced that the attractive girl uses her only possession, a strange wooden doll, to bring evil spirits into their home and destroy her family.

title: Suicide Room
synopsis: Dominik, a student at an elite private school, withdrawals from his classmates’ torments and humiliations drifts into an online chat world, where he meets a young girl in a “suicide room” who lures Dominik into a dangerous game.

title: Sukhee
synopsis: Sukhpreet ‘Sukhee’ Kalra is a 38-year-old Punjabi housewife who, fed up with her mundane life, goes to Delhi to attend her school reunion. Reliving the 17-year-old version of herself, she emerges reborn, transitioning from wife and mother to being a woman again.

title: Sukiyaki Western Django
synopsis: Ever since the Genpei War a few centuries before, two opposing clans have been fighting over a hidden treasure. When a stranger comes to town, he says he’ll join whichever clan offers him more money. However, the stranger has a hidden agenda: he is there to seek revenge on behalf of a sex worker.

title: Sultana's Dream
director: Sandhya Visvanathan, Aniruddh Menon, Shoumik Biswas, Aditya Bharadwaj
synopsis: An elderly woman based in contemporary Calcutta faces her hopes and shattered dreams. Flashbacks appear of various women’s experiences during Partition, including forced religious conversion, abuse, and abduction.

title: Summer 1993
synopsis: In 1993, six-year-old Frida leaves Barcelona and her grandparents for the countryside. Her parents have died, and she is taken in by her uncle Esteve and aunt Marga in their farmhouse. Despite the beautiful summer and the warm welcome, Frida finds it hard to settle in.

title: Summer Hours
synopsis: When elderly matriarch and art collector Hélène discovers that her health is declining, she calls upon her three children to come home. As the siblings gather, they must decide what to do with their mother’s extensive collection that she has devoted her life to—while also dealing with her mortality.

title: Summer Night Sky
synopsis: On a summer’s night two friends come across a bus stop. When they realize that they missed the last bus they decide to hitchhike. The film depicts the story of their journey.

title: Summer of 85
synopsis: After capsizing his friend’s boat in a storm, teenager Alexis is rescued by the charismatic David, then seduced by his irresistible charm. A tumultuous love affair occurs between the two, but how long will this dreamy relationship last? Will the dream last for more than one summer, the summer of 85?

title: Summer of Giacomo
synopsis: Nineteen-year-old Giacomo, newly regaining his hearing, heads to the river with his sixteen-year-old friend Stefania. As they wander the sunlit woods of northeastern Italy, they lose their way and drift into an afternoon that stretches like the whole summer.

title: Summer with Monika
synopsis: Harry Lund is a nineteen-year-old man who meets Monika, a romantic, reckless and rebellious seventeen-year-old, and they fall in love. They leave their families and jobs in their small town, Harry gets his father’s boat and they spend the summer together in an isolated island.

title: Sumo Do, Sumo Don't
synopsis: A college senior, Shuhei, is blackmailed by a professor into joining the school’s sumo team. He is aided by a group of misfits who must team together to defeat their rivals or face disgrace and the disbandment of the sumo club.

title: Sun Song
synopsis: A poetic journey from the darkness of dawn into the brightness of the midday sun in the American South. Filmed over the course of six months on one bus route in Durham, North Carolina, Sun Song is a celebration of light and a meditation on leaving.

title: Suna
synopsis: Suna, a woman in her fifties with no income, marries an elderly man for shelter. Although she cares for him, she is repulsed by their physical relationship. Overwhelmed by her situation, Suna falls into depression and begins secretly drinking to escape her despair.

title: Sunday Night
synopsis: Alex, an ultras, returns home empty-headed after his team’s loss. Living with his grandmother, he sells Rivotril to make ends meet. He meets Nemy at a rap battle. They cross the night in a stolen car—their bodies brush against each other in what seems to be the beginning of a love story.

title: Sundown
synopsis: A wealthy man is vacationing with loved ones at a resort in Acapulco, Mexico until he receives a phone call. There’s been a death in the family, and everyone must return home. However, the man pretends to lose his passport, which delays his return.

title: Sunny
synopsis: 19-year-old Hajo wrestles with caring for his 6-month-old son and finding both work and his role of being a father. Hajo has a plan, but it will put his infant son in danger.

title: Sunset
synopsis: In 1913, the young Irisz Leiter arrives in Budapest with high hopes to work as a milliner at the legendary hat store that belonged to her late parents. She is nonetheless sent away by the new owner. But when she finds out she may have a brother, Irisz scours the dark streets of Budapest to find him.

title: Super Happy Forever
synopsis: After the sudden loss of his wife, grumpy and apathetic Sano returns to the island where he and Nagi first met: the seaside town of Izu. With his friend Miyata by his side, the two rediscover the island in the shadow of Sano’s mourning, as early memories of meeting Nagi return to Sano.

title: Superior
synopsis: On the run, Marian seeks refuge with her estranged twin sister Vivian, a housewife in a crumbling marriage. Their reunion unsettles quiet routines, and when Marian’s past resurfaces, the sisters are pulled into a dangerous reckoning.

title: Supernova
synopsis: Long-term partners Sam and Tusker are travelling across England to visit their loved ones in places from their past. Since Tusker was diagnosed with dementia two years ago, the couple tries to cherish every moment together. As the trip progresses, however, their love is tested like never before.

title: Oasis: Supersonic
synopsis: The story of the 1990s rock phenomenon, Oasis, is traced from their explosive rise from working-class Manchester to global superstardom. Told in the band’s own words, archival live footage blends with behind-the-scenes glimpses of fame, chaos, and brotherly strife.

title: Support the Girls
synopsis: Lisa is the last person you’d expect to find in a highway-side ‘sports bar with curves,’ but as general manager at Double Whammies, she’s come to love the place and its customers. An incurable den mother, she protects her girls fiercely, but over the course of one trying day, her optimism is tested.

title: Surge
synopsis: Set over 24 hours, Joseph is trapped in a soulless job, living a life devoid of emotion and meaning. After an impulsive act of rebellion, Joseph unleashes a wilder version of himself. He is propelled on a reckless journey through London, ultimately experiencing what it feels like to be alive.

title: Surire
synopsis: Cinematic observational film about an environmentally protected salt flat exploited as a mine while the last native inhabitants watch from their run-down towns how the wealth is extracted from their ancestral lands.

title: Surprise Cinema
synopsis: A mischievious man plays an assortment of extreme practical jokes on unsuspecting victims – like replacing one man’s razor with a chainsaw.

title: Suspended Time
synopsis: April 2020. Film director Etienne and his brother Paul, a music journalist, spend lockdown together in their childhood home with their new partners. A feeling of unreality slowly pervades their daily lives.

title: Suspiria
synopsis: American ballet dancer Suzy Bannion arrives in Freiberg, Germany, to attend the prestigious Tanz Academy. From the moment she arrives, she senses that something evil lurks within the walls of the age-old institution. As she probes the depths of the dance school, terrible accidents start to happen…

title: Suspiria
synopsis: A darkness swirls at the center of a world-renowned dance company, one that will engulf the artistic director, an ambitious young dancer, and a grieving psychotherapist. Some will succumb to the nightmare. Others will finally wake up.

title: Suzhou River
synopsis: After getting out of prison, small-time crook Mardar stumbles upon a woman who looks exactly like his long-lost lover.

title: Suzume
synopsis: A 17-year-old girl named Suzume lives in a quiet town in Kyushu. Her life changes one day when a young traveler tells her he’s looking for a door. She follows the young man into the mountains, where there’s an old door surrounded by modern ruins. This begins her mysterious journey.

title: Swallow
synopsis: A pregnant housewife, Hunter appears to have it all. However, as the pressure to meet her controlling in-laws and Ken-doll husband’s rigid expectations mounts, cracks begin to appear in her carefully created facade. Hunter develops a dangerous eating habit, and a dark secret from her past seeps out.

title: Sweat
synopsis: Fitness influencer Sylwia seemingly has it made: hundreds of thousands of social media followers, endorsement deals, photo spreads in magazines. But as she starts to share more online, the rising pressure forces her to confront her deepest insecurities and the exhaustive demands of her lifestyle.

title: Sweaty Betty
synopsis: In a row house near Washington D.C., two stories of big dreams take place. Floyd and his family have raised a 1000 lbs. pig, determined to turn her into the Redskins’ mascot. A few blocks away, Rico and Scooby, two teenage single fathers and best friends, are scheming up a way to sell their new dog.

title: Sweet Country
synopsis: In 1929 in the outback of the Northern Territory, Australia, Aboriginal stockman Sam kills white station owner Harry March in self defense. Pursued across the outback, him and his wife Lizzie go on the run through the glorious but harsh desert country.

title: Sweet Bean
synopsis: Grumpy Sentaro runs a small bakery that serves dorayaki, pastries filled with sweet red bean paste (“an”). When an old lady, Tokue, offers to help in the kitchen, he reluctantly accepts. She will soon prove to have magic in her hands. Thanks to her secret recipe, the little business flourishes.

title: Sweetgrass
synopsis: The last modern-day cowboys lead their flocks of sheep up into Montana’s breathtaking and often dangerous Absaroka-Beartooth mountains for summer pasture.

title: Sweetheart
synopsis: For AJ, planning a gap year trip is much more appealing than spending a week with her family. Yet she finds herself on the Dorset coast with her mum and her sisters for what she expects to be a week of hell. That is, until she lays her eyes on the resident lifeguard Isla and is instantly infatuated.

title: Sweetie
synopsis: The buttoned-down, superstitious Kay is attempting to lead a normal existence with her new boyfriend Louis. That’s until Sweetie, her rampaging, devil-may-care sister, returns home after an absence, exposing the rotten roots of their family and placing a strain on Kay and Louis’ relationship.

title: Swept Away
synopsis: On an elegant yacht cruising off the coast of Sardinia, Raffaella, a rich and stunning capitalist, enjoys tormenting Gennarino, a Communist sailor. Fate weaves a different scenario and roles become reversed when the two find themselves stranded together on a deserted island.

title: Swimming Pool
synopsis: A British author suffering from a writing block seeks inspiration and solitude at her publisher’s house in the South of France. When his daughter unexpectedly appears, her reckless, erotic lifestyle disrupts the author’s quietude. Their tumultuous interactions set off a series of disturbing events.

title: Swiss Army Man
synopsis: Hank is stranded on a deserted island, having given up all hope of ever making it home again. But one day everything changes when a corpse named Manny washes up on shore—the two become fast friends, and ultimately go on an epic adventure that will bring Hank back to the woman of his dreams.

title: Sword of Trust
synopsis: A grumpy pawnshop owner and his man-child employee join forces with a quirky couple to sell a Civil War-era sword, which comes with a convoluted report that claims the South won the war. This draws the attention of conspiracy theorists who are desperate to get their hands on the legendary sword.

title: Sworn Virgin
synopsis: In remote Albania, Hana escapes from her destiny of being a wife by invoking a traditional law: taking an oath of eternal virginity to live free as a man. To locals, Hana becomes Mark. Years later, something restless stirs under these men’s clothes. Mark embarks on a transformative voyage to Italy.

title: Symbiopsychotaxiplasm: Take One
synopsis: In New York’s Central Park, William Greaves gathers a group of actors to shoot a screen test. He hires three crews to film the actors, each other, and anything else that might be happening in the park. Confused by the ensuing chaos—and Greaves’s erratic behaviour—crew members rebel.

title: Sympathy for Mr. Vengeance
synopsis: Urgently in need of the money to pay for his gravely ill sister’s kidney transplant, Ryu, a punky deaf-mute factory worker, resorts to kidnapping the daughter of a wealthy industrialist. This act of desperation leads to a series of events that spiral into a bloody cycle of violence and revenge.

title: Symposium: Ladder of Love
synopsis: Inspired by Plato’s Symposium, a filmmaker makes a series of short films to explore the meaning and nature of love. He collaborates and debates with a cast of well-known figures from Canadian gay society, including Patricia Rozema, Brad Fraser, Daniel MacIvor, Tomson Highway, and Charles Pachter.

title: Synecdoche, New York
synopsis: Life is looking bleak for theater director Caden Cotard—his wife has left him and a strange disease is taking over his body. But after winning a MacArthur Genius Grant, Caden relocates to a giant warehouse and buries himself in a theatrical epic about his own life, set in a life-size replica of NYC.

title: System Crasher
synopsis: Wherever 9-year-old Benni ends up, she is expelled. She has become what child protection services call a “system crasher.” But she is not looking to change her ways, and has one goal: go back home to her mother. When anger management trainer Micha is hired to help, suddenly there is hope.

title: Tabu
synopsis: A temperamental old woman, her Cape Verdean maid and a neighbor devoted to social causes live on the same apartment building in Lisbon. When the old lady dies, the other two learn of an episode from her past: a tale of love and crime set in an Africa straight from the world of adventure films.

title: Tahara
synopsis: When their former Hebrew school classmate dies, Hannah and Carrie attend her funeral as well as a Jewish grief session hosted by their synagogue. Hannah, more interested in impressing her crush, convinces Carrie to practice kissing with her, unlocking feelings that turn Carrie’s world upside down.

title: Take Care of Your Scarf, Tatiana
synopsis: Sometime in the mid-sixties, Southern Finland. Two misfits, Valto and Reino, hit the road in a black Volga. Along the way, they pick up two women, one Estonian and the other Russian. In spite of language barriers and the men’s incapability to approach the opposite sex, romance begins to brew.

title: Take Shelter
synopsis: When Curtis LaForche, a crew chief from Ohio, begins having dreams about a foreboding storm, he starts building a shelter in his backyard for himself and his family. But his obsessive actions become more and more erratic, placing his livelihood, his marriage, and his health in jeopardy.

title: Tale of Cinema
synopsis: In Seoul, a suicidal student meets a young woman who decides to join him in his fatal gesture. Tongsu, an unsuccessful filmmaker, spots a young woman, who happens to be the lead actress in the film he has just seen. Their stories will cross paths thanks to their love for cinema.

title: Tale of Tales
synopsis: Once upon a time, there were three neighboring kingdoms each with a magnificent castle, from which ruled kings and queens, princes and princesses. One king was a fornicating libertine, another was captivated by a strange animal, while one of the queens was obsessed with her wish for a child.

title: Tales from the Gimli Hospital
synopsis: Late 19th century. A smallpox epidemic ravages Gimli, a small Icelandic-Canadian fishing village on the shores of Lake Winnipeg. In a hospital room, two patients, Einar and Gunnar, become friends at first—but bitter jealousy emerges once they reveal their darkest secrets to one another.

title: Talk to Her
synopsis: Benigno is infatuated with Alicia, a dancer he watches from the anonymity of his apartment. After an accident, she is brought to the hospital where Benigno happens to be her caregiver. When wounded bullfighter Lydia is brought into the same ward, her companion, Marco, bonds with Benigno.

title: Talk to Me
synopsis: When a group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand, they become hooked on the new thrill, until one of them goes too far and opens the door to the spirit world forcing them to choose who to trust: the dead or the living.

title: Talking About Trees
synopsis: Ibrahim, Manar, Suleiman and Altayeb, four veteran members of the Sudanese Film Club, embark on a journey in which they aim to revive and old cinema to bring cinemagoing culture back to their country. In the crisis-ridden country, the four friends encounter insurmountable resistance.

title: Tamah
synopsis: In a restaurant, a thief steals a chain watch from a man. This action triggers a chain of coincidences. Finally the watch gets back to where it belongs.

title: Tamara and the Ladybug
synopsis: Doña Meche, an old lonely lady, and Tamara, a mentally challenged woman in her forties, whose life was thrown into disarray after her brother left her alone, meet in their solitude in an endeavor to return a baby that Tamara found on a newspaper stand.

title: Tamara Drewe
synopsis: When Tamara Drewe returns to the village of her youth, life for the locals is thrown upside down. Tamara – once an ugly duckling – has been transformed and is now a minor celebrity, beginning a comedy of manners with the townsfolk.

title: Tampopo
synopsis: A determined widow running a small ramen shop in Tokyo seeks to transform it into the best in the city. With help from two truck drivers and a group of eccentric allies, she experiments, learns, and refines her craft, turning a simple bowl of noodles into a celebration of dedication and community.

title: Tangerine
synopsis: On Christmas Eve, transgender sex worker Sin-Dee Rella meets her friend and fellow transgender sex worker Alexandra at Donut Time. Once informed that her boyfriend and pimp, Chester, has been cheating on her with a white cisgender woman, Sin-Dee storms out to search the neighborhood.

title: Tango
synopsis: Mario Suárez, a seasoned film director, struggles with a personal crisis after his wife leaves him due to depression. Immersing himself in his tango film, he becomes captivated by the lead dancer, a passionate performer whose lover, a dangerous mobster, has invested heavily in the production.

title: Tanner Hall
synopsis: A vivid peek into the private world of an all-girls boarding school. In a cozy, but run down New England town, the knot of adolescent complexity is unraveled through the coming of age stories of four teen-age girls.

title: TÁR
synopsis: Renowned musician Lydia Tár is days away from recording the symphony that will elevate her career. When all elements seem to conspire against her, Lydia’s adopted daughter Petra becomes an integral emotional support for her struggling mother.

title: Afternoons of Solitude
synopsis: Filmmaker Albert Serra follows star Peruvian matador Andrés Roca Rey from the solitude of his hotel room to a circuit of Spanish bullfighting arenas, observing the charged spectacle and violent encounters that await him. His preparations and rituals reveal the exacting demands of his profession.

title: Tarot
synopsis: When a group of friends recklessly violates the sacred rule of Tarot readings they unknowingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within the cursed cards. One by one, they come face to face with fate and end up in a race against death.

title: Taste
synopsis: Bassley, a Nigerian footballer living in Vietnam, has been unable to make a living since he broke his leg. He and four middle-aged women he sometimes works for decide to escape to an old house, where together they create a special world for themselves. But this intimate utopia cannot last forever.

title: Taste of Cherry
synopsis: Middle-aged Mr. Badii wishes to die in a society where suicide is considered an abomination. Driving in the hills above Tehran, he searches for an accomplice who is willing to bury him after he is dead. He meets an assortment of different characters, but each have reasons to turn down the job.

title: Tatami
synopsis: Midway through the Judo World Championships, Iranian female judo fighter Leila and her coach Maryam receive an ultimatum from the Islamic Republic ordering Leila to fake an injury and lose, lest she be branded a traitor of the state.

title: Tatsumi
synopsis: As Yoshihiro Tatsumi, the Japanese comic artist, becomes successful, he redefines the manga landscape with an alternative genre for adults—and his work plunges into the darker aspects of life.

title: Tatuapé Mahal Tower
synopsis: Javier Juarez Garcia, an Argentinian scale model figure, decides to live in São Paulo to seize the city’s real estate boom. But after a tragedy, he  changes his life and work in architectural models around the world. But he’ll never forget his real goal: come back and take revenge.

title: Tavern Man
synopsis: A typical day in the life of a lonely man who works in an unsuccessful tavern located in the historical center of Guimarães, an old town in Portugal. During the day, the man spends his time coming up with new menu items for his tavern, while at night he gets ready to meet someone special.

title: Taxi Driver
synopsis: Isolated ex-marine Travis Bickle applies for a job as a taxi driver, hoping that the night-time work will alleviate the effects of his insomnia. But as he ferries passengers across New York, and embarks on a mission to save a teenager from prostitution, his sense of place and purpose steadily warps.

title: Taxi Monamour
synopsis: In Rome, two young women face complicated moments in their lives. Anna is in conflict with herself and her family, while Cristi is fleeing from Ukraine, forced away by a war that keeps her far from home. Their brief encounter will become an unpredictable and intense dive into freedom.

title: Taxi Tehran
synopsis: Director Jafar Panahi drives a yellow cab through the vibrant streets of Tehran. Diverse passengers, including his niece, a vendor of pirated DVDs, and human-rights activist Nasrin Sotoudeh, enter the taxi and candidly express their views of the world while being interviewed by the gracious Panahi.

title: Taxi zum Klo
synopsis: A Berlin schoolteacher and a constant cruiser, Frank even corrects homework in public toilets as he waits to score. One evening, he meets sweet-natured Bernd, who desires monogamy. Can the two tolerate each other’s habits, and for how long can Frank keep his sexual orientation out of the classroom?

title: Taxibol
synopsis: Driving around Cuba’s streets, Lav Diaz—the famous Filipino director—and Gustavo Flecha—a talkative Cuban taxi driver—find themselves discussing politics, migration, social conditions, and love. Touching on many personal stories and experiences, the duo creates portraits of their own countries.

title: Tchaikovsky's Wife
synopsis: In 1872, Antonina, a devoted admirer of composer Tchaikovsky, pursues him obsessively and proposes marriage. Though he is largely absent, he remains a haunting presence in her life, fueling a one-sided love that spirals into isolation and emotional torment.

title: Tchoupitoulas
synopsis: Three curious brothers venture to Tchoupitoulas Street in the French neighborhood of New Orleans, encountering dancers, musicians, hustlers, and revelers parading through the lamplit streets. Missing their last ferry home, the boys embark on a long walk of discovery through New Orleans’ nightscape.

title: Technoboss
synopsis: Luís Rovisco, divorced and well into his sixties, is hoping to retire soon from his job. Until then, the songs he dreams up during the day while driving make up for all the injustices in his life. But before Lucinda, the receptionist at Almadrava Hotel, he finds himself singing to a different tune.

title: Teddy
synopsis: In the Pyrenees, a wolf fuels the anger of the locals. Teddy, 19, has no qualifications and works in a massage parlor. For him and his girlfriend Rebecca, it’s an ordinary summer. But on a full moon night, Teddy is scratched by an unknown beast. In the following weeks, he gets curious animal urges…

title: Teenage
synopsis: Teenagers didn’t always exist. As the world’s cultural landscape was thrown into turmoil during the industrial revolution, the concept of a new generation took shape. Whether hip Swing Kids, zealous Nazi Youth or frenzied Sub-Debs, it didn’t matter—this was a new idea of how people come of age.

title: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma
synopsis: After years of slapdash sequels, the Camp Miasma franchise is handed over to an enthusiastic young director for resurrection. But when she visits the original’s star, a now-reclusive actress shrouded in mystery, the two women fall into a blood-soaked world of desire, fear, and delirium.

title: Tehran: City of Love
synopsis: Three stories of love and yearning set in Tehran. Mina is a secretary in a beauty clinic who is struggling with her weight but is addicted to ice-cream. Hessam is a winner of bodybuilding competitions, who now trains affluent older men. Vahid is a funeral singer who has been dumped by his fiancée.

title: Tellurian Drama
synopsis: May 5th, 1923. The Dutch East Indies government celebrated the opening of a new radio station in West Java. It was called Radio Malabar. In March 2020, the local Indonesian government plans to reactivate the station as a historical site and tourist attraction.

title: Tempestad
synopsis: A group of innocent people are charged with human trafficking and thrown into prison. Authorities reassure the public that they’ve dealt a blow to organized crime. But an innocent mother is handed over to those for whom she’s being made to atone—in a private prison controlled by the Gulf Cartel.

title: Ten
synopsis: As she roams the streets of Tehran in her car, a recently divorced woman chauffeurs a rotating cast of passengers. Among those who set foot inside her cab include her combative young son, a heartbroken wife abandoned by her husband, and a defiant young sex worker going about her job.

title: Tendaberry
synopsis: In Coney Island, 23-year-old Dakota faces life alone after her boyfriend, Yuri, returns to Ukraine to care for his ailing father. When he goes missing, she discovers she is pregnant, forcing her to choose between clinging to the past or embracing an uncertain future.

title: We Are the Flesh
synopsis: A young brother and sister, roaming an apocalyptic city, take refuge in the lair of a strange hermit. He puts them to work building a bizarre cavernous structure, where he acts out his depraved fantasies. Trapped, they find themselves sinking into the realms of dark and forbidden behaviour.

title: Tenere
synopsis: This documentary tells the unknown story of African people who set out from Agadez, Niger, crossing the desert to reach Libya and Europe. We follow the journey of Bachir and his companions in a truck resembling Noah’s Ark, witnessing how they struggle both physically and emotionally.

title: Tenet
synopsis: The Protagonist, armed with only one word—Tenet—and fighting for the survival of the entire world, the Protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold in something beyond real time. Not time travel. Inversion.

title: Teorema
synopsis: A handsome and enigmatic stranger arrives at an upstanding wealthy household in Milan and successively seduces the son, the mother, the daughter, the father, and the maid. Each individual experiences some sort of revelation or epiphany. Then, as abruptly and mysteriously as he arrived, he departs.

title: Terminal Island
synopsis: Convicted of a crime she didn’t commit, Carmen is sentenced to life imprisonment on Terminal Island: a place without guards or laws, a defacto anarchic society. As violence mounts, Carmen finds herself leading the island’s underground resistance, planning to overthrow the leader’s reign of terror.

title: North Terminal
synopsis: During the 2020 lockdown, Lucrecia Martel returns to her home in Salta, Argentina’s most conservative region. Here she follows singer Julieta Laso who introduces her to a group of women musicians and defiant people who exchange glances, songs, and opinions around a fire.

title: Terminal Young
synopsis: A light-eyed man who, thanks to his best friend, works as an accountant at a tennis complex, rebels against the universe and himself to become an accountant for flower shops.

title: Terror, Sisters!
synopsis: Today is a day like any other for Kalthoum and her girlfriends. They sip cocktails, look for sex on the Internet, impatiently wait for love and once again, endure the transphobic insults of strangers. But today it’s not going to be like that: the four transgender friends will imagine their revenge.

title: Tesla
synopsis: Visionary inventor Nikola Tesla fights an uphill battle to bring his revolutionary electrical systems to fruition. After his relationship with Thomas Edison sours, Tesla goes solo, securing investment and patents with the help of J.P. Morgan’s daughter Anne, who has taken a liking to the inventor.

title: Thank You for Coming
synopsis: At 32, Kanika Kapoor has never had an orgasm… until last night. Now she needs to find out who got her there.

title: Thank You Very Much
synopsis: America, late 1970s. Performance artist Andy Kaufman revolutionizes stand-up comedy, confronting and confounding audiences with his eccentric onstage antics. His off-the-wall appearances across sitcoms and talk shows signal the making of an influential—yet inimitable—entertainer.

title: That Obscure Object of Desire
synopsis: Mathieu, a wealthy middle-aged French sophisticate falls desperately in love with his 19-year old chambermaid Conchita. Thus begins a game of cat-and-mouse, with Mathieu attempting to win the girl’s affections as she manipulates his carnal desires, each vying to gain absolute control of the other.

title: That Sinking Feeling
synopsis: Unemployed and aimless teenager Ronnie, and his hapless pals, spend their time hanging around the rainy parks and dingy cafes of dreary Glasgow. But their world is about to change when Ronnie hatches a complicated scheme to make them all rich by stealing stainless steel sinks from a warehouse.

title: The 10th Victim
synopsis: In a futuristic world, the Big Hunt is a large-scale game pitting assassins against each other. The prize for surviving 10 rounds? A million dollars. When renowned shooters Marcello and Caroline are selected for a showdown, their will to win is suddenly replaced by another kind of desire.

title: The 36th Chamber of Shaolin
synopsis: San Te, a civilian on the run from oppressive Manchu officers, takes refuge in a Shaolin temple where he devotes himself to the most rigorous of kung fu training. Each of the temple’s chambers specializes in one precise aspect of training—be it swordplay, wrist strength, eyesight, or enlightenment.

title: The 400 Blows
synopsis: Misunderstood Parisian 14-year-old Antoine Doinel journeys through a life of aloof parents, oppressive teachers, and petty crime. A loner on the brink of rebellion, Antoine is buoyed along the way by a touching friendship, a love of cinema, and the hope of escape.

title: The ABCs of Death
director: Kaare Andrews, Angela Bettis, Hélène Cattet, Ernesto Díaz Espinoza, Jason Eisener, Bruno Forzani, Adrián García Bogliano, Xavier Gens, Noboru Iguchi, Thomas Cappelen Malling, Jorge Michel Grau, Daichi Nagisa, Banjong Pisanthanakun, Simon Rumley, Marcel Sarmiento, Jon Schnepp, Srđan Spasojević, Timo Tjahjanto, Andrew Traucki, Nacho Vigalondo, Jake West, Ti West, Ben Wheatley, Adam Wingard, Mikael Wulff, Yûdai Yamaguchi, Lee Hardcastle
synopsis: Twenty-six directors… 26 ways to die! The ABCs Of Death is perhaps the most ambitious anthology film ever conceived, featuring segments directed by over two dozen of the world’s leading talents in contemporary genre film.

title: The Act of Devouring
synopsis: A troubled man is forced to repeat a grim task in 1940’s Czechoslovakia. Over time, he starts to fail his task and work on his grotesque secret instead. The fear of his secret being discovered slowly becomes unbearable.

title: The Adults
synopsis: Home for a short visit, Eric finds himself caught between reuniting with his sisters and chasing a victory with his old poker group. As the trip extends, his carefully constructed façade of his adulthood gives way to old childhood conflicts.

title: The Adventures of Gigi the Law
synopsis: Police officer Gigi routinely patrols a small rural community in Italy where nothing much ever happens. But now there’s a macabre case to solve, as for the second time in a short period, a local has jumped in front of a train. Gigi—the filmmaker’s uncle—starts investigating.

title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
